faqs.question: What is the TS EAMCET Counselling fees?
faqs.answer:
TS EAMCET Counselling fee for OBC category candidates is INR 1200 and for Scheduled Caste (SC)/ Scheduled Tribe (ST) Category is INR 600. CMR College of Engineering and Technology admission to the BTech course is done through TS EAMCET exam followed by TS EAMCET Counselling which is to be conducted in three phases namely, Phase 1, Phase 2 and Final Phase. Spot Round will also be conducted for Private Unaided Engineering Colleges. Candidates eligible to appear for the counselling process can refer to the table given below to check out the categories-wise TS EAMCET counselling fees:

faqs.question: TS EAMCET Counselling 2025 will be conducted in how many rounds?
faqs.answer: The TS EAMCET Counselling 2025 will be conducted in three phases, namely Phase 1, Phase 2, and the Final Phase, for admission into BE/BTech/BPharma courses by the Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE) and will be managed by Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH). Further, TS EAMCET (now TS EAPCET) Spot Round will also be conducted for Private Unaided Engineering Colleges.

college_info.intro:
JNTUH College of Engineering comprises several departments, including the Department of Chemical Engineering, Mathematics, Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and Metallurgical Engineering and others. Through its departments, JNTUH College of Engineering offers various UG, PG, and PhD courses.
The BTech and MTech programmes offered at the JNTUH College of Engineering are very popular among the students. The institute offers a four-year BTech programme and a two-year MTech programme in numerous specialisations. The popularity of these programmes is attributed to their curriculum, which has been developed and upgraded to enhance the knowledge of students in various branches of engineering and technology. The industry-institute relations established by JNTUH College of Engineering provide students with the opportunity to undergo various training programmes organised by industry partners. JNTUH College of Engineering also offers placement assistance to students and helps them get placed in top companies. The notable JNTUH College of Engineering recruiters include Zomato, Amazon, Microsoft, Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, and Google, among others. Check the popular programmes offered at JNTUH College of Engineering, along with their fee structure and eligibility criteria in the following table:

placements.overview:
JNTUH College of Engineering Placement Report for the year 2024 has not been released yet, it will be updated here once released. As per the NIRF Report available on the official website, the JNTUH College of Engineering median package offered to a BTech student is INR 6.25 LPA. Further, the median package offered to an MTech student stands at INR 8 LPA. A total of 1100 students were placed out of 1220 students and 600 students out of 720 were placed during BTech & MTech Placement 2023 respectively.

The top recruiters at JNTUH College of Engineering include CommVault, Amazon, Invesco, Mathworks, Darwin Box, Oracle, ION trading, TCS Ninja, Honeywell, Pega Systems, Quantum Analytics, AMD and many more. The key highlights of JNTUH College of Engineering placements 2023 are tabulated below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Both in core & non-core jobs
Both inside India & outside India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: The college has good placements, and most of the students with a good CGPA will be placed. Many MNC companies will visit the college since it is a university and a government institution. However, the internship facility is a little bit low as we have to seek it from outside on our own.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel is not that good, but it is worth the hostel fee. The food provided by the hostel is good not that bad but we can get bored with the weekly menu. The food will be good, and the Wi-Fi facility is also available in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: My JNTUH University facts.

review_content.Placements: A maximum of 70 percent of students are placed in the academic year 2024 to 2025. The highest package is approximately 52 LPA and the lowest is 5 LPA. Most companies that recruit us are like Infosys, Amazon, Microsoft, and AMD. These companies offer a sufficient package.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are clean and have good infrastructure. Hostel food is also good and sports facilities are very good for all types of games.
review_content.Faculty: Here, all the faculty members are professors, they are well-experienced in their teaching subjects, and they clarify students' doubts. For every semester, we have a semester exam. Exams are a little bit tough because we will study all the chapters from the start. I am joining the electronic and communication engineering branch. The faculty of this branch teaches very well.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Nice college for study and enjoyment, with the best faculty.

review_content.Placements: In Electronics and Communication Engineering, almost 40% students are placed. The highest package is 19LPA. The top recruitment company is Qualcomm. Internships are mostly outsourced. Best placements, nice environment, and the best educational institution.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library is provided with all the books required for the course. Pleasant environment at the department, Hostels are provided only for students staying far and students with low incomes. Most sports students are encouraged by our college irrespective of categories.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University.

review_content.Placements: Around 80 percent of students get placed in our senior batch. The highest salary package offered is 52 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The average package ranges from 7-8 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Oracle, Zeta, etc. The top role offered is SDE. I think our placements are quite good when compared to other colleges of our tier.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are quite normal. We have a projector in every class. We have departmental Wi-Fi, which is working quite well. Our library is a 3-storey building, which is quite huge and has a floor dedicated to the digital library. The hostel is quite average. Mess quality is okay. There is a university medical centre which will be open on weekdays only.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with getting into this college.

review_content.Placements: The main thing I want to share about the JNTUH college is that it will provide us with the best placements compared to other private colleges. Many MNCs will visit the college since it is a government college, and most of the students will be getting placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: I am a hosteller as compared to an outside hostel. College hostel is far better compared to the monthly mess fee, food, and other activities. All the hostellers must be inside the hostel by 6:00 pm. Everyone from the college will have access to the medical facilities till 5:00 pm.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good one for a government college.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 60 percent of Computer Science students get placed. The highest package is around 21 LPA. The lowest package is 6 LPA, and the average package is about 8–9 LPA. Some of the top recruiting companies include Oracle, Zeta, Verisk, Viasat, and Honeywell. The percentage of internships is unknown. Some of the top roles offered are data analyst, DevOps engineer, and machine learning engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities available for our course are above average. Every classroom has projectors for teaching. Every department has seminar halls and laboratories. Every floor has Wi-Fi access. The college has a central university library and another smaller library with proper facilities. The quality of hostel facilities is below average. The food is worst. The college has an indoor stadium, a ground, and other sports courts.

Based on the candidate's achieved ranks, TS EAMCET seats are allocated.

faqs.question: Can I join JNTUH College of Engineering without TS EAMCET?
faqs.answer: No, the institute does not have any other provision for admission to the BTech course. Additionally, apart from this candidate must also fulfil the eligibility conditions. Hence, an applicant must have passed Class 12 with Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with Mathematics/ Biology to be eligible for admission.

description: JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MCA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Admission to various UG and PG courses at JNTUH College of Engineering, Hyderabad, is based on several exams such as TS EAMCET and MBA exams. The institute offers BTech courses based on valid TS EAMCET ranks. JNTUH College of Engineering, Hyderabad, accepts exams along with the courses as follows:

JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 1228 and 27732 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 1228, 1614 and 2719, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad MCA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 616. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 432, and the 2023 cutoff was 314 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MCA has been decreasing in the last 3 years.

hostel_campus.college_name: JNTUH College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is not that good, but it is worth the hostel fee. The food provided by the hostel is good not that bad but we can get bored with the weekly menu. The food will be good, and the Wi-Fi facility is also available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: My JNTUH University facts.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are clean and have good infrastructure. Hostel food is also good and sports facilities are very good for all types of games.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college for study and enjoyment, with the best faculty.
reviews.review_text: The library is provided with all the books required for the course. Pleasant environment at the department, Hostels are provided only for students staying far and students with low incomes. Most sports students are encouraged by our college irrespective of categories.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are quite normal. We have a projector in every class. We have departmental Wi-Fi, which is working quite well. Our library is a 3-storey building, which is quite huge and has a floor dedicated to the digital library. The hostel is quite average. Mess quality is okay. There is a university medical centre which will be open on weekdays only.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with getting into this college.
reviews.review_text: I am a hosteller as compared to an outside hostel. College hostel is far better compared to the monthly mess fee, food, and other activities. All the hostellers must be inside the hostel by 6:00 pm. Everyone from the college will have access to the medical facilities till 5:00 pm.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good one for a government college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available for our course are above average. Every classroom has projectors for teaching. Every department has seminar halls and laboratories. Every floor has Wi-Fi access. The college has a central university library and another smaller library with proper facilities. The quality of hostel facilities is below average. The food is worst. The college has an indoor stadium, a ground, and other sports courts.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available for every department, and every lab has its own Wi-Fi. Everything is good in this college. Good campus-wide coverage, well-equipped with projectors and computers, large modern libraries accessed digitally, and affordable basic facilities in the hostel! Grounds and equipment for major sports.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with placements and with faculty up to a certain level.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and classrooms are good. We have an excellent university library with a lot of good books, and we even have a small library for general purposes. Our labs are a bit old, but nonetheless, they work very well and satisfy the requirements in most cases. Our department overall looks nice.

reviews.review_heading: Review by the First Batch of Cybersecurity at JNTUH.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are equipped with projectors. There is departmental Wi-Fi. There are many libraries, the main one being the university library, which has 3 floors. The hostel is of moderate quality. The food quality is better than that of other hostels. There is a university healthcare centre.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and peaceful surroundings.
reviews.review_text: The facilities for my course and hostel are quite good. I really like the infrastructure of my college. But it's not modern as it is an old university. The facilities in the hostel are not that great. Classrooms, library, and labs are good enough. The food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Not a great college, but decent.
reviews.review_text: The campus was widely spread along 45 acres of land with many great facilities like separate blocks for different branches of students, AC classrooms, library, free Wi-Fi around the entire campus, placement rooms, auditorium, project labs, lawn, waiting room, indoor complex, etc. The hostel was also excellent in providing quality facilities like good food, clean rooms, and a hygienic environment. The medical team was doing an excellent job. They were available to the students the entire day. The...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and nice infrastructure and above average facilities.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure are available. In our college in my civil department the nicest facilities are there and good information is given. WI-FI is available in department labs classrooms and two libraries.  Nice food in hostel mess. Canteen and medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Inside JNTUH  Education Campus Life and Growth.
reviews.review_text: Moderate infrastructure Wi-Fi labs are good library is extraordinary, classrooms are mid related to the hostel everything is good. Sports and games are super nice and tournaments happen. I really like our university library it has so many facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Love this college. The best college that teaches you life.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good, but the food may be a bit questionable. The infrastructure is good, especially the equipment provided in the laboratories, which is phenomenal. Food is sometimes good, whereas sometimes it is very odd-tasting and of low quality. The canteen needs to be improved a little bit.

reviews.review_heading: Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: In JNTUH, infrastructure is excellent and it looks like an IT company. Classrooms are very good and clean with wooden benches which are comfortable for students, and every room contains a stage allocated to faculty members.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad

likes.text: The top recruiting companies are Oracle, Mathworks, TCS, Wipro, Accenture, ACS Solutions, L&T, TCS Digital, TCS Ninja, Merilytics, and Deloitte visit our campus to hire students.
All the students do their internships at Reddylabs, Vishakasteel plant, ITC, and many other companies.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

college_info.intro:
NIT Hamirpur's popular courses are BTech and BArch. The university offers BTech specialisation in Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and others. The university offers a four-year programme under the guidance of an expert. Btech students can work as Project Managers, Construction Managers, Web Developers, Automotive Developers, and others.
The National Institute of Technology Hamirpur is one of the eminent universities. MBA from NIT Hamirpur Himachal Pradesh is also one of the popular programmes. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good location, nice atmosphere.

review_content.Placements: Students become eligible from the 7th semester. Companies like Amazon, DeShaw, Salesforce, Deloitte, etc., visit here, and they respectively take a good number of students. The highest package was 80 LPA by DeShaw, and the average package is around 13 to 15 LPA. 93% students are placed. I am also planning to sit in the placements and go into the development field.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a large variety of books in the library related to all fields. All the classes are equipped with smart boards. There are a lot of clubs and societies. Societies function throughout the whole year, and clubs in their respective semesters. In the hostel, we get a basic room with 3-4 people sharing with basic facilities, there are no AC rooms, and there are common washrooms. Meal quality is good, and it serves cuisines from pan-India.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely good campus and culture of my college.

review_content.Placements: Placement record is 93%. The lowest package is around 8 LPA, average is 12 LPA, and the highest is 53 LPA. Recruiting companies are JP Morgan, DE Shaw, Cisco, Wells Fargo, Samsung, Dell, and many more. Internship record is around 60-70% in B.Tech, M.Tech, and others too. Top recruiters are Samsung, Dell, and Oracle.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure. It has great scenery in college since it is in the mountains. Building of each department is too good with proper management and all. Hostels also have better space management and mess systems for hostelers, along with night canteen facilities. Separate hostels are available for both boys and girls of each year. Lecture halls are there with all facilities like AC rooms and smart board.

review_summary.college_name: NIT Hamirpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A decent college with good environment .

content.Placements: In electrical engineering department at my college, the placement rate is around 95 percent and there is a decent package of placements of around 22 Lacs and the highest package is I guess 55-60 Lacs. Well, the rates are gradually increasing, the level of education and placement is increasing day by day.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite decent. The hostels are not up to mark, water shortage, no Wi-Fi etc., but the classes, lecture halls, laboratories and library are good and atmosphere is very nice and over-all, it's a nice place with lovely climate and Greenery.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely the best placements in 2023.

content.Placements: Students become eligible from 7th semester. Companies like Amazon DeShaw Salesforce Deloitte etc visit here. They respectively take a good number of students. The highest package offered is 80LPA by DeShaw and average package is around 13 to 15LPA. 93 percent of students are placed. I am also planning to sit in the placements and go into the development field.
content.Infrastructure: In hostel we get a basic room with 3 to 4 people sharing with basic facilities. There are no AC rooms and there are common washrooms. Meal quality is good and it serves cuisines from pan india. Wi-Fi all over the campus with CCTV security. Classrooms are spacious and digitally updated. Labs are good all apparatus used in industry is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good location, nice atmosphere.

content.Placements: Students become eligible from the 7th semester. Companies like Amazon, DeShaw, Salesforce, Deloitte, etc., visit here, and they respectively take a good number of students. The highest package was 80 LPA by DeShaw, and the average package is around 13 to 15 LPA. 93% students are placed. I am also planning to sit in the placements and go into the development field.
content.Infrastructure: There is a large variety of books in the library related to all fields. All the classes are equipped with smart boards. There are a lot of clubs and societies. Societies function throughout the whole year, and clubs in their respective semesters. In the hostel, we get a basic room with 3-4 people sharing with basic facilities, there are no AC rooms, and there are common washrooms. Meal quality is good, and it serves cuisines from pan-India.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good campus and culture of my college.

content.Placements: Placement record is 93%. The lowest package is around 8 LPA, average is 12 LPA, and the highest is 53 LPA. Recruiting companies are JP Morgan, DE Shaw, Cisco, Wells Fargo, Samsung, Dell, and many more. Internship record is around 60-70% in B.Tech, M.Tech, and others too. Top recruiters are Samsung, Dell, and Oracle.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure. It has great scenery in college since it is in the mountains. Building of each department is too good with proper management and all. Hostels also have better space management and mess systems for hostelers, along with night canteen facilities. Separate hostels are available for both boys and girls of each year. Lecture halls are there with all facilities like AC rooms and smart board.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Highly recommended college.

content.Placements: Placements are excellent. Recent years show great placement sessions for CSE placement index is 92% for mechanical, and it was 99%. A student of the mechanical engineering department got placed at 205 LPA on campus placement in an international company. Placements for other branches are also good.
content.Infrastructure: There are very good quality hostels present in our institute. There are a total of 13 hostels in the National Institute of Technology, Hamirpur. The quality of food in our hostel is very good and is hygienic. Mess workers are corporate, and night canteens are present in every hostel. A hospital is also present in our institute.

faqs.question: How to apply for M.Tech at NIT Hamirpur?

paragraphs: The admission process includes the application, selection round, cutoff, merit list, and counselling. Find below the complete process aroundNIT Hamirpur admission 2025:
1: NIT Hamirpur Application Process

Students wanting to take admission at NIT Hamirpur are required to complete the application form for the course-specific entrance exam. After appearing for the respective entrance exams, candidates have to apply for the counselling process for the final seat allotment. However, candidates seeking admission to PhD courses are through the official website.
2: Selection Rounds

For its flagship BTech course, NIT Hamirpur admits students with a valid JEE Main score. Candidates are allotted seats through JoSAA Counselling. Admission to MTech is through GATE, followed by CCMT Counselling. Similarly for MSc admission, IIT JAM and CCMN Counselling are required. However, NIT Hamirpur MBA admissions are done through exams such as CAT, MAT, CMAT, etc.
3: Release of Cutoff list, Counselling & Admission Confirmation

The cutoff for BTech, MTech and MSc courses is released by the respective counselling bodies. Whereas, for MBA admission, the institute releases direct merit lists after declaring the final results of all rounds. The shortlisted candidates are then required to pay the admission fee to confirm their seats.
For more information about NIT Hamirpur - National Institute of Technology check out the below videos:
NIT Hamirpur feesfor all UG & PG courses include tuition fees, hostel fees, and one-time fee payments.

Coming to affordability, it is a major reason why a large percentage of people drop out of college. Although the availability of student loans and scholarships has reduced the cost of education, there are sometimes prerequisites to meet to be eligible for them. faqs.question: What is the minimum eligibility requirement for MBA admission at NIT Hamirpur?
faqs.answer: To be eligible for NIT Hamirpur MBA programme, a candidate needs to pass a bachelor’s/ professional degree from a recognised institute/ university with a minimum of 50 per cent aggregate or equivalent CGPA (45 per cent for SC/ ST/ PwD candidates). Candidates, appearing for the final year of bachelor's degree/ equivalent qualification or awaiting result, are also eligible to apply.

faqs.question: How to apply for an MBA at NIT Hamirpur?
faqs.answer: Interested candidates with a Bachelor’s degree from a recognised university and a valid CAT/MAT/GMAT/CMAT score can apply. Eligible students can then apply by filling out the admission form, which can be availed via online mode (nith.ac.in) and has to be sent via post. The selection is based on academic records and scores in the national-level Management examinations.

faqs.question: Is NIT Hamirpur campus good?
faqs.answer: As per the student reviews, theNIT Hamirpur campushas been remarked as especially beautiful and full of greenery. The campus is spread across 320 acre land. placement_data.title: NIT Hamirpur Placement Overview 2026
paragraphs: According to media reports, the overall highest package offered during NIT Hamirpur placements 2026 stood at INR 3.4 Crore per Annum . The highest package was offered to CSE and ECE Dual Degree students. In Electronics department , the highest package recorded was INR 1.68 Crore per Annum .
15 students have received package 40 LPA whereas 50 students have received placement package above 30 LPA during NIT Hamirpur placements 2026.
As of now, 67 offers have been made to 116 eligible BTech CSE students in 2026 . The average and median package recorded during NIT Hamirpur BTech CSE placements 2026 was 21 LPA and 18 LPA .
Placement drive 2026 is still ongoing and the complete placement report is not released yet.

faqs.question: Does NIT Hamirpur offer placement assistance to students?
faqs.answer: Yes, NIT Hamirpur is good in terms of placements. The overall highest package in 2026 stood at INR 3.4 Crore per annum. BArch placement rate recorded in 2025 was 100%. The highest package offered to Architecture students in 2025 was INR 7.1 LPA. faqs.question: What was the average package during recent NIT Hamirpur placements?
faqs.answer: NIT Hamirpur gives decent placement packages to the students. The average package received during NIT Hamirpur BTech placements 2025 stood at INR 10.58 LPA. Earlier, in 2024, the average package was INR 10.5 LPA.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters during NIT Hamirpur placements?
faqs.answer: The list of top recruiters during NIT Hamirpur placements in recent years is presented below: NIT Hamirpur Placements: Top Recruiters Accenture Infosys Godrej JP Morgan Chase L&T Infotech HSBC Samsung Capgemini IBM Maruti Suzuki

faqs.question: What is the median package received during NIT Hamirpur placements?
faqs.answer: According to NIRF report 2025, the course-wise median package received during NIT Hamirpur placements over the past three years is presented below: Course Median Package (2022) Median Package (2023) Median Package (2024) BTech INR 7.54 LPA INR 8.25 LPA INR 10.05 LPA MTech INR 7.5 LPA INR 7.5 LPA INR 10.29 LPA

faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech course at NIT Hamirpur?
faqs.answer: The NIT Hamirpur BTech fees range between INR 5 Lacs- INR 6.25 lacs. The duration of the course is between 4 to 5 years. Moreover, candidates who want to take admission have to fulfil the eligibility criteria and also clear the entrance exam. So, the eligibility criteria for NIT Hamirpur BTech admissions is that candidate should have passed Class 12 with a minimum of 75% aggregate. The entrance exam accepted is JEE Main followed by JoSSA counselling. Candidates can apply for JEE Main by visiting its official website.

description: NIT Hamirpur cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the NIT Hamirpur JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last nine years of NIT Hamirpur JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

NIT Hamirpur JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the NIT Hamirpur CSE cutoff 2025 was 15074 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branches, such as ECE and Mechanical, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission were 23269 and 40442, respectively for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cuto

For the General AI category students, the NIT Hamirpur B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 15074 and 57218 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 15074 and 17150, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and Integrated B.Tech. + M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at NIT Hamirpur. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at NIT Hamirpur to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of NIT Hamirpur. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) with last round cutoff scores of 539 and 510, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 539. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 298 and 489 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at NIT Hamirpur - National Institute of Technology. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

NIT Hamirpur CCMN cutoff 2026 is yet to be released for admission to the MSc/MSc Tech courses. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the table below to view the specialisation-wise 2025 cutoff details for the General AI category students. During the NIT Hamirpur MSc cutoff 2025, the last round closing ranks varied between 775 and 1686. Of all the specialisations, the one with the lowest cutoff rank of 775 was M.Sc. in Mathematics and Computing in the General AI category. This indicates that t

The maximum cutoff rank required for MSc admission was 1686 in the General AI quota. This indicates that students with a cutoff rank below the mentioned rank here have higher chances of getting admission to their desired specialisations. The cutoff ranks vary across different rounds, categories and specialisations.
Within the MSc course, the top two most competitive specialisations were M.Sc. in Mathematics and Computing and , with last round closing ranks of and , respe

CCMN is the centralised platform for admissions to the MSc and MSc (Tech Programmes) at NITs, IIEST Shibpur, and some CFTI institutes that accept the IIT JAM scorecard. This year, CCMN counselling was conducted for three regular rounds and two special rounds for MSc admission across different participating institutes. Candidates preparing for NIT Hamirpur admission can refer to the table below to view or download the year- and round-wise CCMN cutoff list.

As per NIT Hamirpur DASA UG cutoff 2022, the last round closing rank for Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) stood at 47 after Round 3 Seat Allotment for the General category candidates. Tabulated below are the DASA UG closing ranks for NIT Hamirpur cutoff 2022 along with 2021 for the General category students:

Considering the last round of NIT Hamirpur CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Computer Science and Engineering and Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence), witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branches such as Electronics and Communication Engineering (VLSI Design) and Materials Science and Engineering had comparatively relaxed cutoff scores for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

facilities: Hostel: NIT Hamirpur is a residential campus with eight boys' hostels and four girls' hostels. These hostels are a combination of triple-seated or four-seated rooms, while some are double occupancy as well as single occupancy rooms.

Healthcare Centre: NIT Hamirpur has its own healthcare centre to meet the basic health needs of students or anyone who is part of the system. The emergency cases are sent to the zonal hospital in Hamirpur.

Sports Complex: NIT Hamirpur has a sports facility for different indoor and outdoor sports activities. The sports complex has a ground and a courtyard where students can play cricket, football, lawn tennis, volleyball, badminton and more.

Central Library: Spread over a floor area of 3200 sqm, NIT Hamirpur has a central library with more than 1 lakh books and a plethora of scientific journals, present in both print and electronic media. The central library also has a reading room with the capacity to house 600 students at a time.

Incubation Cell: In March 2017, NIT Hamirpur entered into an agreement with the Government of Himachal Pradesh to set up an incubation cell at the campus. Incubation cell is set up in the central block building with a designated area of 64.28 sqm.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college with good environment .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite decent. The hostels are not up to mark, water shortage, no Wi-Fi etc., but the classes, lecture halls, laboratories and library are good and atmosphere is very nice and over-all, it's a nice place with lovely climate and Greenery.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely the best placements in 2023.
reviews.review_text: In hostel we get a basic room with 3 to 4 people sharing with basic facilities. There are no AC rooms and there are common washrooms. Meal quality is good and it serves cuisines from pan india. Wi-Fi all over the campus with CCTV security. Classrooms are spacious and digitally updated. Labs are good all apparatus used in industry is available.

reviews.review_heading: Good location, nice atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: There is a large variety of books in the library related to all fields. All the classes are equipped with smart boards. There are a lot of clubs and societies. Societies function throughout the whole year, and clubs in their respective semesters. In the hostel, we get a basic room with 3-4 people sharing with basic facilities, there are no AC rooms, and there are common washrooms. Meal quality is good, and it serves cuisines from pan-India.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good campus and culture of my college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. It has great scenery in college since it is in the mountains. Building of each department is too good with proper management and all. Hostels also have better space management and mess systems for hostelers, along with night canteen facilities. Separate hostels are available for both boys and girls of each year. Lecture halls are there with all facilities like AC rooms and smart board.

reviews.review_heading: Highly recommended college.
reviews.review_text: There are very good quality hostels present in our institute. There are a total of 13 hostels in the National Institute of Technology, Hamirpur. The quality of food in our hostel is very good and is hygienic. Mess workers are corporate, and night canteens are present in every hostel. A hospital is also present in our institute.

reviews.review_heading: The natural beauty of NIT Hamirpur is so awesome. You will love it.
reviews.review_text: If you are a fresher, then your hostel is KBH (Kailash Boys Hostel). Hostels are so awesome, but you will see some monkeys. Monkeys are not as harmful as you think. The one thing is that there are three to four LAN cables in each room. If your LAN is not working, then you can also use Wi-Fi, which is very fast and unlimited. The library is also open for you, but till 8:00 PM in the first year. When you become a senior, you will get HBH hostel and library up to 12:00 AM. All classrooms have a dig...

reviews.review_heading: Best weather, strict faculty, trips are absolutely heaven, and more than average placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the hostel, library, and lecture halls. The library is central, fully air-conditioned, and has blowers in winters. Departments are really nice except the MNC department, which has only classrooms and not exactly a separate department. Hostels are quite nice and get lenient as you move to higher years. Mess food is more than good except in HBH boys hostel. Ground and SAC are there for extracurricular activities, sports, and games, and the gym is also there, separate for girl...

reviews.review_heading: NIT Hamirpur College review.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and mess are good enough to manage. Wi-Fi is available in classrooms, and LAN is available in hostel rooms. We can get anything you want on campus only. Classrooms are well-ventilated, and every classroom has a projector. There is a big stadium for cricket and football, and an indoor stadium for badminton.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, NIT, Hamirpur is the best.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in our college are so good, as there are furnished labs, a good library, classrooms with a projector that are air conditioned, a lecture hall, and a library. Due to the quality of food being average, I prefer to choose a hostel because in a hostel, the food is average in mess. You can even see it, but anyway, do choose a hostel over mess food.

reviews.review_heading: Perhaps the best college you can get at this rank.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are decent, with some issues. The food is generally good with some exceptions. Major issues can be shortage of water during rainy season which causes a lot of problems. The issue is that there are mostly 4 seater rooms till third and single seater rooms available only for fourth-year students. The lab facilities are good, and there are more than enough opportunities for those who try to get them.

reviews.review_heading: Beautiful engineering college.
reviews.review_text: Beautiful and green campus location, and there is Wi-Fi all over the campus, you will stay connected near the department building, hostel, and library. Talking about the library, it is quite good, I'll say, and provides every facility that is necessary. Hostel food is, I'll say, average, not too good, and there are medical facilities 24/7 and a health centre within the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good off-campus placement, decent overall.
reviews.review_text: Department infrastructure is great, but hostel infrastructure depends on blocks. Some blocks of hostel have good quality services, but others don't have proper cleaning, and some are even broken. There is a library, Wi-Fi is also available, however, it is pretty slow in some areas. Labs are good, and so are the classrooms (1st year lecture hall is a bit bad as it doesn't have AC, but later it gets good). Food in Kailash Boys Hostel (1st year hostel) is good except dinner (Only sweets are good in...

reviews.review_heading: NIT, Hamirpur college shiksha review by Abhivadan Chandel.
reviews.review_text: This college has the best infrastructure facilities available and uses high-quality products, and many things are the same as those in multiple colleges. In this college, canteen food is also good and hygienic. This college has available facilities like a classroom, a bathroom, labs, Wi-Fi, a lift, a campus, an auditorium, etc.

reviews.review_heading: NIT Hamirpur engineering course admission taken in 2025-26.
reviews.review_text: in this course, there are many facilities available for the student, like a classroom, a bathroom, a library, auditorium, CCTV, a canteen, hostel, etc. facilities are available. in this college, the canteen food is very tasty and hygienic, and many sports and games are organized every year.

reviews.review_heading: The college campus is really beautiful.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are extremely good. A large library is present on the college campus with proper study arrangements. The quality of facilities available in the hostel is also very good. The campus is very beautiful.

data.description: NIT Hamirpur has over 250 acres of campus area. The university gives modern amenities with good infrastructure to its students. The facilities of the National Institute of Technology Hamirpur include Healthcare Centre, Sports Complex, Central Library, Incubation Cell, etc. The institute also has a hostel facility with eight boys hostels and four girls hostels. These hostels have the option to choose from triple-seated or four-seated rooms. There are some double occupancy as well as single occupancy rooms.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about NIT Hamirpur - National Institute of Technology

likes.text: Big companies like Amazon, HCL, Flipcart, Paytm, Samsung, Oracle, Infosys, and many others visit our campus to hire students for placements.
Placements for CSE department are very good with a lot of companies available for campus recruitments.

paragraphs: NIT Hamirpur scholarships range from private to government scholarships. These are offered to talented students on a need or merit basis. A total of 28 NIT Hamirpur scholarships are available for eligible students to choose from. Need-based scholarships are offered to keep in mind the financial background of the student whereas merit-based scholarships are offered to bright students with a good academic record. Tabulated below are a few NIT Hamirpur scholarships along with eligibility criteria and amount:

Meritorious SC/ ST students, whose family income is less than INR 4 LPA

- INR 45,000 for computer and accessories
Kalpana Chawla Chhatravritti Yojna
Only H.P. Board (Top two thousand girl) students are eligible
INR 15,000 PA

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, C. V. Raman Global University ranks #96 under the category 'Engineering'.

The CAT 2026 registration is expected to start in the Aug, 2026 for admission to the MBA course.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: 11th by Times under the Engineering category

college_info.intro:
CV Raman Global University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. MBA students are placed in top companies such as Cognizant, Ncompass Tech Studio, and others. The university provides MBA students with a strong foundation in Business Management while allowing them to specialise in specific areas of interest. MBA course is taught by experienced faculty members who are experts in their fields and areas of interest. The university is committed to helping several students achieve their professional and academic goals.
CV Raman Global University BTech students can become Software Engineers, Data Scientists, Data Analysts, and others. Overall it is one of the highest-ranked universities offering professional, technical, and non-technical courses to students. Check out the below video to know more about CV Raman Global University programmes:

Candidates must know their CV Raman Global University eligibility criteria and apply accordingly. At the UG level, the university offers BTech, , BBA, and various other courses to students. At the PG level, the university provides MTech, MSc, MBA, and other courses to students. The university also offers 14 PhD courses to students. BTech is offered in eight specialisations such as Computer Science & Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and others. faqs.question: What is the eligibility for CV Raman Global University?

faqs.answer: A:    To gain admission to the BSc programme, applicants should have finished Class 12 in Science with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, or Biology as a compulsory subject from a recognised Board or University with at least 60% aggregate. Admission to the BSc course is determined through performance in the CGET entrance exam. Those interested in applying can visit the official website to apply online.

A:    Gandhi Institute For Technology and C. V. Raman Global University both are renowned universities for B.E. / B.Tech. However, in terms of affordability, Gandhi Institute For Technology is a better option since the total tuition fee for Gandhi Institute For Technology is INR 234,400 - INR 360,000 and the total tuition fee for B.E. / B.Tech at C. review_content.General: Circular infrastructure is pretty good, with proper air-conditioned classrooms, comfortable seats, proper workbenches, equipment, and machinery available for a good hands-on experience. All the computers that are provided in the laboratories are high-end for simulations and AIML. There are many clubs that can help in gaining experience. Hostel facilities are below average, although some new hostels have been constructed. The condition of the old one is the worst, and the mess is a nightmare. There are some canteens available all over the campus, which are the lifeline of hostellers. Sports facilities are quite good, there is a dedicated football and cricket ground.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics & Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: You can take admission in this college.

review_content.Placements: In my course, Electronics Engineering, 91 percent placement is there, 6–7 LPA in 2024. Top companies were Wipro, Accenture, Apollo, IBM, etc. I have no idea about the internship programs. Many top roles are there, you can participate in any of the competitions and if you win, you can get a chance to go for state or national level.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is very good, neat and clean, and the campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. The classrooms are also very good, in fact, many of the classrooms are fully air-conditioned. The library is also very good, you can borrow books from the library. The food is called average. The medical facility is also very good here, with 24*7 ambulance service of the university.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with faculty. Placements are average. If you study hard, you can get placed.

review_content.Placements: This is my second semester. The minimum percentile should be 7. Infosys comes here. Recently this year, the maximum placement is 45 LPA, so, it is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Many hostels are good. Many are not that good, so they can be called average. The course is nice, and Wi-Fi and library are good. Medical facilities and an ambulance are always available. The canteen is not good at all. In sports, not all sports are good because of the players, but the volleyball team is at the state level. Everything is good, but there is no good food in or outside the campus unless you cook by yourself.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure, but it lacks placement.

content.Placements: Placement is not that good. From my batch, there are almost 800 students only in CSE and allied branches, I'm talking about and out of which till now only 200 are placed. The top recruiters are Infosys and Accenture. The highest package is 9 LPA on campus, and the lowest is 3.6, which is by Infosys.
content.Infrastructure: No doubt, the infrastructure is very good, they have invested a lot in the infrastructure. The labs and classrooms are all up to the mark. They have a smart screen for each class. But the only bad thing is the hostel's mess food, which is of the worst quality. The hostel rooms are fine.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics & Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It's an average college, but you can still consider it.

content.Placements: I am not certain about the overall placement statistics for the B.Tech programme. However, in recent years, the electronics and communication engineering branch has achieved an approximate placement rate of 85%, with an average package of around 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for my course are TCS, Infosys, IBM, Accenture, Wipro, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, Cisco, and Tata Steel. Top roles offered are AIML engineer and cloud engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Circular infrastructure is pretty good, with proper air-conditioned classrooms, comfortable seats, proper workbenches, equipment, and machinery available for a good hands-on experience. All the computers that are provided in the laboratories are high-end for simulations and AIML. There are many clubs that can help in gaining experience. Hostel facilities are below average, although some new hostels have been constructed. The condition of the old one is the worst, and the mess is a nightmare. There are some canteens available all over the campus, which are the lifeline of hostellers. Sports facilities are quite good, there is a dedicated football and cricket ground.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science & Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Can't say that it's a bad college, just needs improvement in its environment.

content.Placements: The placement percentage is different for every branch. For example, like last year, the ECE students had 100% placement, whereas the Computer Science and allied branches had an overall placement of 75-80% with very few securing above 5 LPA. This year's placement is ongoing, where Infosys is offering a 3.5 LPA package to approximately 80 students.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is quite good with different categories, single bed, 2 bed, 3 bed, 4 bed and more, with the hostel fees according. The Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. The food in the hostel mess is manageable, like not very good, but also will not make you sick, it's like tasteless food without salt. The non-veg served in the mess is quite good and is prepared well. The classroom and labs are very good with the latest equipment and top-notch facilities.

paragraphs: CV Raman Global University admissionto UG, PG, PhD and diploma programmes is open. Candidates willing to apply must register forCGET examsand appear for the same for some UG and PG courses. Additionaly, the university also accepts other entrance exam scores such as OJEE, XAT, MAT, JEE Main and others. Candidates who qualify for the entrance examination can then register onCV Raman Global Universityregistration portal for seat allocation. CV Raman Global University admission to all UG, PG and PhD courses is entrance-based. Additionaly, the university offers merit-based admission to diploma courses. Candidates interested in getting into CV Raman Global University must follow the eligibility and selection criteria set by the college. After filling out the criteria candidate, are required to visit the university's official website to fill out the online application form. Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for more CV Raman Global University courses

C. V. Raman Global Universityfeescontain various components such as tuition fees, exam fees, exam registration fees, and others. Some of the fees are paid one time while some fee is paid annually. Coming to affordability is one of the strong reasons why many candidates don't opt for a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education more accessible. Further, the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Given below are the total tuition fees, and average package for C. V. C. V. Raman Global University offers entrance-based admission to candidates in UG and PG courses. The university allows seats based on the last qualifying exam score in diploma courses. The candidates who clear the eligibility criteria and admission criteria set by the university. After filling out the criteria candidates will have to pay some amount of fee for final seat allotment. CV Raman Global University admission processincludes the submission of the application form, entrance test, release of merit list, counselling process and final fee payment process. Candidates seeking admission to theCV Raman Global Universitymust follow the step-wise admission process as given below.
Step 1:CV Raman Global University Application Process 2025

Candidates fulfilling the course-specific eligibility requirements can apply for CGET by visiting the university's official website of CV Raman Global University for some UG and PG courses. Additionaly, for either course candidates are required to fill out the application from the university's official website. The candidates shall ensure that they apply within the due date.
Step 2: Appear for the Entrance Test

Further, candidates are required to appear for the entrance test i.e.JEE Main/ OJEE/ GATE/CGETaccepted by the university for admission to UG and PG courses. Further, for diploma courses, the university offers merit-based admission.
Step 3: Declaration of the Merit List

Based on marks secured in the entrance test, the college will release a merit list of selected students for theCGET counsellinground. Further, selected students need to appear for the counselling process.
Step 4: Counselling Process & Fee Payment

Shortlisted candidates are only eligible to appear for the counselling round. After the counselling round, selected candidates are required to pay the admission fee to confirm their seats for admission.

courses_data.description: A 4-year BTech programme at the UG level is available for students who clear the eligibility requirements set by the institute. Students who want to get a seat for this course, need to appear for JEE Main exam, and attain a good rank for a successful admission. Refer below to know the eligibility requirements, selection criteria, and fees forC. V. Raman Global University BTech admission 2025:

faqs.question: What is the C.V Raman Global University admission process for BBA?
faqs.answer: Candidates can apply through the institute’s online application portal. The selection is based on the performance in the accepted entrance exams JEE Main, OJEE, CGET. Additionaly, Candidates must meet basic eligibility criteria including a minimum of 60% aggregate in Class 10 and Class 12.

courses_data.name: C. V. Raman Global University BSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: C. V. Raman Global University BSc is a full-time programme that takes 3-4 years. To be admitted to this programme, students must have good scores in the CGET exam. It offers six specialisation. Here is more information about the eligibility requirements, selection criteria, and fees for C. V. Raman Global University BSc admission in 2025.

faqs.question: Can I join BSc at C.V Raman Global University directly?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot join C.V Raman Global University in BSc directly. Students must fill in the eligibility criteria i.e., must have Class 10 and Class 12 with 60% . Further, the students score well in the entrance exams accepted and conducted by the university i.e., CGET for final seat confirmation.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to C.V Raman Global University for BSc with 60% in Class 12th?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can get admission to BSc at C.V Raman Global University with 60 percentiles, as the minimum eligibility criterion is 60% aggregate marks or equivalent in Class 10 and Class 12. However, Applicants must appear for an entrance exam specified by the university, such as CGET conducted by the university.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at CGU for the BSc course?
faqs.answer: Candidates must fulfil the essential eligibility criteria to get admission to C.V. Raman Global University for the BSc course. Those who passed Class 12 in the Science stream with a minimum 60% aggregate can apply for this course. Admission to this course is wholly entrance-based. Aspirants are required to appear for the CGET entrance exam, which is commonly conducted for selection at CGU.

faqs.question: What necessary verification documents are required for the BSc programme at C.V. Raman Global University?
faqs.answer: Upon the conclusion of the application process, the university conducts a selection process based on candidates' CGET scores. Subsequently, the shortlisted candidates are invited to undergo a document verification procedure at the institute. It is mandatory for these students to present the following documents on the scheduled reporting day:CGET ScoreClass 10 mark sheetClass 12 mark sheetHSC certificateMigration certificatePhoto ID

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for CV Raman Global University?
faqs.answer: Candidates interested in getting into CV Raman Global Colllege must follow the CGET exam and CV Raman College of Engineering application process. Candidates willing to apply must register for CGET exams and appear for the same. Those who qualify for the entrance examination can then register on CV Raman Global College registration portal for seat allocation. faqs.question: How can I get direct admission at CV Raman Global University?
faqs.answer: CV Raman Global University offers direct admission to diploma courses. Further, for admission to UG and PG courses, candidates are required to follow the admission process, which includes the submission of the application form, entrance test, release of merit list, counselling process and final fee payment process. Candidates seeking admission to CV Raman Global College must follow the step-wise admission process as given below.Step 1: Application Process 2025Aspirants fulfilling the course-specific eligibility requirements can apply for CGET by visiting the university's official website, CV Raman College of Engineering, for some UG and PG courses. The aspirants shall ensure that they apply within the due date.Step 2: Selection RoundFurther, aspirants are required to appear for the entrance test, i.e., JEE Main, OJEE, GATE, CGET, etc.Step 3: Release of the Merit ListBased on the marks secured in the entrance test, the college will release a merit list of selected students for the CGET

faqs.question: Is refund policy available at CV Raman Global University?
faqs.answer: Yes, there is a refund policy for withdrawl. Refuund will be made as per the university norms in concurrence with UGC/AICTE notification time to time. All refundable deposits will be returned, after detuctions if any, at the time of completion of the course or on cancellation of ad mission. The refund will be made through account tarnsfer to the account number mentioned in the withdraw request. therefore, provide the correct account details. In case of refund through DD, the DD will be made only in the name if the candidate.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for the BSc course at CGU?
faqs.answer: To gain admission to the BSc programme, applicants should have finished Class 12 in Science with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, or Biology as a compulsory subject from a recognised Board or University with at least 60% aggregate. Admission to the BSc course is determined through performance in the CGET entrance exam. Those interested in applying can visit the official website to apply online.

highlights.description: C. V. Raman Global University has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #95 in the Engineering category by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around C. V. Raman Global University rankings:

rankings.highlight: 5th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Orissa In 2025
4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Orissa In 2025
3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Orissa In 2025

nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, C. V. Raman Global University outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have displayed constancy when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, C. V. Raman Global University's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed stability in trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, C. V. Raman Global University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, C. V. Raman Global University climbed 1 rank to #95 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: CV Raman Global University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, but it lacks placement.
reviews.review_text: No doubt, the infrastructure is very good, they have invested a lot in the infrastructure. The labs and classrooms are all up to the mark. They have a smart screen for each class. But the only bad thing is the hostel's mess food, which is of the worst quality. The hostel rooms are fine.

reviews.review_heading: It's an average college, but you can still consider it.
reviews.review_text: Circular infrastructure is pretty good, with proper air-conditioned classrooms, comfortable seats, proper workbenches, equipment, and machinery available for a good hands-on experience. All the computers that are provided in the laboratories are high-end for simulations and AIML. There are many clubs that can help in gaining experience. Hostel facilities are below average, although some new hostels have been constructed. The condition of the old one is the worst, and the mess is a nightmare. The...

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very good, neat and clean, and the campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. The classrooms are also very good, in fact, many of the classrooms are fully air-conditioned. The library is also very good, you can borrow books from the library. The food is called average. The medical facility is also very good here, with 24*7 ambulance service of the university.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty. Placements are average. If you study hard, you can get placed.
reviews.review_text: Many hostels are good. Many are not that good, so they can be called average. The course is nice, and Wi-Fi and library are good. Medical facilities and an ambulance are always available. The canteen is not good at all. In sports, not all sports are good because of the players, but the volleyball team is at the state level. Everything is good, but there is no good food in or outside the campus unless you cook by yourself.

reviews.review_heading: Can't say that it's a bad college, just needs improvement in its environment.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is quite good with different categories, single bed, 2 bed, 3 bed, 4 bed and more, with the hostel fees according. The Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. The food in the hostel mess is manageable, like not very good, but also will not make you sick, it's like tasteless food without salt. The non-veg served in the mess is quite good and is prepared well. The classroom and labs are very good with the latest equipment and top-notch facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied the faculty and facilities good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. Classes and labs are the only things that are worth it in college. Mostly the EE lab is worthwhile because it has lots of good and quality machines. Mess food is not so good for protein its only for being alive. One good thing is that it has 1 cricket and 1 football ground. There are opportunities for indoor games also which are organised by their own clubs.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with teaching faculty, very much worried about placement, and infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus. It has a digital classroom. Library is good but non-AC. Labs are not good enough. Food quality is average. Hostel rooms are very congested. The bad thing is that there are no medical facilities on the campus. Sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: My experience with CGU is great and enriching.
reviews.review_text: Facilities here are very satisfactory and of high quality. It has a CAD lab, which is very useful for students interested in 3D and 2D design. There are many computer labs for CSE students to do programming. There is a BEE lab to learn about electrical and electronics courses. Wi-Fi is available on the campus. The food at the canteen is good, but there are not many varieties. There is also a food court. A dispenser provides free basic primary treatment, and there is a free ambulance facility.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent decision for any individual thinking about joining this college.
reviews.review_text: It has excellent infrastructure with Wi-Fi, AC, study table, individual desks for study, and individual godrej for keeping things. There are digital classrooms with high-quality benches and AC classrooms. Wi-Fi is enabled.

reviews.review_heading: Above average, if you do not get any GFTI or any other good private college then you can opt for it.
reviews.review_text: Classes are good. Wi-Fi is available across all campus, but runs smoothly in hotels. AC is available in labs. Classroom have smart and white boards both. Hotels are as per your requirement. If you give more money then you will get good faculty members. Mess food is average.

reviews.review_heading: In short, the college is a good choice for you for your UG course for the next 4 years.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are maintained well and ventilated, most CS labs are air conditioned, and Wi-Fi conditions are good, but they need to be improved. The mess food is good, but it also needs to be improved. Moreover, the hostel rooms are also well maintained and in line with modern architecture.

reviews.review_heading: For B.Tech, it’s a good college, not the best, but good.
reviews.review_text: In my opinion, hostel and mess food is good. I’ve seen on social media that some say the college food is the worst, but I think it’s good. They need to add some variety, like milk, tea, extra snacks, or a better morning breakfast, sometimes they give only one dosa, which is very little in quantity, not taste.

reviews.review_heading: Well, my college is an average college with some good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Well, our classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and we have many labs in our ECE department, we have an average-sized library with a moderate Wi-Fi connection, the hostels are good, fully air-conditioned, and even have a badminton court inside. The food is okay, but not good enough.

reviews.review_heading: Incredibly satisfied with college infrastructure, its academic, its placement in 2025, really good.
reviews.review_text: I tell you, all across Odisha, the best infrastructure for classes or hostel is holding C V Raman College. The girls hostel has already a lot of facilities like shopping complex, stationery shops, and all shops within it. Boys hostel has same again things, parallel consisting of gaming areas, sports complex inside hostel. Now, talking about the college premises and infrastructure that holds academic, it's excellent. You will have all AC classes, fully digital, new methods, really good.Now talkin...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities, but still something needs to be improved, like mess food.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are more than enough. Bus facilities are available for students belonging to CTK and BBSR. Library is present, and anyone can borrow books. AC classrooms are there. AC labs are there. Mess food is below average. Washrooms are clean and don't smell bad.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about C. V. Raman Global University

likes.text: Major companies like Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, JK Paper, Voltas, Robert Bosch, etc., visited our campus for placements.
The college also has many centers of excellence which help us in providing internships in good companies like CDAC, Boxch Rexroth, VLSI Design, and many others.

Placements.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: The college has a good infrastructure with smart classrooms, Wi-Fi all over the campus, well-equipped labs, a big central library and a department library in each department.
Maintained and clean hostel area, decent food quality available in mess, canteen area is bit crowded need a larger hall area, fast medical facility within campus.

Infrastructure.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: The teachers here are very helpful and have high standards of knowledge and experience, And in my course, i.e., CSE (AI and ML), our teachers make us fully industry-ready.
The curriculum here is relevant which includes many projects and gives students practical knowledge about their course and makes them industry-ready.

likes.text: I am interested in B.Tech electrical engineering as it has better career opportunities.
Many annual sports, cultural fests, and extracurricular activities are held and celebrated in our college.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, IIITM Gwalior has been ranked #96 under the 'Engineering' category.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: - 93 under Management category - 96 under Engineering category

college_info.intro:
IIITM Gwalior popular programmes are BTech and MBA. BTech and MBA students are placed in top companies at top positions such as Uber, Google, Goldman Sachs, and others. BTech students can become Engineers and can join domains such as Information Systems, Complex Systems, Distributed Systems, Data Mining, Computer Vision, Computer Networks, Cybersecurity and Software Engineering. BTech students are taught subjects such as Engineering Physics, Data Structures, etc.
IIITM Gwalior MBA students can become Mangers and are taught leadership skills, technical skills, and several other skills to upgrade their knowledge and to make them industry ready. Overall, the college has been ranked at a good position under the Engineering and Management categories by the NIRF 2025.
Candidates can check about BTech offered at IIITM Gwalior in the video provided below:

faqs.answer: A:     The total tuition fee of the BTech programme is INR 5.2 Lacs - INR 6.5 lakh. There is a range in the fee because BTech is also offered as Integrated BTech in Information Technology + MBA and Integrated BTech + M.Tech in Information Technology. faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for the BTech programme at IIITM Gwalior?

faqs.answer: A:    In 2024, IIITM Gwalior offered M.Tech specialisations via GATE exam scores. Talking about the IIITM Gwalior cutoff, the needed score to get the institute stood between 353 and 422 for the General AI category candidates. For the OBC AI quota, the needed score ranged between 307 and 371.
faqs.question: What is IIITM Gwalior cutoff 2024 for MTech?

faqs.answer: A:    Going as per the last few year trends, candidates are expected to have a good score of 85 percentile in CMAT, in order to be able to participate in further rounds. IIITM Gwalior cutoffs are released for admission to MBA course based on CMAT Scores. Candidates who meet the CMAT 2023 cut off are considered for the next round of MBA admission 2024-25 batch. Also, the IIITM Gwalior cutoff is considered based on various factors, including, the number of seats in the institute, number of candidates who have appeared for the CMAT exam, the difficulty level of the exam and the number of candidates who have passed the exam.

reviews_list.review_title: First established the IIIT under the MOE.

review_content.Placements: Almost 95% of the students were placed by the placement cell. The on-campus placements were almost 67%, and the remaining were off-campus. According to the RTI, we got to know that the minimum package was 7 LPA, which was received by a 2-year MBA student, and the highest package received was 65 LPA in every branch, and the average package was around 28 LPA.
