overview_faqs.question: How is campus life at IIITM Gwalior?
overview_faqs.answer: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management (ABV IIITM) Gwalior offers students and staff extensive infrastructure. With all the latest facilities, the institute is built over an area of about 160 acres. The campus is divided into several blocks, some of which are designated for housing units and the remaining for various departments of education and resource centres. Computer laboratories and data processing centres are also available. ABV IIITM facilities include playgrounds and sports activities for student recreation. The institute also hosts several seminars throughout the year to keep students engaged in their areas of interest.

overview_faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for the BTech programme at IIITM Gwalior?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee of the BTech programme is INR 5.2 Lacs - INR 6.5 lakh. There is a range in the fee because BTech is also offered as Integrated BTech in Information Technology + MBA and Integrated BTech + M.Tech in Information Technology. IIIT Gwalior also offers scholarships as the management understands that not everyone can afford this fee.

overview_faqs.question: Is CS a BTech branch in ABV-IIITM Gwalior?
overview_faqs.answer: ABV IIITM Gwalior offers a four-year BTech course in only one specialisation: Computer Science and Engineering. BTech admission is entrance-based. Students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility and qualify for the respective entrance exam in order to get admission. To get detailed information regarding eligibility, selection criteria, seat intake and course fee related to IIIT Gwalior BTech admission 2023 have a glance at the table below:Course NameEligibility & Selection CriteriaTotal Fee & Seat IntakeBTech (Computer Science & Engineering)Eligibility: Class 12 with a minimum of 75% aggregate in PCM from a recognised boardSelection Criteria: JEE Main + JoSAA + CSAB CounsellingTotal Fee: INR 5.2 lakh*Seat Intake: 74

overview_faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee of the MBA programme at IIITM Gwalior?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee of the MBA programme at IIITM Gwalior ranges from INR 2.96 Lacs to INR 6.5 lakh. MBA is also provided integrated with BTech. As the fee provided is from unofficial sources, it should be considered indicative only. To learn more about this, students should visit the official website.

review_summary.college_name: IIITM Gwalior Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Integrated B.Tech. + M.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, strong academics, and decent placements at IIIT, Gwalior.

content.Placements: More than 90% batch is placed. The highest package is 80 LPA from LinkedIn, and the lowest goes till 6-7 LPA. Top recruiters are DeShaw, Google, Uber, Media.net, and many more. Around 30% batch gets intern, intern, season, and top roles are SDE and business analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, a library, and campus-wide Wi-Fi. Hostels are decent with basic facilities, food quality is average, medical care is available, and sports facilities support indoor and outdoor games and others.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated B.Tech. in Information Technology + MBA - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the facilities provided, and the placement is really good and improving every year.

content.Placements: The placement is nice. There are a lot of opportunities provided by the college to get placed. The placement record is good, too. The only thing is that many off-campus offers are included. Overall, the Training and Placement Cell (TPC) here has experienced staff who have pretty solid connections, hence bringing ample offers to the college.
content.Infrastructure: The hostels for first-year students are more recently built, hence are better than any college compared. The hostels that are allotted for the later-year students are old. There are lots of things which don't meet the expectations, like the old fan connections and all. The mess is pretty decent for all hostels. Wi-Fi and LAN connections sometimes have a few little fluctuations, like any other college, but overall, they are nice.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated B.Tech. in Information Technology + MBA - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: First established the IIIT under the MOE.

content.Placements: Almost 95% of the students were placed by the placement cell. The on-campus placements were almost 67%, and the remaining were off-campus. According to the RTI, we got to know that the minimum package was 7 LPA, which was received by a 2-year MBA student, and the highest package received was 65 LPA in every branch, and the average package was around 28 LPA. Internships were given by many top-level companies such as Google, DE Shaw, and many more. The most prominent roles offered were related to SDE.
content.Infrastructure: We have a library with AC equipped in it, and we also have a Wi-Fi-enabled campus reaching 50 Mbps in the worst areas. Labs are very well-equipped, and the computer lab is the best of all, having the best configuration of systems and almost more than 200 PCs of that configuration that are very easily accessible.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and placements.

content.Placements: 98.21% of students passed out this year from our college. Highest package is 67 LPA, the lowest package is 10 LPA, and the average is 24 LPA. Top recruiting companies from our campus are Google, Grow, Microsoft, and Meesho. Google also hires students for internships.
content.Infrastructure: Library is very good. All kinds of books are available there, and you can also issue books for yourself. Wi-Fi routers are provided, and internet speed is also quite good. Classrooms are air-conditioned. Labs are also maintained properly. Food is not as good as it should be, and in mess after sometimes quality degrades. There are 3 canteens where you can eat. Medical facilities are available. There is a doctor present at his time, and you can consult him in case of small injuries.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Large campus area, top-notch placements, hostels and mess food can be improved.

content.Placements: Due to less number of branches, placements are excellent. In this year (2025), 97.76% of students got placed. 38 students got above 50+ LPA. The highest salary is 67.5LPA, and average salary is 28 LPA. Top recruiters are Google, Cisco, etc. Almost 80-85% of students got internships. Top role offered is SDE.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, but the boys hostels are not so good because the hostels require renovation as they get older. All the necessary facilities are available for living in hostels, like Wi-Fi (sometimes there may be some problem but mostly good with upto 80-90 Mbps speed), classrooms are fully air-conditioned with proper sitting arrangements, and library is also there, which is also fully air-conditioned. Mess food is okay. Medical facilities are available, whenever required. All the sports grounds are available on the campus like basketball court, lawn tennis court, cricket ground, kabaddi ground, etc.

admission_overview.college_name: IIITM Gwalior IIITM Gwalior Admission 2025: Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Application

paragraphs: IIITM Gwalior offers admissions to all courses based on national-level entrance exams, followed by a counselling process.IIITM Gwalior Madhya Pradeshaccepts JEE Main, CAT, and GATE scores. PhD admissions are conducted twice a year. IIIT Gwalior also offers a PhD programme along with BTech.
IIITM Gwalior Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria

Admission to allIIITM Gwalior coursesis conducted through national-level entrance exams. Eligible candidates can register online through the official website. However, before applying candidates must chek the cousre wise eligibility criteria as per the IIITM's admission guidelines. Candidates can check the eligibility, selection & fee for some of thepopular programmes at IIITM Gwaliorin the table below:
Popular Courses
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria

Bachelor's degree with 60% aggregate
Download:FREECMAT Mock Test papers & solutions
Bachelor'sdegree with 60%

*This information is taken from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

IIITM Gwalior fee has multiple components, out of which certain components are paid one-time while others are paid semester-wise. The components include tuition fees, caution deposits, hostel and mess charges, etc. Mentioned below is IIITM Gwalior course-wise fee breakup:
*This information is taken from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Check out completeIIITM Gwalior Fee Structure

Candidates are willing to get seats at IIITM Gwalior seat are required to go through various course-level national entrance exams, such as JEE Main or GATE followed by theri couselling for seat allocation. The seat intake for all the UG and PG courses offered at IIITM Gwalior is as follows:
*This information is taken from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Candidates must follow IIITM Gwaloir admission procedure for admission to their desired courses. Admission to the IPG, MTech, and MBA are done once a year as per the guidelines framed by MHRD, Government. As for the BTech programme admission is conducted under DASA scheme. Find below the IIITM admission process 2025:
1. IIITM Application process
Candidates must register themselves on the official website of IIITM Gwalior. They must first register and then fill out the online application form.
2. IIITM Shortlisting
Applicants are shortlisted as per the fulfillment of the eligibility criteria and scores obtained in the entrance exams. JEE Main, GATE, and CAT are the exams accepted by IIITM Gwalior
3. IIITM Selection Process
The shortlisted candidates have to participate in the selection phase, which consists of face-to-face and group interviews. The selection process is conducted offline.
4. IIITM Final Selection

IIITM releases a provisional list with finalises candidate's name. Candidates must pay the admission fee and confirm their seats. They must visit the admission fee for documnets verification and fee payment before or on the provided date.

faqs.question: What rank is required for IIITM Gwalior?
faqs.answer: IIITM admits students to its BTech and dual degree programmes based on their JEE Mains marks; however, students seeking MTech admission must meet the IIITM Gwalior GATE cut-off. To be eligible for the next stage of admissions, students must fulfil the IIITM Gwalior cut-off for their particular category. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

paragraphs: 224 students registered for the IIITM Gwalior placements out of which 219 students secured placements in 2025. The placement rate recorded was 97.76% . 19 PPO’s were made to students. The highest and average package offered during IIITM Gwalior BTech placements 2025 was INR 67.5 LPA and INR 27.23 LPA . The highest package recorded during MTech placements 2025 was INR 7.3 LPA . The highest and average package grabbed by MBA students in 2025 was INR 11.5 LPA and INR 6 LPA .

description: IIITM Gwalior cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIITM Gwalior JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last 9 years of IIIT Gwalior JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIITM Gwalior JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the IIITM Gwalior CSE cutoff 2025 was 11201 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the IIITM Gwalior B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 11201 and 22339 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 11201 and 14447, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Mathematics and Scientific Computing were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at IIITM Gwalior. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at IIITM Gwalior to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of IIITM Gwalior. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

IIITM Gwalior cutoff 2024 is released for admission to the MBA course based on CMAT Scores. Candidates who meet the CMAT 2024 cut off are considered for the next round of MBA admission 2025-26 batch. Also, the IIITM Gwalior cutoff is considered based on various factors, including the number of seats in the institute, the number of candidates who have appeared for the CMAT exam, the difficulty level of the exam and the number of candidates who have passed the exam. Going by the last few years' tr
Candidates can check the consolidated lists for IIITM Gwalior MBA course for the last three years in the table below:

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were Integrated M.Tech. + Ph.D. in Computer Science and Engineering and M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering with last round cutoff scores of 534 and 529, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 370 and 534. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 327 and 486 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

IIITM Gwalior CCMN cutoff 2026 is yet to be released for admission to the MSc/MSc Tech courses. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the table below to view the specialisation-wise 2025 cutoff details for the General AI category students. During the IIITM Gwalior MSc cutoff 2025, the last round closing rank was 648. Of all the specialisations, the one with the lowest cutoff rank of 648 was M.Sc. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science in the General AI category. This indicates that this

The maximum cutoff rank required for MSc admission was 648 in the General AI quota. This indicates that students with a cutoff rank below the mentioned rank here have higher chances of getting admission to their desired specialisations. The cutoff ranks vary across different rounds, categories and specialisations.
Among the OBC category students, the CCMN last round closing rank was 1958, with M.Sc. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science being the most competitive for admission. Choose the p

CCMN is the centralised platform for admissions to the MSc and MSc (Tech Programmes) at NITs, IIEST Shibpur, and some CFTI institutes that accept the IIT JAM scorecard. This year, CCMN counselling was conducted for three regular rounds and two special rounds for MSc admission across different participating institutes. Candidates preparing for IIITM Gwalior admission can refer to the table below to view or download the year- and round-wise CCMN cutoff list.

DASA UG Round 2 Seat Allotment for IIITM Gwalior admissions 2023 to BTech course has been the concluding round. IIITM Gwalior DASA UG cutoff 2023 was released only for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering can be considered the most competitive one, considering the last round closing ranks. During the IIITM Gwalior cutoff 2023 the last round closing rank stood at 343531 for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, while in 2022, the last rou

Considering the last round of IIITM Gwalior CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Computer Science and Engineering and Computer Science and Engineering, witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branches such as Information Technology and Cyber Security and Cyber laws had comparatively relaxed cutoff scores for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is IIITM Gwalior. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #96 under Engineering category, and #93 under Management. IIITM Gwalior excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around IIITM Gwalior rankings is covered in the following article:

rankings.highlight: 3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Madhya Pradesh In 2025
2nd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Madhya Pradesh In 2025

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, IIITM Gwalior has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Engineering' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend. In 2025, IIITM Gwalior climbed 5 ranks to #96 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'Management', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, IIITM Gwalior fell 8 ranks to #93 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

It is observable that in the 'MBA (Government)' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. hostel.description: Hostels are equipped with all the basic amenities like a mess, computer network connected with wireless internet, reading room, games etc. Telephone facility is also available in all the hostels. A well-equipped gymnasium is also available in the hostel.
facilities: Library: It is meant for students of various programmes and institute faculty members to issue relevant books, periodicals, etc. The library has a rich collection of books and journals.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, strong academics, and decent placements at IIIT, Gwalior.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, a library, and campus-wide Wi-Fi. Hostels are decent with basic facilities, food quality is average, medical care is available, and sports facilities support indoor and outdoor games and others.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the facilities provided, and the placement is really good and improving every year.
reviews.review_text: The hostels for first-year students are more recently built, hence are better than any college compared. The hostels that are allotted for the later-year students are old. There are lots of things which don't meet the expectations, like the old fan connections and all. The mess is pretty decent for all hostels. Wi-Fi and LAN connections sometimes have a few little fluctuations, like any other college, but overall, they are nice.

reviews.review_heading: First established the IIIT under the MOE.
reviews.review_text: We have a library with AC equipped in it, and we also have a Wi-Fi-enabled campus reaching 50 Mbps in the worst areas. Labs are very well-equipped, and the computer lab is the best of all, having the best configuration of systems and almost more than 200 PCs of that configuration that are very easily accessible.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: Library is very good. All kinds of books are available there, and you can also issue books for yourself. Wi-Fi routers are provided, and internet speed is also quite good. Classrooms are air-conditioned. Labs are also maintained properly. Food is not as good as it should be, and in mess after sometimes quality degrades. There are 3 canteens where you can eat. Medical facilities are available. There is a doctor present at his time, and you can consult him in case of small injuries.

reviews.review_heading: Large campus area, top-notch placements, hostels and mess food can be improved.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, but the boys hostels are not so good because the hostels require renovation as they get older. All the necessary facilities are available for living in hostels, like Wi-Fi (sometimes there may be some problem but mostly good with upto 80-90 Mbps speed), classrooms are fully air-conditioned with proper sitting arrangements, and library is also there, which is also fully air-conditioned. Mess food is okay. Medical facilities are available, whenever required. All the sports ...

reviews.review_heading: Fantastic placements in 2025, but I am dissatisfied with the hostel.
reviews.review_text: We have a huge library and labs for each professor and their research. We also have Wi-Fi in hostels and in the academic block, where all the departments and lecture halls are present. We have various types of classrooms of differing capacities, ranging from 60 to 200, some of which have plug points at each seat. Each classroom is enabled by Wi-Fi. The first-year hostel is very good, and the hostels from the 2nd year onwards are average. The mess quality keeps varying, but it is mostly good. The...

reviews.review_heading: Strong academics and good placements, but infrastructure and campus life need improvement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not very good, but as this is the oldest IIIT, it has the infrastructure of 1997, so it’s pretty old. New hostels are definitely good and well-equipped, while the old ones are okay. There are also some hostels in progress, which seem pretty good. The library is very good, and the classrooms have AC installed.

reviews.review_heading: IIIT Gwalior - A perfect college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good; a new hostel is also under construction and is expected to be completed by 2026. A new hospital is also being built. We have a huge college divided into two parts: Pockets A and Pockets B, connected with an underpass. The infrastructure is very cool. In the hostel, we get 24/7 internet, also wireless, so you are always connected to the internet. Coolers are allowed, and we have fully air-conditioned lecture halls, classrooms, and a library.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied, as it provides good campus life, lovely fests, active clubs, excellent placements, etc.
reviews.review_text: I would say the infrastructure is old. The obvious reason is this is the oldest IT, so the buildings are pretty old. But the interior of the academic buildings is good. Also, the library is very nice here. With its infrastructure and vast variety of books, this library has everything you need. Hostels are a little on the low side. For first-year students, hostels are pretty good, but after the first year, you get either single or double sharing rooms. The rooms are okay, not so good I would say,...

reviews.review_heading: Average plus a good college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available are Wi-Fi, labs, air-conditioned classrooms, and a big library named LRC. Mess food is average. There is a big sports complex, a cricket ground, a swimming pool, and many clubs.

reviews.review_heading: Don't expect much; you will be disappointed and good in terms of placement.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and library are good. Many useful books are available in the library. Labs are okay, average. Hostel is not much good but adjustable. No Wi-Fi is good here, and the mess food is bad; it's below average. The sports club is good, and it's okay for playing sports. Canteens are available to eat your favourite food. Canteens are also not the best but average.

reviews.review_heading: Really happy to take the course. Also happy to see the placements of this year.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well maintained. All the rooms and labs are air conditioned. We have WiFi at our hostels and classes. We have full access to them. Sometimes the internet is not stable. Overall, it works fine. The food quality totally depends upon the mess committee. Sometimes responses are taken late. There are also cases of food poisoning as well.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but sometimes regret choosing this college because of a few circumstances.
reviews.review_text: The buildings are a bit old. Well, there are a total of 5 hostels for boys and one hostel for girls. Among the five hostels there are two for the first years of B.Tech and the remaining three are for the second, fourth, and fifth years and M.Tech and Ph.D. students.

reviews.review_heading: The institute has a peaceful vibe and is quite big compared to other IIITs.
reviews.review_text: First-year students got a separate hostel called SATPURA, which is situated just outside the main campus. It's a 3-seater hostel. Wi-Fi, particularly in hostels, is very poor; we get very low internet speed. The library building is quite big but has books only related to the courses available, as it has much space to accommodate more books. Classrooms and labs are quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty members and placements. Average in mess and Wi-Fi.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not so good. It lags too much, labs are well-equipped and have all the things that are required for doing any experiments. Classrooms are too good, they have comfy seats, a central AC system, projectors, and good sound system. Mess food is average but canteen food is way better than it. Colleges have several canteens that provide both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food to students at a minimal cost. Medical facilities are good, they have all types of medicines. If they do not have a sol...

faqs.question: Is VIIT Pune expensive?
faqs.answer: Yes, The fees at VIIT Pune vary depending on the degree level, duration, and specialisation of the course. B.Tech: The fees range from approximately INR 1,43,500 to INR 6,20,000 per year M.Tech : The fees range from around INR 80,000 to INR 1,60,000 per year

faqs.question: Is VIIT Pune very expensive for M.Tech?
faqs.answer: Pursuing MTech at VIIT Pune can be considered expensive. The total tuition fee for MTech at VIIT Pune is INR 1.74 Lakhs. Apart from this, the student may need to pay some additional charges like hostel fee and application fee. The institute offers 5 specilisations in MTech.

hostel_campus.college_name: Vishwakarma Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Recreational (T.V. and newspaper) facilities, mess and transportation facility are available. Solar heaters are provided for the supply of hot water. In the case of medical emergency, the hostel has a tie-up with nearby hospital and the medical facilities are available on call.

library.description: The Central library is enriched with an excellent collection of latest text books, reference books, hand-books, journals, periodicals, proceedings CDs, etc. It consists of Reference Section, Journal Section, Reading Hall, Digital library section, Multimedia Facility, Stack-Room etc. Overnight issue, reading room service, photocopy service are also available. Book availability search in the library is fully computerized through SLIM system and can be done from any LAN connected PC on Campus. All library books and other resources are as per AICTE norms.

sports.description: Available Facilities:

library.description: The Central library is enriched with an excellent collection of latest text books, reference books, hand-books, journals, periodicals, proceedings CDs, etc. It consists of Reference Section, Journal Section, Reading Hall, Digital library section, Multimedia Facility, Stack-Room etc. Overnight issue, reading room service, photocopy service are also available. Book availability search in the library is fully computerized through SLIM system and can be done from any LAN connected PC on Campus. All library books and other resources are as per AICTE norms.

cafeteria.description: Vishwakarma Institute of Information Technology provides cafeteria including two canteens, one mess, one bakery outlet, one fruit stall outlet and one coffee center on campus.

hostel.description: Recreational (T.V. and newspaper) facilities, mess and transportation facility are available. Solar heaters are provided for the supply of hot water. In the case of medical emergency, the hostel has a tie-up with nearby hospital and the medical facilities are available on call.

sports.description: Available Facilities:

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab

reviews.review_heading: Very honest, this was the best decision of my life.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are of the top-notch. They include air conditioners, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. We have five cafeterias inside the college. The medical facilities are also provided by them. We have two hostels for boys. One for girls with premium security also has 23 stationery shops.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good due to increasing admissions in various sectors of engineering streams. There are chances of a lack of classrooms otherwise, everything is best. It has good beautiful campus, labs, classrooms, library, and a peaceful place. It is also good for foreign students.

reviews.review_heading: One of the top colleges in Pune with good placements, infrastructure, and curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities in the college are nice, as the hostel is not on the campus of the college. It is too near the campus. The hostel has facilities like clean rooms, 24x7 hot water, and Wi-Fi. The mess provides a variety of food in a very hygienic way. The college has a very good collection of books in the library.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good curriculum and helps in learning tech which industry refers more.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have its own hostel facility, but around the college area, there are a lot of hostel facilities and mess facilities under the 500-meter area of the college. Libraries and reading rooms are open for students for their studies with Wi-Fi facilities. The college has a canteen, but frankly speaking, the food is not that good. The college has a cafeteria and two small canteens like FNF. It has good food. On the college's backside, there is a hotspot lane and there are a lot of op...

reviews.review_heading: It has an awesome campus and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is too good for a quality hostel life and college life. Classrooms are well-maintained and clean. The infrastructure is too good, with proper quality labs and hostels. The food is good and easily available around the campus. The college has a huge ground for sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: Vishwakarma Institute of Information Technology is a good college.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi available in every department, which is a good part. Labs are big, and there are many PCs available in them. Classrooms are also good. There is no hostel facility available. There are two canteens on campus, and the quality of food is average.

reviews.review_heading: My college review: Absolutely satisfied because of good placements and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the whole college is good especially the civil department infrastructure is good. It is a 2-floor building. It consists of spacious classrooms and large labs for various civil subjects. Wi-Fi facility is there. In my college, there is a common library which has a large section in the civil department. The college does not provide a hostel facility directly but it is type with other hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and curriculum but needs better sports.
reviews.review_text: Since VIIT Pune does not have on-campus hostel facilities, students must find rented accommodation in the vicinity, which varies widely in quality and cost. While some accommodations offer a decent standard of living, others fall short in terms of hygiene and amenities. Canteen provides affordable food, though the menu lacks variety, and students often rely on outside eateries for better options. Medical facilities are basic, with a first-aid room and tie-ups with nearby hospitals for emergencie...

reviews.review_heading: Good college for those who didn’t want so much stress like other engineering colleges.
reviews.review_text: The food quality is good, you can eat it, and on Sunday it’s definitely very good. It’s like hotel food you get on Sunday, and you will also get a sports area as well as a geyser and daily needs objects in the hostel. One thing you didn’t like about the college is that there are so many branches in the college that there will be a crowd around you.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of VIIT campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is too boring. Literally, the projectors don’t even work properly in the class, the labs are okay, and the canteen is also not so good. Talking about the hostel, it’s also a bad experience. The hostel doesn’t even have good facilities. The college doesn’t even have a sports ground for each game. As a sports person, I always felt bad for taking admission here. Medical facilities are not even available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, and the faculty is also very good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good and the college is large. The college has good facilities like up to date labs, well ventilated labs and library with up to date books required for the courses. The quality of the hostel is good and the quality of food in the canteen and mess is average. The campus has a nice sports ground for playing cricket and football.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members, good placements and average facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on campus but not yet in every classroom. The speed of Wi-Fi is good enough. Labs provided for our course are very outdated. However, branches like core CSE and IT have good and powerful PCs. The college hostel is far from the college. Mess quality is below average. The sports ground is very small. Food in the campus canteen is very oily; hygiene is not there.

reviews.review_heading: Review for VIIT, Pune College.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure of the college are great, and the departments are well maintained with excellent services and hospitality. The admin dept is known for its fast services for the students. The quality of the food available is okay, but all the other things like sports and medical are great.

reviews.review_heading: Really have nice enjoyment here.
reviews.review_text: Nice faculty, good infrastructure, greenery everywhere, Wi-Fi is everywhere, and canteens are also good but not for meals. Libraries are less with many technologies like high-speed Wi-Fi, RFID systems to take books, headphones, etc. Sports and games events are also there and Gandharva is the main annual event.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vishwakarma Institute of Information Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides neat classrooms which can accommodate 100 students at a time. It provides Wi-Fi for students. There are many labs for students with many high-end computers. The mess and canteen are well-cleaned and provide hygienic food.

data.description: Vishwakarma Institute of Information Technology has a well supported campus with facilities like Auditorium, Boys Hostel, Cafeteria, Convenience Store, Girls Hostel, Gym, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Hostel, Labs, Library, Shuttle Service, Sports Complex, Wi-Fi Campus, Others - Seminar Hall, Bank and ATM, Parking, Facilities for Disabled Students.

Every student get internship opportunities in the final year in companies like Control S, Atlas Copco, Forbes Marshall, etc.

college_info.college_name: Vishwakarma Institute of Technology Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Yes, The fees at VIIT Pune vary depending on the degree level, duration, and specialisation of the course.

Pursuing MTech at VIIT Pune can be considered expensive. The total tuition fee for MTech at VIIT Pune is INR 1.74 Lakhs. Apart from this, the student may need to pay some additional charges like hostel fee and application fee. The institute offers 5 specilisations in MTech.

The application fee for the M.Tech program at VIIT Pune is INR 1000  (INR 800 for SC/ST/NT/OBC/SBC/PWD Candidates). To get admission, candidates must ensure they meet the eligibility criteria set by VIT Pune and fill out the online application form for admission. It is advised to check the official website of the institute for up-to-date information.

VIIT Pune offers a 2-year M.Tech program at the PG level. The total tuition fee for the M.Tech program at VIIT Pune is the same for all its specialisations. The total tuition fee is INR 1.7 Lakhs, and the hostel fee is INR 2.55 Lakhs. Thus the total fee comes to around INR 4.3 Lakhs for the two-year program.

GGSIPU popular programmes are BTech, BSc, MBA. IPU Delhi MBA students are placed in top companies such as Adobe, Josh Technology Group, & others. MTech is available in various specialisations, namely R & A, CSE, IT, ECE, ECE-W, and others. MBA is available in specialisations, namley Information Technology, Marketing, Finance, Human Resources, International Business, Operations Management, and others. MBA students get good roles in top companies. Overall, Indraprastha University Delhi is one of the highest-ranked universities present in India. reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with college.

review_content.Placements: My college is average. Placements at this college are also very poor. We have to search for a job ourselves. Placements are not good. There is no placement cell like other colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. The campus is very small. There is a computer lab, and a library is also there. Classrooms are of normal size. The benches are poor. Classes are also not regularly scheduled. College life is hilarious these days. There is no ground. The sports faculty is also very poor.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers of the college are also average. Attendance is mandatory here. There is a uniform system like a school. The college is very average. The locality of this college is cool. The teachers are not good. Minimum teachers are there.

reviews_list.batch_info: Integrated BBA LL.B (Hons.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Overall a very good experience.

review_content.Placements: Around 80-85% of students from our course were placed through campus recruitment. The college provide decent placement opportunities, especially for the students proactive and maintain good academics records. Top recruiting organizations include law firms, corporate legal departments and NGOs. The highest package offered was around RS 20 LPA and the average package is between around 4-5 LPA. Nearly 80-90% students secured internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is satisfactory and functional. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with basic facilities like- projectors and proper seating. The library is well stocked with course related books and online courses, which is very helpful for academics and research work. The canteen food quality is good with clean and basic amenities. Medical and sports facilities are available for the improvement.

course_faqs.question: Is CAT compulsory for MBA at IPU?
course_faqs.answer: No, CAT is not the only exam based on which admission is granted. GGSIPU accepts the CAT percentile for MBA admission basis on which a merit list of selected candidates is released for the counselling round. Moreover, for the MBA in IT course, the university conducted IPU CET exam is accepted. In case the seats are left vacant after CAT candidates, then the seat allotment is carried out based on the candidate's CMAT scores.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee at GGSIPU for MBA course?
overview_faqs.answer: Total course fee is total of multiple components such as tuition fee, library fee, registration fee, security deposit etc. Indraprastha University MBA fees range between INR 1.5 lakh and 5.65 lakh. This fee range includes MBA course fees at several IPU colleges. This information is taken from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. For more detail on fee structure, candidates are advised to contact admission department of University.

overview_faqs.question: What is the hostel fee at IPU?
overview_faqs.answer: Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University's annual hostel cost is INR 29,500. Mess and welfare fees are not included in the hostel fees. The fee for the mess is INR 36,000, while the cost of the welfare is INR 3,000. Candidates need to submit three demand drafts: one for hostel fees, one for mess charges, and one for welfare charges. Two hostels are maintained on campus for male students, and two are maintained for female students. There are more than 180 single-seat rooms in each hostel. Basic furnishings such as a cot, mattress, pillow, chair, table, cupboard, tube lamp, and fan are provided in each room. Mess facilities are available for residents in each hostel. Residents also have access to a common area, a gym, a reading room, and sports facilities. For the hostels, there is a provision for 24-hour water and electrical services.

review_summary.college_name: GGSIPU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA LL.B. (Hons) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My journey at Delhi Metropolitan Education.

content.Placements: Our college provides placements, internships, and also externships. The college has a training and placement cell that works to help students crack internships, externships, and placements. The training and placement cell provides us with details of Tier 1, 2, and 3 firms and also advocates to do internships in the final year and try to join permanently.
content.Infrastructure: DME has good infrastructure and a clean campus. The college has 2 lifts, a canteen, a big library, a moot court hall, a seminar hall, an amphitheater, and many more facilities. The college has a lot of greenery. The college service staff are also friendly and are always available to maintain the college clean and good looking.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. (Hons) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Very good college for law studies with helpful faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements at D.M.E are quite good for B.A. LL.B. students. Many students get internship opportunities with reputed law firms and legal offices.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is not very large, but it has all the necessary facilities like a library, Wi-Fi, and moot court halls. Classrooms are well maintained and have a clean environment for studying. Hostel facilities are provided by the college in Greater Noida with basic amenities, security, and comfortable accommodation.
content.Faculty: Faculty members of D.M.E are qualified and supportive. Every teacher is UGC NET qualified with good knowledge of law subjects and explains concepts clearly. The curriculum is relevant and includes practical exposure like moot courts and internships. Semester exams are moderately difficult, and the overall pass percentage is good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) (Shift II) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Great faculty members with great facilities.

content.Placements: 80% of students are placed by the college. The highest package is 6 LPA. The lowest package is 3 LPA. The average package is 4.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, Airtel, etc. 75% of the students got internships in Wipro and various startup companies.
content.Infrastructure: CCTV, projectors, and 2 A/C are in every classroom. The classrooms are very clean and well-maintained. Labs are also equipped with good-quality computers. The computers are fully functional and properly maintained. The canteen provides good and hygienic food and a variety of food.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and good environment.

content.Placements: 80% students are placed in my course. The highest package is 6 LPA. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA. The top recruiters are Wipro, Accenture, and Crisis. 75% student are given the opportunity of an internship, and a few are given the opportunity for an externship.
content.Infrastructure: Classes are provided with a projector, 2 AC, and CCTVs. Proper sitting arrangements are there, the desk and table are neat and clean. Studios are properly maintained. The library has lots of books for students from different courses. The canteen is properly maintained and hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Supportive faculty, opportunity to provide, and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 80% students are placed in my course. The highest package is 6 LPA, the lowest package is 3.5 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, Crisil, and Accenture. Around 85% got internships from the course in companies like Iskon, Accenture, and various startups.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides well-maintained classrooms with the proper seating arrangement. Our college provides Wi-Fi facility too. Computer labs are still working. The canteen provides affordable meals. Though they can improve the variety of food. The college also encourages sports and games. Even the students from our college have been to the national level in sports.

admission_overview.college_name: GGSIPU Admission 2026: Last Date, Courses, Eligibility, Fee, Application Form

admission_overview.title: IPU Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: IPU admission 2026 is based on the scores of candidates in the entrance exam. The university conducts in-house entrance test, i.e., IPU CET. This exam is accepted by the university for most of its courses. Other than this, students can also apply with CUET, JEE Main, CAT, MAT, etc. At IPU, students can find courses in different streams, such as Engineering, Arts, Management, and more. The applications can be submitted by visiting the university's website.

eligibility_selection.title: IPU Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: IPU offers admission to various courses, including BSc, BCA, BCom (Hons), B.Ed, BA (JMC), BHMCT, BBA, BA (Hons), BVoc, BPT, BPO, BOT, BASLP, BSc MLT, MSc, MA, MEd, MPT, MOT and MPO, based on Common Entrance Test (CET). The university also conducts a counselling process. For a few courses, students can also apply via CUET UG, JEE Main, CAT, CMAT, GATE and others. Check below some popular IP University courses along with their selection and eligibility criteria: Completed Class 12 with PCM and 50% marks or above

faqs.answer: Aspirants who have completed their graduation with a minimum of 50%-60% aggregate are eligible to apply for MBA programme at GGSIPU. Candidates with a 50% score in graduation can also apply provided the requirement of aggregate is 50% or below. For MBA specialisations requiring 60% or above aggregate, candidates need not get admission with 50%.
faqs.question: I've scored less than 50% in graduation. Can I get admission to MBA at GGSIPU?

faqs.answer: Admissions in GGSIPU are done on entrance-basis. The basic eligibility requires the candidates to pass Class 12 or its equivalent exam with a minimum aggregate of 50%. Hence, you can certainly apply for the BBA course even if you have scored less than 60% in your Class 12 boards. However, BBA admissions at GGSIPU are accepted on the basis of valid score obtained in the IPU CET or CUET followed by counselling. Only those who meet the cut-off and satisfy all the parameters will be allocated a seat at GSSIPU for the BBA programme. In case the students are unable to clear the BBA cut-off released by the university, they can pursue the BBA Online courses offered by various other colleges.
faqs.question: I have scored less than 60% in 12th boards. Am I eligible to get BBA at GGSIPU?

faqs.answer: Yes, Common University Entrance Test (CUET) 2026 registration commenced at cuet.nta.nic.in. NTA released the CUET 2026 notification on January 03 and reopened the window on February 23. Soon after the release of the CUET official notification, the CUET registration 2026 process commenced online at the official website. Candidates willing to appear for the CUET 2026 exam must have completed complete the application form online. Additionally, before filling application form, candidates must make sure that they have fulfilled the prescribed CUET eligibility criteria to qualify for the entrance exam.
faqs.question: Is CUET exam registration open?

faqs.answer: In 2022, cut off was 15339 for the General category candidates in All India quota for BTech + M.Tech in Computer Science Engineering in Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University. Moreover, the BTech cut off varies depending on the category and domicile/quota of the applicant. Read more about IPU Cutoff.

paragraphs: IPU admissionis based on entrance exam scores of the aspirants. The university conducts IPU CET for admission. Candidates must follow the steps given below:
1:The application process of IPU for all the affiliated institutes is done via a centralised application portal.
1.1: Visit the official website of IPU,www.ipu.ac.inand click on 'Admission'.
1.2. Read the instructions and click on 'Start'.
1.3. Select the course and enter the required details. Select CET or Non CET.
1.4. Candidates get an application sequence number, user ID and password.
1.5. Login and fill out the form.
1.6. Upload the documents and pay the application fee.
2: Report for IPU CET

The E-admit card is available on the official website of GGSIPU. Candidates must appear for the exam at the allotted centre on or before reporting time. Candidates must check the GGSIPU website for admission related queries.
3: CET Merit List & Counselling

GGSIPU merit listis prepared based on inter-se merit for candidates. Candidates are then called for a counselling round. The list of selected students is displayed on the University's Website one week before the start of counselling. The seat is allotted to candidates only when they attend counselling. Candidates needs to pay the course fee on the spot at the time of counselling for admission.
4: Document Verification
Students must report for document verification.
GGSIPU also accepts CUET scores. IPU conducts counselling round in online and offline modes. Check below the counselling process for IPU admission via CUET:
1: Register for Counselling
Candidates have to apply in online or offline mode for counselling.

Aspirants must login with the ID and password to fill out the application. The IPU counselling fee is INR 1,000. Candidates must fill out the details and take a printout of the form. The university conducts document verification in online mode based on details provided by the candidate during enrolment.
3: Choice Filling & Seat Allocation

Aspirants can download the preference sheet from the GGSIPU brochure. Candidates must visit the university's official website. It must be noted that the preference sheet is for only one counselling round. Hence, a new preference sheet must be filled for each round. The seats are allotted to the candidates based on their merit, category and region.

IPU feeinclude tuition fees, hostel fees, security deposit, library fees, etc. Aspirants have to pay a part of the fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat  in the mode specified by the university. Check belowIPU feesfor popular courses:
NOTE:The fees is taken from an official source and may change.
IPU reserves some of the seats for candidates belonging to reserved categories. The reserved categories are SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PWD/Defence/Army/Minority. Check below theIPU seat intakefor popular courses:
NOTE:The seat intake is taken from an official source and may change.

On the day of admission/counselling, candidates must take a decision on the spot and no further time is given by the university.

To know more about other categories, rounds, courses, specialisations, and quota, clickhere.

courses_data.description: GGIPU offers a full-time BCA course at the UG level. The duration of the programme is three years and is divided into six semesters.IPU BCA admissionis done on the basis of merit in IPU CET/CUET. Candidates shortlisted based on exam scores have to further participate in a round of counselling as well for seat allotment. Aspirants who have completed Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 50% can apply for the BCA programme. The total tuition fee for the GGSIPU BCA course ranges between INR 84,900 and INR 3.3 lakh.

faqs.question: Is IPU CET exam valid for BCA?
faqs.answer: Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University BCA admission is yes but the admission will be done based on the performance of candidates in four rounds which are IPU CET entrance test, counselling round and then the admission is done.Nevertheless, the University will also be able to admit CUET-qualified candidates to the BCA course once the CET merit list has been depleted.Those who had interest are required to apply by paying the required fee of INR 2,500 to be admitted to the course of BCA in IP U

faqs.question: Is Mathematics required for BCA at GGSIPU?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete their Class 12 or a equivalent with a minimum of 50% aggregate with English along with Mathematics or Computer Science or any other subject related to Computer Science to apply for BCA at GGSIPU. Hence, it is not mandatory to pass Mathematics. However, candidate must have passed one or other specified subjects in Class 12.Besides, aspirants who have passed a three-year Diploma in Engineering with a minimum of 50% aggregate are eligible to apply for the BCA programme.

courses_data.description: GGSIPU MBA is a two-year course offered in five specialisations. In addition, for other specialisations, the candidate's CAT score is accepted for admission. However, if the seats remain vacant after counselling on the basis of the CAT score, then counselling is conducted on the basis of the CMAT score. In case seats remain vacant, IPU conducts a Common Entrance Test (CET) to fill up the remaining seats.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria to get admission to MBA programme at GGSIPU?

faqs.question: What is the fee at GGSIPU for MBA course?

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in GGSIPU?
faqs.answer: No, GGSIPU doesn't offer direct admission.  IP University does not allow any of the affiliated colleges/institutes/agencies to grant direct admission to any of the courses of the university.

faqs.question: When will the registration begin for BA (Hons) English and from where can I get the previous years' papers?
faqs.answer: The admission dates for BA English (Hons) programme at Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University (GGSIPU) for the academic year 2023-2024 have not been officially announced yet. Generally, the application process for UG courses in GGSIPU starts in the month of March or April every year. It is recommended to keep checking the official website of GGSIPU or the admission brochure for the most up-to-date information regarding the admission dates. Regarding the previous year's question papers for the BA English (Hons) programme, you can check the official website of GGSIPU or visit the university's library to access them. The university may also release the previous year's question papers on their website as a part of the exam preparation material. Additionally, you can also find the previous year's question papers and other study materials on various online educational platforms and websites.

placement_report.college_name: GGSIPU Placements 2025: Average Package, Highest Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: GGSIPU placement report for 2025 is yet to be released. However, as per the overall NIRF 2025 data, the median package offered UG-4 Year was INR 8.25 LPA . The median package offered to the UG 5-year was INR 8.39 LPA . While the median packages offered to the PG 1-Year and PG 2-Year students were INR 5.35 LPA and INR 6.95 LPA , respectively.

The University has released the placement report 2024 for GGSIPU’s University School of Information, Communication & Technology ( USICT ). The highest package offered at GGSIPU USICT was INR 41.2 LPA . The average package offered was INR 7.2 LPA . Further, 126 offers were made and 32 companies visited the campus during USICT placements 2024. Apart from this, according to USMS NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during IPU MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 6.18 LPA . In addition, a total of 160 students were placed out of 175 students during Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University MBA placements 2023.

faqs.question: What is the average placement package offered during GGSIPU MBA placements?
faqs.answer: GGSIPU MBA placement data 2024 is not released. However, according to GGSIPU Management NIRF report 2024, the median package offered over the past three years during IPU MBA placements is presented below: Course Median Package (2021) Median Package (2022) Median Package (2023) MBA INR 5.2 LPA INR 5.6 LPA INR 6.18 LPA

faqs.question: What is the average placement package offered at GGSIPU?
faqs.answer: The average package offered during IPU USICT placements 2024 stood at INR 7.2 LPA. Further, a declining trend was witnessed in the average package offered over the past three years, which is presented below: Particulars IPU USICT Placement Statistics (2022) IPU USICT Placement Statistics (2023) IPU USICT Placement Statistics (2024) Average package INR 12 LPA INR 9 LPA INR 7.2 LPA Note: Placement data 2024 is based on on-campus drives till February 2024 Earlier, the average package offered during GGSIPU USEM placements between 2016 and 2022 stood at INR 10 LPA.

faqs.question: What are the fees structures for BTech programmes at GGSIPU?
faqs.answer: GGSIPU BTech fees range between INR 1.4 lakh and INR 10 lakh . This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. The fee mentioned here does not include the university charges of INR 15,000, security amount of INR 5,000 (One time, refundable) and student activity fee of INR 1,000. For detailed fee structure, candidates are advised to contact the admission department of Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University.

faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for pursuing MBA at IP University?
faqs.answer: There are multiple components included in the course total fee, such as tuition fee, registration fee, security charges, etc. Some of the components are one-time chargeable such as security deposit and registration fee. IPU MBA fee ranges between INR 1.4 lakh to INR 5.7 lakh . This fee includes tuition fees and other components. The fee mentioned here is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes.

description: GGSIPU cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to several undergraduate and postgraduate courses based on candidates' performance in the national-level exam or through IPU CET conducted by GGSIPU. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the sections below to view the Indraprastha University cutoff across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories. Further updates are provided below:

IPU cutoff 2025 was released via GGSIPU entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 35838 and 159799 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 35838, B.Tech. + M.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 27680.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 35838.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

GGSIPU NEET cutoff 2025 was announced for admission to its affiliated colleges. For admission to Vardhman Mahavir Medical College, the last-round closing rank was 132 for admission to MBBS-- Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery, for the General AI category candidates. For North Delhi Municipal Corporation Medical College and Hindu Rao Hospital, the last round closing rank was 2986, for the General AI category.

Guru Gobind Sign Indraprastha University cutoff 2025 via NEET UG exam scores has been concluded for this year. The cutoff was released through the affiliated colleges of the university. Moreover, in 2023, the cutoff rank for the same turned out to be 113. Apart from Vardhman Mahavir Medical College, the cutoff was also released for North Delhi Municipal

GGSIPU NEET PG Cutoff 2025 was released up to Round 5 for admission to MD and MS specialisations. The closing ranks ranged from 15 to 41451, wherein MD in General Medicine was the most toughest specialisation and MD in Anatomy, the easiest for the General AI category students. For the OBC AI category, the cutoff ranks ranged from 49 to 32961. The most competitive specialisation was MD in Radio Diagnosis.

GGSIPU cutoff for the super speciality courses DM and MCh is based on NEET SS scores followed by round-wise counselling. GGSIPU NEET SS Cutoff 2025 will soon be available in this section. As per NEET SS cutoff 2024, the Round 1 closing rank for GGSIPU for top courses was 7 for DM in Pulmonary and Critical Care Medicine for the General category All India candidates. Based on the NEET SS 2024 Last Round Seat Allotment result, the closing rank for DM in Pulmonary and Critical Care Medicine is 7. GGSIPU offers three DM and two MCh courses through NEET SS. highlights.description:
IPU is one of India’s top institutes. Eminent national & international ranking bodies have acknowledged it as a leading institute. As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #93 in the University category, #76 under Management, #22 under Law, #22 under State Public University, and #36 under Architecture & Planning. Talking about the international rankings, the QS World Rankings 2025 has awarded rank #1001-1200 to IPU. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in IPU rankings.
Read less

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, IPU has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is observable that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, IPU fell 50 ranks to #151 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, IPU fell 13 ranks to #93 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, IPU fell 12 ranks to #101 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The institute's ranks in the 'Management' category; have shown a fluctuation when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, IPU fell 11 ranks to #76 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less

outlook.description:
Across the years, it is observed that IPU is consistently recognised as a highly-ranked institute in different categories by Outlook-ICARE 2024 among other institutes by excelling in key areas such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, and many more. It is to be noted that the IPU's rankings in 'MBA (Government)' category have demonstrated a decreasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2024, IPU fell 1 rank to #15 rank in the 'MBA (Government)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
IPU has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by QS World University Rankings 2026, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have improved in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2026, IPU climbed 50 ranks to #951 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated an increasing trend in the 'Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, IPU climbed 62 ranks to #258 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute has displayed an increasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, IPU climbed 25 ranks to #56 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less

Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University (GGSIPU) Review

hostel.description: There are 2 boys Hostel, shivalik and Aravalli Boys hostel and 2 Girls Hostel, Nilgiri and Satpura Girls Hostel. Each room of the hostel is equipped with all basic eminities like cot, chair table etc.
facilities: Hostels: There are 2 boys Hostels, Shivalik and Aravalli Boys hostel and 2 Girls Hostel, Nilgiri and Satpura Girls Hostel. Each room of the hostel is equipped with all basic amenities like a cot, chair table etc.

Sports: There are a lot of sports amenities and resources available at GGSIPU. You can choose from a variety of games and sports like cricket, volleyball, football, basketball, powerlifting, body lifting, table tennis, yoga, arm wrestling, bodybuilding, badminton, lawn tennis, etc. for both men and women.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 10 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My journey at Delhi Metropolitan Education.
reviews.review_text: DME has good infrastructure and a clean campus. The college has 2 lifts, a canteen, a big library, a moot court hall, a seminar hall, an amphitheater, and many more facilities. The college has a lot of greenery. The college service staff are also friendly and are always available to maintain the college clean and good looking.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 9 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Very good college for law studies with helpful faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The campus is not very large, but it has all the necessary facilities like a library, Wi-Fi, and moot court halls. Classrooms are well maintained and have a clean environment for studying. Hostel facilities are provided by the college in Greater Noida with basic amenities, security, and comfortable accommodation.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 9 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Great faculty members with great facilities.
reviews.review_text: CCTV, projectors, and 2 A/C are in every classroom. The classrooms are very clean and well-maintained. Labs are also equipped with good-quality computers. The computers are fully functional and properly maintained. The canteen provides good and hygienic food and a variety of food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 9 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and good environment.
reviews.review_text: Classes are provided with a projector, 2 AC, and CCTVs. Proper sitting arrangements are there, the desk and table are neat and clean. Studios are properly maintained. The library has lots of books for students from different courses. The canteen is properly maintained and hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 9 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, opportunity to provide, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college provides well-maintained classrooms with the proper seating arrangement. Our college provides Wi-Fi facility too. Computer labs are still working. The canteen provides affordable meals. Though they can improve the variety of food. The college also encourages sports and games. Even the students from our college have been to the national level in sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 6 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is a great college with great opportunities for growth.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great. The studio is easily one of the best in the region, and it has all the latest features and equipment. There is an AV lab and a PCR for those interested in audio editing as well. The auditorium and seminar hall provide great space for ceremonies and debates. Classrooms are AC as well. The library is well stocked, and students can easily find reference materials there.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 6 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, facilities, faculty, and a good fest and social culture.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. It has nice facilities with air conditioning in every class. The library has a lot of stuff. The food available in the canteen is good and has a great variety. There are a lot of societies. The studio for media studies is one of the best in Delhi NCR. Students are also given access to chroma screens, cameras, mics, and other equipment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 3 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good placement, supportive faculty, and modern infrastructure with strong industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure. The classrooms are air-conditioned. The college has Wi-Fi connectivity. The computer facilities are good. The library is well-stocked. The college also has a moot court hall which is very attractive and professional too.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 3 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It has balanced academics with good exposure.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-maintained computer labs, a library with academic resources, a moot court hall for law students, seminar halls, and an auditorium. The college does have its own hostel, but PG accommodation is easily available nearby in Sector 62. Canteen facilities are decent. Medical facilities are provided in the college. There is a well-maintained moot court for law students. It helps students understand real court proceedings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 1 Mar 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college with best faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college has a hostel but it is associated with its sister college which is DTC near Pari Chowk. So it's not a good choice to take a college hostel. The college has various departments for various courses. They also have Wi-Fi but only for teachers as the system is installed in the library and the network in the college is bad.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 27 Feb 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It has industrial base courses.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi is available on all the floors, including in labs and the library. The library has all the relevant course books needed.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Delhi Metropolitan EducationReviewed on 27 Feb 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Immensely satisfied with the college, faculty, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are top-notch. The studio is there for broadcasting, pcr room where we can practice anchoring, shoot video, etc. It gives a real thrill. The quality is maintained throughout. We have a canteen which provides food for every occasion.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Gitarattan International Business SchoolReviewed on 3 Feb 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good college for management studies.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good we have college canteen, library, it Labs, common areas for social interactions. College library is open for us from 9 to 5:00 p. m. and there we can set and there we can sit and study. We gain practical exposure through our computer Labs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Gitarattan International Business SchoolReviewed on 2 Feb 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Best college with good infrastructure and friendly faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is decent, and well-maintained classrooms are available. A library with sufficient books is present. The campus atmosphere is very disciplined. The environment is very friendly. The classrooms are very spacious and the canteen food is tasty.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Gitarattan International Business SchoolReviewed on 2 Feb 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Overall a very good experience.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is satisfactory and functional. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with basic facilities like- projectors and proper seating. The library is well stocked with course related books and online courses, which is very helpful for academics and research work. The canteen food quality is good with clean and basic amenities. Medical and sports facilities are available for the improvement.

data.description: The faculty of Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University is very knowledgeable, friendly and extremely qualified. The faculty members are PhD holders. Their teaching methodology involves a case-study approach, presentations, class participation, industrial visit, live projects, simulation, etc.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University

likes.text: Top recruiting companies for our course are Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, Amazon, Accenture, Google, etc.
Our college provides many placement opportunities for every level of student.
