college_info.intro:
The Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science Chennai is known for its range of courses in the Engineering, Management, Humanities and Arts, Law, etc. streams. Among these courses the BTech and MBA at HIT Chennai stand out as the flagship programmes of the university.
These courses are highly sought-after among students for their placements and career opportunities with HITS BTech graduates able to take on a range of technical roles, all the while BTech students can also choose from among a range of specialisations including CSE, ECE, Mechanical Engineering, Aeronautical Engineering, Civil Engineering, etc.
While students of the HITS MBA programme are trained for less technical roles with an emphasis on Management and Leadership positions. Graduates will find a skill-set and foundation tailor made for the industry and job market with the university having a strong placement rate of 93.94% during recent years.
Further, the university offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. HITS Chennai courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Hindustan Institute of Technology & Science Chennai Tamil Nadu in the table provided below:

Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities

Love being in college

faqs.answer: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science offers a large diversity of courses to students in various fields. Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science admissions are held on the basis of both merit and entrance tests. Students seeking course admissions must clear their previous qualifying examination and appear for any of the prescribed entrance exams such as HITSEEE, HITSCAT, NATA, among others. Students can visit the official website to learn more regarding the course-wise eligibility and specialisation details.
faqs.question: Q: How do I get a seat at Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science?

faqs.answer: No, Hindustan University offers admission to all of its courses based on a valid score in the respective entrance exams. For the majority of UG courses from the streams of Science, Commerce, Humanities, Management and Law, the university conducts an in-house entrance exam, i.e., HITSCAT. For BTech course, students can apply via HISEEE, which is also an in-house entrance exam of Hindustan University. Apart from that, students can also get admission to various national level entrance exams such as CLAT/ GATE/ UGC NET, for specific courses. To find course-wise details for the accepted entrance exam, click here.
faqs.question: Q: Can I join Hindustan University without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: To get direct admission to the BSc course of Hindustan University, students must pass the minimum eligibility and selection criteria. Admission to BSc course is based on the HITSCAT entrance exam. This exam is a mandatory step of the selection process that is proposed by the university.

admission_process.title: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: HITS admission is mainly based on the university’s in-house entrance exam, i.e., HITSEEE & HITSCAT.Hindustan Universityconducts HITSEEE to provide admission to BTech courses. HITSCAT is the new entrance test conducted by the institute for admission to BDes, Law, Management, and some other courses. Additionally, some national entrance exams are also accepted for admission. These include UGC NET, CLAT, and GATE. Apart from this, the university also has a Centre for Open and Digital Education where six courses are taught online including both UG and PG level courses. Hindustan University courses offered include UG, PG, Doctoral, and Integrated courses in popular streams. These are BCom, BBA, BCA, MA, MBA, and MCA.

The institute offers more than 11 courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply for courses through the official website. Candidates can read the table below to learn more on Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science admission highlights 2025:
Particulars
HITS Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes offered
11 courses across various specialisations
How to apply?
https://hindustanuniv.ac.in/
Application Status
Level of programmes offered

HITS offers a diverse range of undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral, and integrated programs in popular fields. Thes include courses from Science, Engineering, Management, Humanities, and Medicine. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularHindustan Institute of Technology and Science courses:
Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate
Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate
Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate
Graduation in any discipline with a minimum 50% aggregate
Graduation in any discipline with a minimum 50% aggregate
Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate

Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science (HITS) has a multi-step admission process that students need to follow to get into the university. Starting with the application, students are required to go through the entrance exam followed by selection rounds and lastly confirmation of admission. After the selection rounds are over, course-wise merit lists are released on the official website of the university. Interested candidates can submit the fee and confirm their admission. Additionally, Admission to all the programmes is based on the entrance exam. Check below the complete HITS admission process:
1 - HITS Application 2025
The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.
2 - HITS Admission Selection rounds
Appear for the university-based entrance exam i.e., HITSEEE & HITSCAT. The selection will be based on entrance exam score and GDPI and then wait for the release of their merit list.
3 - HITS Document Verification
Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.
For more information about Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science check out the below video:

faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the BTech course ranges between INR 1.8 Lakhs to INR 13 lakhs. Apart from this, the candidate also has to pay hostel and one-time fee to pursue BTech course at Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science commonly known as Hindustan University.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for BTech at Hindustan University?
faqs.answer: For admission to BTech at Hindustan University, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The next step of the selection criteria is to qualify for an entrance exam. The university conducts an in-house entrance exam, i.e., Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science Engineering Entrance Examination (HITSEEE), which needs to be qualified with a valid score. This entrance exam is specifically conducted by HITS for admission of candidates to its BTech course. Th

faqs.question: Which type of questions will be asked in the HITSEEE exam?
faqs.answer: Multiple-choice questions will be asked in HITSEEE exam to check students' proficiency in fundamental subjects, including Maths, Physics, Chemistry, English, General Knowledge. The top scorers at national level will get a merit-based scholarship to do their graduate studies at HITS.

courses_data.name: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science BSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: The university offers three-year BSc course across 15 specialisations through the School of Applied Sciences and Allied Health Sciences. Students can also take admission to the five-year integrated course of BSc + MSc course in three specialisations. Admission to the BSc and integrated courses is entrance-based.HITShas its in-house entrance exam, i.e., Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science Common Aptitude Test (HITSCAT).

faqs.question: How do I get admission to BSc course at Hindustan University?
faqs.answer: To get direct admission to the BSc course of Hindustan University, students must pass the minimum eligibility and selection criteria. Admission to BSc course is based on the HITSCAT entrance exam. This exam is a mandatory step of the selection process that is proposed by the university.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BSc course at Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science?
faqs.answer: For the admission to three-year BSc course, the minimum eligibility criteria is to pass Class 12 with minimum 50% in the respective subjects.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc at Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science?

faqs.question: What will happen if I do not accept HITSCAT 2025 exam allotted seat?
faqs.answer: If the candidate doesn’t accept the seat allocated to him or her, the HITSCAT 2025 allotment will be canceled. Also, the seat in that case will be allocated to the candidate next in the order of merit. So, it is the responsibility of the candidate to pay the seat-acceptance fee by the given deadline.

faqs.question: Can I join Hindustan University without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: No, Hindustan University offers admission to all of its courses based on a valid score in the respective entrance exams. For the majority of UG courses from the streams of Science, Commerce, Humanities, Management and Law, the university conducts an in-house entrance exam, i.e., HITSCAT. For BTech course, students can apply via HISEEE, which is also an in-house entrance exam of Hindustan University. Apart from that, students can also get admission to various national level entrance exams such as CLAT/ GATE/ UGC NET, for specific courses.To find course-wise details for the accepted entrance exam, click here.

faqs.question: How can I join Hindustan Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science (HITS) has a multi-step admission process which students need to follow to get into the university. Starting with the application, students are required to go through the entrance exam followed by selection rounds and lastly confirmation of admission. After the selection rounds are over, course-wise merit lists are released on the official website of the university. Interested candidates can submit the fee and confirm their admission. Additionally, Admission to all the programmes is based on the entrance exam. Candidates must check the eligibility criteria on the official website of Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science, before filling out the admission form.

faqs.question: How do I get a seat at Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science?
faqs.answer: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science offers a large diversity of courses to students in various fields. Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science admissions are held on the basis of both merit and entrance tests. Students seeking course admissions must clear their previous qualifying examination and appear for any of the prescribed entrance exams such as HITSEEE, HITSCAT, NATA, among others. Students can visit the official website to learn more regarding the course-wise eligibility and specialisation details.

placement_data.title: Hindustan University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Hindustan University has placed 93.94% students of the Class of 2024. A total 1364 students were placed out of the total of 1,452 students of the batch 2024. Further, the average package offered to BTech and BArch students stood at INR 4.60 LPA and INR 4.50 LPA, respectively. E urofins, TCS, BNY Mellon, IBM , Wipro, TCS, Infosys were among the few top recruiters of Hindustan University in 2024 .

faqs.question: How are the placements at Hindustan University?
faqs.answer: Hindustan University offers good placements annually for its various courses like MBA, BPharma and BTech, etc. As per the latest report, a total of 1,364 students were placed and 93.94% placement rate was recorded during Hindustan University placements 2024. Further, the the highest package offered during the 2022 placement drive stood at INR 12.75 LPA. The key highlights of Hindustan University placements for the Class of 2023 and 2024 are tabulated below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Placement Statistics (2024) Average package INR 4.5 LPA (BArch) INR 4.65 LPA (BTech) INR 4.5 LPA (BArch) INR 4.60 LPA (BTech) Students strength 1,445 1,452 Total students placed 1,384 1,364 Placement rate 95.78% 93.94%

faqs.question: What is the placement percentage of Hindustan University?
faqs.answer: As per the latest report, Hindustan University recorded 93.94% placements in the academic year 2023-2024. The participating recruiters placed 1,364 students of the batch 2024 in new-age job roles. The highest package offered stood at INR 12.75 LPA, respectively. The key highlights of Hindustan University placements for the Class of 2023 and 2024 are tabulated below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Placement Statistics (2024) Average package INR 4.5 LPA (BArch) INR 4.65 LPA (BTech) INR 4.5 LPA (BArch) INR 4.60 LPA (BTech) Students strength 1,445 1,452 Total students placed 1,384 1,364 Placement rate 95.78% 93.94% Note: The above-mentioned packages are taken from the official website. These are assumed as average packages as only salary was mentioned on the official website.

faqs.question: How is Hindustan University for BArch placements?
faqs.answer: Hindustan University has a good track record of BArch placements. The placement details of the BArch batch 2023 are yet to be released on the official website. faqs.answer: The total fee for HITS Chennai MBA courses is cumulative of multiple components, such as security deposit, tuition fee, hostel fee, and more. Selected candidates have to pay admission fee amount after selection for seat confirmation. Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science MBA tuition fee range from INR 1.2 Lacs to INR 4.3 lakh . Additionally, the one-time fee is INR 8,500 and the hostel charges range from INR 1.48 Lacs to INR 1.64 lakh . It must be noted that the mentioned fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. nirf.description:
HITS ERP has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2024.
It has been recognized that the institute has displayed stability in trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2024, HITS ERP's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2024, HITS ERP's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is noticeable that in the 'Management' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2024, HITS ERP's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel.description:
The hostels have well-furnished air-conditioned and regular rooms with attached restrooms providing the right ambience for the students. There are five residential halls for boys and three for girls on campus
that accommodate over 2500 students. State of the art kitchen and spacious dining area has been provided for both the hostels and a customized menu caters to the student’s needs. Hygiene and cleanliness is emphasized in the hostel. All the hostels offer a variety of services and opportunities for students. Staff members residing in the hostel are assigned to address academic and personal problems of the students. Round-the-clock security, communication, dispensary facilities are also available.

library.description: The HITS' Library has a collection of 105253 books, 42262 online journals and 389 printed journals, 12 newspaper, 64 thesis and dissertations, 3031 project reports and 2792 CDs. The Library system consists of a Central Library and Departmental Libraries which collectively support the teaching, research and extension programmes of the Institute. All students, faculty members and employees of the Institute are entitled to use the Library facilities enrolling membership.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Horse Riding, Cycling, Boxing, Karate, Volleyball Court, Throwball, Athletics, Aerobics, Martial Arts, Table Tennis, Billiards and Snooker

All students, faculty members and employees of the Institute are entitled to use the Library facilities enrolling membership.

The ‘Garage Café’ is another food court with a rugged garage appearance catering to the needs of the food lovers. Both continental and Indian cuisines are served. Besides, fast food and other eateries are also available.

reviews.review_heading: MBA in Business Analytics.
reviews.review_text: A lot of controversies happened in the college, especially during the inter college cultural which severely disrupted the pace of the whole college. Providing permission for conducting such events often in the college causes the students to lower their concentration on academics and placement wise. Apart from all the beautiful campus it looks like the best facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the campus infrastructure, and they conduct many events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science is awesome and full of greenish environment. It gives a peaceful mind for the students to concentrate on their studies. Labs with well quality equipments, and they give importance to studies as well as sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: College should always be proud of their student's achievements. College is so good by the means of transportation facilities. They also collect very minimal charges for every student for transportation. Apart from grading systems, college looks for well-disciplined students.

reviews.review_heading: A detailed insight of my college placements, infrastructure, teachers, curriculum, and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is decent and green. The drainage systems are well maintained, and in rainy seasons there won't be much clogged water. There are different architectural buildings for different departments. Library is well-maintained and air-conditioned. There are football field, basketball court, badminton court, etc. There are 2 canteens and a mini super-market is also there.

reviews.review_heading: Detailed insights into my college placements, infrastructure, faculty, curriculum, and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is decent and green. The drainage systems are well maintained, and in rainy seasons there won't be much clogged water. There are different architectural buildings for different departments. The library is well-maintained and air-conditioned. There are football field, basketball court, badminton court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied by the college and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are clean and hygienic and have all the equipment required for the particular course. When it comes to me, I study computer Science (AI&this), labs are very good, with good signal strength, and proper systems for coding. Being a day scholar I'm unaware of the hostel but my friends living in hostel tells that the rooms are great, good needs to be improved.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with college.
reviews.review_text: The food is good in the hostel and also there are clinic in our college for medical emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: The start of my twenties in the best place HITS.
reviews.review_text: HITS has good infrastructure where it is peaceful and quiet in common with more trees. Also, the hostels are well-equipped with basic need amenities. The quality of the food is also very hygienic and clean. At last, the best part is the library which is very large and peaceful to our work.

reviews.review_heading: Need improvements in placements, classrooms, and upgradation in syllabus.
reviews.review_text:
Library is so good and classroom's AC won't work. No Wi-Fi is available.
The quality of the food is so good and they are well-focused on sports and events and if you like extra activities you can choose this college it well suits you but for knowledge, it's not the right one for the future.

reviews.review_heading: A proper college to gain knowledge in aeronautics and aerospace for a career.
reviews.review_text: The college has good architecture and infrastructure design. Students have various hangout spots to relax. The college has good hostel facilities, including AC and non-AC, providing hygienic food for North Indian and South Indian students. Good medical facilities are also provided in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Life at HITS - Can survive and excel when you have an interest to be motivated and ask doubts.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are okay in Hindustan. Library is very good and well-maintained. It has 5 floors and air-conditioned. I didn't opt for hostel but still some of my friends said it was average. There is 1 main canteen and some small snacks and ice-cream shops are available.

reviews.review_heading: Life in Hindustan, everything u need to know from an hindustaninan.
reviews.review_text: So facilities are good in Hindustan like we have so many labs like aerodynamics lab, propulsion system lab and computer labs and only hostellers are provided with Wi-Fi and in hostels even though the fee is a bit high it is good and the food is good too .

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the curriculum but need more placements in relevant fields.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities were good. It contained aircraft hanger, fight simulator, chetak helicopter, learjet aircraft, wind tunnels, etc. Different varieties of hostels were provided based on our requirements and comfort. Sports and games were available too. We could go for horse riding as well.

reviews.review_heading: I am a little dissatisfied because of placement and, moreover, good infrastructure and faculties.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure and peaceful environment. Students are friendly, and good laboratory facilities are available. Many play areas are available for students. They give space for sports too. Good and neat environment. Good food and hostel feel good because of caring and cleanliness.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it is a good campus and worth the money.
reviews.review_text: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science (HITS) provides excellent infrastructure with Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a comprehensive library. Hostels offer modern amenities and 24/7 medical services. The campus has a hygienic mess, a canteen, and sports facilities for various outdoor and indoor games.

paragraphs: Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science offers both need-based and merit-based scholarships to the eligible students. Also, Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science has instituted Hindustan Teaching Research Fellowships (HTRF) for eligible candidates.
Below are the major highlights of Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science scholarships:

Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science provides a total of 7 scholarships to eligible students. Below mentioned are the detailed information regarding Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science scholarships:
DRDO Scholarship Scheme for Girls

This scholarship is for Girls / Women students studying in first year of Under Graduate (BE/B.TECH: full time four year degree) and Post Graduate (M.TECH/ME: two year full time degree course) under “DRDO Scholarship Scheme for Girls in Aerospace Engg / Aeronautical Engg / Space Engg & Rocketry / Avionics / Aircraft Engg”.
Covid Martyrs Scholarships

This scholarship is for wards of COVID Martyrs, who have lost their lives protecting our countrymen during the COVID Pandemic will be given complete Tuition Fee waiver in the discipline of their choice, having met the basic laid down norms, such as marks in qualifying exams etc. Also all the expenses of the student which include traveling, boarding and lodging will be taken care of by HITS. Also, a monthly stipend is provided during the period of the course.
Covid Frontline Warrior Scholarship

This scholarship is for the wards of Doctors, Healthcare professionals, Government and Service personnel those who have participated in protecting our countrymen during the COVID Pandemic. The scholarship is for a period of two years across all courses to those who meet the basic scholarship criteria.
Dr KCG Verghese Merit Cum Means Scholarship

This scholarship is offered to the top scorers in Class 12 from any School, Boards, Subjects, Centum Scorers, Class Toppers at HITS, Batch Toppers, and UG Rank Holders and Proficiency Prize holders are awarded scholarship to pursue their higher studies at HITS. Scholarships are also awarded to the meritorious students who are financially weak to meet their educational needs at HITS.
Dr Elizabeth Verghese Founder Chancellor Scholarship

This scholarship is offered to the girls with academic potential to pursue higher education and who are from lower income families and are interested in pursuing higher education at HITS are eligible for this scholarship.
Hindusthan Loyality Scholarship
This scholarship is subject to norms and the scrutiny of the Scholarship Committee. It is offered to:
Sports Scholarship

Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science offers this scholarship to the students who excel in sports. The student who has performed and achieved at the National, State and Inter-University Levels in the following sports are eligible.

Jaypee Institute of Information Technology (approved by AICTE) students are taught presentation skills, communication skills, and technical skills required for a great career ahead. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology offers PG, UG, and PhD programmes to students. At the UG level, the university offers BTech, BSc, BBA, BCA, and other courses to students. At the PG level, the university provides MTech, MSc, MCA, and other courses to students. Jaypee Institute of Information Technology University Noida also provides PhD programmes to students. Below mentioned are some of the Jaypee Institute of Information Technology courses and their respective eligibility and Jaypee Noida fees:

faqs.answer: A:    JIIT Noida M.Tech admission is completely entrance-based. Candidates seeking admission to the JIIT Noida M.Tech course must appear for the Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering (GATE) or other entrance exam such as the JIIT PGCET or CUET PG. Apart from this, candidates are also requested to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria to be eligible for JIIT Noida M.Tech admissions. Candidates must have a minimum of 60% aggregate in their graduation.
faqs.question: Can I do M.Tech at JIIT Noida without GATE?

faqs.answer: A:    Jaypee Institute of Infortmation Technology accepts various entrance exams for different courses. Check out the entrance exams that are accepted by JIIT Noida: JEE Main: The entrance exam is accepted for the BTech and Integrated BTech course.GATE/ JIIT PGCET/ CUET-PG: Candidates wishing to get admission to the M.Tech course at JIIT Noida must appear for GATEJIIT Noida offers various courses with merit based admissions as well.
faqs.question: What are the entrance exams accepted by JIIT Noida?

faqs.answer: A:    There are various additional costs that students will have to pay in addition to the total tuition fee. This includes hostel charges which are INR 1 Lacs per semester (Gen) and USD 1500 (NRI/Foreign). Students will have to pay INR 20,000 for all programmes (one-time refundable after completion of the programme).
faqs.question: What are the additional costs, such as accommodation, food, and books to be paid at Jaypee Noida University?

faqs.answer: A:    A total od 120 students can do BTech. in Information Technology from JIIT Noida. To secure the IT seats candidates must have Class 12 in the relevant stream with a minimum 60% aggregate. Further, candidates must have a valid JEE Main scores. Further, seats in the programs shall be allocated on the basis of preferences indicated at the time of counselling.

review_content.Placements: Placement season is still going on, and maximum students got internships from the college itself. Top roles offered are business development, executive, financial analyst, business analyst, executive for corporate sales, etc. Top recruiting companies that recruit students from this college are Swiggy, MakeMyTrip, and Naukri.com.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department has well-maintained classrooms with smart boards and audiovisual teaching aids. There is Wi-Fi connectivity across the department. The computer lab is equipped with an updated system. The library has a good collection of textbooks, reference books, and general books. Seminar halls are also available for presentations and guest lectures.

reviews_list.review_title: Very Satisfied, good studies, good environment, good location, and decent crowd.

review_content.Placements: Placements are excellent, and overall, the training and companies visited are good. The coding culture is, I guess, less active otherwise. If you join the clubs, then it'll be sorted out. Placement and internship opportunities depend more on your efforts if done properly. 12 LPA is very easy to get if you're from CSE in 62.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is not so big, like three buildings in which 1 is a hostel, but properly maintained with all facilities, with smart classrooms, and good food by Annapurna. The sports facilities are okay, and they have three entry gates and a parking area, 1 auditorium in JBS.

faqs.answer: JIIT Noida BTech cutoff 2024 was concluded after the JEE Main Round 5 Seat Allotment result, followed by an additional two rounds of CSAB counselling. The cutoff was released for admission to the BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. During the JIIT Noida BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks varied between 59706 and 129809 for the General AI category students. Talking about the branch-wise cutoff, the most sought-after course in 2024 was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering with a cutoff rank of 59706, followed by B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing with 65698.
faqs.question: Q: What are the JEE cutoffs for BTech at JIIT Noida?

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced
faqs.question: Q: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?

faqs.answer: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology (JIIT), Noida, BTech admission is conducted in three different modes. To get admission in the BTech course, candidates can choose any one admission procedure as per their qualification. There are three admission modes:Direct mode: Candidates are offered direct admission based on their score in the Class 12 exam. Candidates must score 75% marks or equivalent, in aggregate in three subjects, i.e., Mathematics, Physics, and English. JEE (UG): Students can also apply for the JEE exam. Common University Entrance Test, also known as JEE UG, is a national-level entrance exam conducted by NTA for admission to UG courses offered by participating institutes. Students should have passed Class 12 from a recognised board in Science or a relevant stream to be admitted to bachelor's degree programs in the Central Universities.Lateral-Entry: Candidates are required to have a valid qualfication and appear for the Lateral Entry Entrance Test for admission to BTech course.

course_faqs.answer: Compared to many other private colleges, Jaypee has a generally favourable placement situation. Further, candidates applying for accommodation are required to pay the hostel fee of INR 6 Lacs or INR 10 lakh. overview_faqs.question: How is JIIT Noida? What has been the JEE Main cutoff trend for the past few years?
overview_faqs.answer: JIIT Noida is one of the top colleges for engineering in the country. JIIT Noida JEE Main cutoff 2024 was concluded with the release of last round of cutoff results. The cutoff was released for different categories belonging to the All India quota. For the General AI category candidates, the cutoff ranks varied between 59706 and 129809. The most in-demand specialisations were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing and Integrated B.Tech. + M.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering. Looking at the cutoff ranks for these specialisations and most of the other specialisations, there was observed a fluctuating trend in the cutoff.

overview_faqs.question: What is the JIIT Noida BSc application fee?
overview_faqs.answer: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology, Noida BSc application fee is round INR 500. Applicants must ill out the online application form and submit it along with the JIIT Noida BSc application fee in the form of a Demand Draft in favor of “Jaypee Institute of Information Technology”. Further, candidates can also submit the BSc application fee in offline mode. review_summary.college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied about the curriculum, but placements are kind of okay.

content.Placements: Nearly 70 percent of students are placed. Top roles are business analyst and associate consultant. Top companies include startups and mass hirers like Infosys, Cognizant. Companies like Oracle and Amazon also do on-campus visits, and the overall hiring scene is okay.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms depend on buildings; for B. Tech, they are not up to the mark and are in bad shape. Labs are clean and have facilities, but the experiments are bookish and some are not worth it. Food quality is normal, not too bad, but it gets boring after some time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: JIIT: The ultimate college for placements.

content.Placements: More than 90% of students from the CSE department are placed, and the highest package offered so far is 90 LPA, as reported by LinkedIn. Top recruiters are Google, Microsoft, and Atlassian. Many students got an internship, with some even getting one in the first semester of their first year. Top roles offered are in SWE and SDE.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are excellent in terms of price, but availability is based on CGPA. Food quality is excellent, and the campus features 24/7 medical facilities, including an ambulance and fire brigade. Wi-Fi speeds are also good. You can get around 50-60 Mbps, and you can access the library and cafe till 10:30 at night.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has a supportive environment and experienced faculty members.

content.Placements: Placement season is still going on, and maximum students got internships from the college itself. Top roles offered are business development, executive, financial analyst, business analyst, executive for corporate sales, etc. Top recruiting companies that recruit students from this college are Swiggy, MakeMyTrip, and Naukri.com.
content.Infrastructure: The department has well-maintained classrooms with smart boards and audiovisual teaching aids. There is Wi-Fi connectivity across the department. The computer lab is equipped with an updated system. The library has a good collection of textbooks, reference books, and general books. Seminar halls are also available for presentations and guest lectures.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Very Satisfied, good studies, good environment, good location, and decent crowd.

content.Placements: Placements are excellent, and overall, the training and companies visited are good. The coding culture is, I guess, less active otherwise. If you join the clubs, then it'll be sorted out. Placement and internship opportunities depend more on your efforts if done properly. 12 LPA is very easy to get if you're from CSE in 62.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is not so big, like three buildings in which 1 is a hostel, but properly maintained with all facilities, with smart classrooms, and good food by Annapurna. The sports facilities are okay, and they have three entry gates and a parking area, 1 auditorium in JBS.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good Infrastructure and Placements

content.Placements: Well, a good amount of students were placed in the course. The highest package went for 95 LPA, and the lowest is around 4 LPA. The average is going near around 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies include LinkedIn, Zomato, and Google. Top roles offered are data scientist.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and connectivity are pretty good. It is directly located at Noida Electronic City metro station; thus, it is very easy to travel to. Hostels are also very good. Every single hostel has 2 rooms and AC as well. Classrooms are good, Wi-Fi is good, and I love the library.

admission_overview.college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Admission 2026: Eligibility, Application Process, Fees

admission_overview.title: JIIT Noida Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: JIIT Noida admission is based on both entrance exam and merit depending on the programme. The Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Noida, aka JIIT Noida, offers UG, PG, and PhD programmes. These are offered in the fields of Engineering & Technology, Design, Arts, Media, and Commerce. The institute offers BTech, MTech and five-year integrated B Tech-MTech as its flagship programmes. The application process can be completed online. Students have to submit scores of national-level entrance tests, such as CUET/ CAT/ JEE Mains to get admission in the institute. Students also have to appear for counselling for selective programmes, such as BTech. Interested students can go through the following sections to know more.

eligibility_selection.title: JIIT Noida Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: JIIT Noida course admission is subject to fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. The institute admits students through entrance test scores and/or counselling as applicable. Each programme has different eligibility and selection requirements. Students can either submit national-level entrance test scores or appear for the exams conducted by the institute. JIIT Noida conducts UGET for BTech (lateral entry), BSc CS, BBA, BCA, BCom, Diploma After Class 10. Similarly, it has PGET for MSc, MTech, MCA, MCom, and MDes programmes.

faqs.answer: Yes, Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Noida does conduct entrance tests for admissions to its programmes. The university conducts the following exams:UGET - Undergraduate Entrance Test for BTech (lateral entry), BSc CS, BBA, BCA, BCom, Diploma After Class 10PGET - Postgraduate Entrance Test for MSc, MCA, MTech, MCom, MDes
faqs.question: Does JIIT conduct any entrance exam?

faqs.answer: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Noida eligibility has to be met for students to get admission. The common eligibility is as below:JIIT Noida UG eligibility - Class 12 with relevant subjectsJIIT Noida PG eligibility - UG degree in a relevant fieldJIIT Noida PhD eligibility - PG degree in a relevant field
faqs.question: Who is eligible for JIIT Noida admission?

paragraphs: The admission process for courses at JIIT Noida starts with an eligibility check. Eligible students can then apply online. The other stages include application, selection, and admission confirmation. Check below the steps to complete theJIIT Noida admission process:
JIIT Noida Application Process 2026

Minimum eligibility to apply for BTech programmes is Class 12 pass in science stream or equivalent from a recognised university and minimum eligibility to apply for MTech programmes is a Graduation /BTech or equivalent from a recognised university.
Application Submission
Candidates must apply on the official website of JIT @jiit.ac.in.Candidates need to fill personal and academic details. The form has to be submitted with documents and application fees.
Candidates need to submit documents at the time of admission to JIIT for the verification document round. Candidates must pay theJIIT Noida admission feesof INR 60,000 to confirm their seat.

JIIT Noida charges the course fees in different parts. The total fee has components, such as admission fees, tuition fees, caution deposit, and more. Students have to payINR 60,000initially to block the seat. This fees will be adjusted against the first semester/year fees. The balance amount has to be paid before the date given in the offer letter.
The payment can be completed through cash/ card/ UPI. Check the table below to know about theJIIT Noida feesfor top programmes:
Note: This is taken from official sources and can change.

At Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Noida, seats are offered through entrance + counselling basis mainly. The BTech programme has the highest intake with over 2000 total number of seats. For BTech, 50% of the seats are filled based on JEE Main + counselling and the other 50% is filled through Class 12 merit + counselling.

The vacant seats are inter-transferrable in either categories. Reservation of seats for SC/ ST students is as per the Government of India norms. Students can check the table below to know about theJaypee Institute of Information Technology Noida seats:
Note: This is taken from official sources and can change.
lists: Admission toJIIT’s B Techand 5-year Integrated B Tech + M Tech courses is offered based on JEE rank/score. Students have to go through the online counselling to get admission

ForBiology-based B Techprogrammes (Biotechnology, Bioinformatics only), 50% of seats shall be allotted through JEE rank merit, and rest of the remaining 50% of seats shall be allotted on the basis of merit in Class 12 examination for students having Biology/Biotechnology with Physics in Class 12.Candidates with Biology/Biotechnology, Physics and Maths can apply for both options (i.e JEE JEE-based admissions or Bio-based admissions) by filling out different application forms.

Admission toMTech coursesis granted on the basis of a written test, PGET conducted by the university itself. However, those who have valid GATE scores can get direct admission. Such candidates are exempted from taking the entrance test.
JIIT offersMBAvia Jaypee Business School. Admission to the MBA programme is done on the basis of CAT/MAT/CMAT/XAT/ATMA/GMAT scores. This is followed by GDPI rounds for final selection

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BTech course at JIIT Noida?
faqs.answer: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology (JIIT), Noida, BTech admissionis conducted in three different modes. There are three admission modes:Direct mode:Candidates are offered direct admission based on their score in the Class 12 exam. faqs.question: How can I join JIIT Noida BTech directly?
faqs.answer: Candidates cannot get direct admission to the BTech course at JIIT Noida as the admission process is entrance based. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply for the course through the application form on the official website. Candidates seeking admission to the talked about course are required to have a minimum aggregate of 60% in Class 12.

faqs.question: Can I do M.Tech at JIIT Noida without GATE?
faqs.answer: JIIT Noida M.Tech admission is completely entrance-based. Candidates seeking admission to the JIIT Noida M.Tech course must appear for the Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering (GATE) or other entrance exam such as the JIIT PGCET or CUET PG. Apart from this, candidates are also requested to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria to be eligible for JIIT Noida M.Tech admissions. Candidates must have a minimum of 60% aggregate in their graduation.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for MSc in Physics at JIIT Noida?
faqs.answer: MSc in Microbiologyhas the maximum numbers of seats at JIIT Noida, i.e.,45 seats. The MSc seats are also reserved for students in special categories such as SC and ST. Students must complete the MSc admission procedure to secure seats at the institute. For Jaypee Institute of Information Technology (JIIT), MSc admission, candidates can choose one of three admission procedures, which include direct admission, JIIT PGET, and CUET (PG).

faqs.question: What are the additional costs, such as accommodation, food, and books to be paid at Jaypee Noida University?
faqs.answer: There are various additional costs that students will have to pay in addition to the total tuition fee. This includes hostel charges which are INR 1 Lacs per semester (Gen) and USD 1500 (NRI/Foreign). Students will have to pay INR 20,000 for all programmes (one-time refundable after completion of the programme).

faqs.question: How can students apply for admission to various courses at JIIT?

There is no provision for direct admission, but candidates can get admission to the merit based admission process courses just by filling out the application form. placement_report.college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Noida Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: JIIT Noida has released the placement stats for its BTech batch that passed out in 2025 . The highest package offered during JIIT placements 2025 stood at INR 62 LPA , which was offered by Atlassian . The second-highest package offered by Microsoft, which stood at INR 55.38 LPA . Further, the average and median package offered to BTech students during JIIT placement 2025 stood at INR 11.13 LPA and INR 7.93 LPA , respectively.

A total of 666 offers were provided to 461 BTech CSE participating students , 142 offers to 121 ECE students, 71 offers to 50 IT students, and 25 offers to 26 students. The total percentage of offers during Jaypee Noida placements 2025 stood at 137% .

Jaypee Institute of Information Technology, Noida has a dedicated Placement and Training cell that organizes a campus recruitment training process to train the students through various in-house and out-of-the-house training sessions, including aptitude test, technical test, Group Discussions (GD), mock interviews, workshops, etc. It helps the students to prepare for placement interviews in technical and HR aspects by arranging meetings with professional trainers.

hostel_campus.college_name: Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: JIIT has a total number of 5 hostels, 2 for boys and 3 for girls. The overall charge of student’s discipline and hostel administration vests in the chief warden. All hostel rooms are provided with LAN/Wi-Fi connectivity with 24 hours internet through the main server of the academic block. The hostel is also connected with outdoor sports centers for lawn tennis, basketball, volleyball, and badminton. Other facilities include are 24 hour’s electricity supply, water heaters, water freezer etc.

data: BTech, BTech + MTech, BTech lateral entry

library.description: JIIT's Learning Resource Centre is an excellent repository of learning resources. It can accommodate about 700 users at a time. It is fully integrated with the latest barcode technology and international standard library management software - Liberty. The LRC consists of the latest collection of textbooks as well as reference books (approx. 61500), national as well as international peer-reviewed journals, magazines and electronic resources on subject areas covered by the academic curricula of the Institute and other universal knowledge (approx. 357800).

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Hockey Field

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied about the curriculum, but placements are kind of okay.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms depend on buildings; for B. Tech, they are not up to the mark and are in bad shape. Labs are clean and have facilities, but the experiments are bookish and some are not worth it. Food quality is normal, not too bad, but it gets boring after some time.

reviews.review_heading: JIIT: The ultimate college for placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are excellent in terms of price, but availability is based on CGPA. Food quality is excellent, and the campus features 24/7 medical facilities, including an ambulance and fire brigade. Wi-Fi speeds are also good. You can get around 50-60 Mbps, and you can access the library and cafe till 10:30 at night.

reviews.review_heading: It has a supportive environment and experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-maintained classrooms with smart boards and audiovisual teaching aids. There is Wi-Fi connectivity across the department. The computer lab is equipped with an updated system. The library has a good collection of textbooks, reference books, and general books. Seminar halls are also available for presentations and guest lectures.

reviews.review_heading: Very Satisfied, good studies, good environment, good location, and decent crowd.
reviews.review_text: The campus is not so big, like three buildings in which 1 is a hostel, but properly maintained with all facilities, with smart classrooms, and good food by Annapurna. The sports facilities are okay, and they have three entry gates and a parking area, 1 auditorium in JBS.

reviews.review_heading: Good Infrastructure and Placements
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and connectivity are pretty good. It is directly located at Noida Electronic City metro station; thus, it is very easy to travel to. Hostels are also very good. Every single hostel has 2 rooms and AC as well. Classrooms are good, Wi-Fi is good, and I love the library.

reviews.review_heading: Jaypee could be a better option than other private colleges.
reviews.review_text: There are clean classrooms, well-equipped labs, huge library, overall campus Wi-Fi and hostel Wi-Fi (with limit), medical facility, psychological counselling, cafe, and huge common mess. The college lacks in sports facilities, but as a technology college I will say that it is fine.

reviews.review_heading: Jaypee Noida review by CSE under graduate.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure here is very good. All the classrooms, labs, washrooms, and canteen are available. Every place is very clean and hygienic. You will not face any difficulties with cleanliness and hygiene. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The labs have the latest technology.

reviews.review_heading: A very good college in terms of private colleges.
reviews.review_text: The mess food is average and hygienic but repetitive, and many students prefer outside food or canteen options. Overall, JIIT is a good option for serious CSE students but less ideal for other branches or those seeking a relaxed college experience. It's okay.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements but boring college life.
reviews.review_text: Medical facilities are good, and the mess is better compared to most colleges. The cafe is nice at first, but you get bored easily because it doesn't offer many good options. The classrooms and the library are also really nice. The Wi-Fi restricts apps like WhatsApp and Amazon. The network in hostels is very limited. First-year hostels are nice, but from the second year onwards, the quality starts to degrade little by little. Wi-Fi connectivity isn't very nice. It can be very frustrating, especi...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college, except for the campus area, which is hardly 16 acres.
reviews.review_text: Our course includes all the subjects required. But there are some subjects that lack practical knowledge, just like the other colleges. Hostels here have common washrooms. Rooms contain 2 beds and 2 almirahs. But the most important thing is the friends you make. Talking about sports, there aren't many facilities; no cricket or football ground, while you have a GYM along with a badminton court and a separate Squash Room. Table tennis is present inside the Hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I'm not satisfied with the mess food at all; it's horrible.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-equipped labs, air-conditioned classrooms, good Wi-Fi in academic areas, and a central library with a large collection of books and e-resources. The hostel rooms are clean and maintained regularly, with 24/7 water and electricity backup. The mess food is average, better than some other hostels, but repetitive sometimes. There are multiple canteens and food stalls inside the campus offering a decent variety.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with best experience.
reviews.review_text: The building is great with a very nice and comfortable infrastructure. Free Wi-Fi is there on whole campus, labs are equipped with all the necessary materials that too in a sufficient amount to meet all students' needs, and classrooms have centralized AC and also projectors which almost every teacher uses to teach. Library is the best with no noise and a great amount of books. The food in the cafeteria is so nice with 100% hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jaypee 128 sector.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and labs are satisfactory while classrooms are average. The library is good. Hostels are nice but the mess food is bland. Sports facilities exist but are poorly maintained. Medical assistance is available and efficient. Classrooms could use some renovation. The college infrastructure isn't exceptional; it's a single building college. The surrounding area needs improvement.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements but bad college life.
reviews.review_text: I am in the 128 sector branch where the infra is very below par. There was some construction going on, and also the size of the cafe was so small that it became congested during heavy hours. On top of that, MPH, the multipurpose hall is always occupied with some cultural activities, so there is no place to hang out in the college

reviews.review_heading: Review of students' perspectives.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and labs have all the necessary equipment. The quality of the food is good. Sports facilities are limited and have a small ground. There is one MPH in my college where the college conducts all events.

paragraphs: Jaypee Noida University offers multiple scholarships for its courses. Candidates are required to fulfil certain criteria to be eligible for the scholarships. A few of the eligibility criteria are listed below:

Yes, there is scholarships for BTech students at JIIT Noida. The scholarships are offered by Government scholarships bodies such as Jaiprakash Sewa Sansthan. The Jaiprakash Sewa Sansthan has established an initial corpus of INR 20 Lacs for the William Webster Merit-Cum-Means Scholarship, which will be awarded to eligible students from the income generated through interest from this corpus.

Jaypee Institute of Information Technology, Noida BSc application fee is round INR 500. Applicants must ill out the online application form and submit it along with the JIIT Noida BSc application fee  in the form of a Demand Draft in favor of “Jaypee Institute of Information Technology”. Further,  candidates can also submit the BSc application fee in offline mode. Applicants just have to register and download the duly filled application form from the official website may be deposited by hand or sent by post at the below address:The RegistrarBSc AdmissionJaypee Institute of Information TechnologyA-10, Sector-62, Noida 201 309

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
IIIT Allahabad offers various courses to students at the UG, PG, and PhD levels. The institute offers courses mainly in streams such as Engineering and Management. At the UG level, the institute offers a BTech programme to students in full-time mode. It is offered for a duration of 2 years and is approved by the AICTE.

At the PG level, the institute offers MTech and MBA programmes to students for a duration of 2 years each. IIIT Allahabad courses are offered in several specialisations such as Computer Science & Engineering, Bioinformatics, Software Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, etc. In addition, the institute also offers a programme to students. reviews_list.review_title: Review of IIIT Allahabad.

review_content.Placements: The placement statistics of Indian Institute of Information and Technology, Allahabad are very nice and good, I think, because it is better than many of the colleges I have seen. Also, as the college is government, it is very reliable and good for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college, Indian Institute of Information and Technology Allahabad (Prayagraj), is very good, I think, because it has its own mess, which is very hygienic and well maintained, and it also has its own canteen that provides a variety of foods.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of IIIT Allahabad College.

review_content.Placements: Around 85% of students find placements. The maximum salary package is a whopping 83 LPA, the average hangs around 24.5 LPA, and the median is about 16 LPA. Companies like Atlassian, Qualcomm, Postman, PhonePe, Google, Oracle, Adobe, Media.net, and Goldman Sachs are the leading recruiting companies. As for internships, core ECE students are looking at about 25%-30%, and overall, around 70%-80% of students land internship offers. Most of the roles available tend to be in software, by the way.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel, along with the mess, runs in a sufficient manner. Classrooms have Wi-Fi, and the LAN can be accessed from the hostel rooms. Basically, you are able to get everything that you want on the university grounds. The classrooms are airy and equipped with projectors. There is a big stadium for cricket and football, apart from an indoor stadium for badminton.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: My experience at IIIT as an ECE student.

review_content.Placements: In the Economic year 2025, placements were around 97% for B.Tech Courses, the highest package was around 12 LPA, while the average package was around 33 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Microsoft, Google, Goldman Sachs, Amazon, DE Shaw, Deloitte, Adobe, and Zepto.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is enough for the graduates as it is not very crowded. All sports are available indoors and outdoors. However, the maintenance of some sports facilities lags, like the basketball court, badminton, etc. Labs are good, fully centralized. A.C. Timings for labs are until 8 p.m., and libraries are open until 11 p.m. The library has a good collection of books relevant to your courses. Classrooms are decent, not much to say, but on the good side.

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced
faqs.question: Q: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?

faqs.answer: IIIT Allahabad accpets JEE Main score for admission to the BTech courses. As per the IIIT Allahabad cutoff 2023, the Last Round closing rank for BTech ranged between 5924 and 9558, among which Information Technology was the most competitive specialisation. The Round 1 closing rank for BTech ranged between 4817 and 8428 for BTech. So, considering the previous year Round 1 and the Last Round closing ranks, candidates seeking admission to IIIT Allahabad must secure a rank over and above 4800 and 9600 for the General ALL India category candidates. Candidates can refer to the table given below to check out the 2023 Last Round closing ranks for IIIT Allahabad to get an idea of the ranks required for all the BTech courses offered at this institute: CourseRound 1Last Round B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering84289558B.Tech. in Information Technology48175924B.Tech. in Information Technology (Business Informatics)51626587

review_summary.college_name: IIIT Allahabad Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college, with great atmosphere.

content.Placements: The tentative percentage of students placed every year from our campus is almost hundred percent. Many great companies visit our campus during the placement session like Amazon, Flipkart, Google, Walmart, Cisco, Adobe, etc. The internship percentage of the students is also very great; almost all the students get internship during the third or fourth year. Many students even get internship during the second year. This year only almost five to six students get selected in Google code.
content.Infrastructure: It's compulsory to opt for hostel. And according to every student, it's good to be part of hostel. The hostel rooms are well furnished with proper ventilation and lighting. Classrooms are world class, all facilities are available. Library is open 24 hours. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. There are different grounds for different sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Table of Indian Institute of Information Technology Allahabad.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are top-notch. Most of the students take admission in this college for placements only. The lowest package is around 10 LPA, and the highest is 1 crore+. The average goes around 30-35 LPA. Almost 90-95% students get placed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good enough. The campus is big enough, and there are various beautiful places such as the rock garden, the pavilion, the cafeteria, etc. Also, the academic buildings are good enough. But there can be some improvements in hostels.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of IIIT Allahabad.

content.Placements: The placement statistics of Indian Institute of Information and Technology, Allahabad are very nice and good, I think, because it is better than many of the colleges I have seen. Also, as the college is government, it is very reliable and good for students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college, Indian Institute of Information and Technology Allahabad (Prayagraj), is very good, I think, because it has its own mess, which is very hygienic and well maintained, and it also has its own canteen that provides a variety of foods.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of IIIT Allahabad College.

content.Placements: Around 85% of students find placements. The maximum salary package is a whopping 83 LPA, the average hangs around 24.5 LPA, and the median is about 16 LPA. Companies like Atlassian, Qualcomm, Postman, PhonePe, Google, Oracle, Adobe, Media.net, and Goldman Sachs are the leading recruiting companies. As for internships, core ECE students are looking at about 25%-30%, and overall, around 70%-80% of students land internship offers. Most of the roles available tend to be in software, by the way.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel, along with the mess, runs in a sufficient manner. Classrooms have Wi-Fi, and the LAN can be accessed from the hostel rooms. Basically, you are able to get everything that you want on the university grounds. The classrooms are airy and equipped with projectors. There is a big stadium for cricket and football, apart from an indoor stadium for badminton.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My experience at IIIT as an ECE student.

content.Placements: In the Economic year 2025, placements were around 97% for B.Tech Courses, the highest package was around 12 LPA, while the average package was around 33 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Microsoft, Google, Goldman Sachs, Amazon, DE Shaw, Deloitte, Adobe, and Zepto.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is enough for the graduates as it is not very crowded. All sports are available indoors and outdoors. However, the maintenance of some sports facilities lags, like the basketball court, badminton, etc. Labs are good, fully centralized. A.C. Timings for labs are until 8 p.m., and libraries are open until 11 p.m. The library has a good collection of books relevant to your courses. Classrooms are decent, not much to say, but on the good side.

admission_overview.college_name: IIIT Allahabad Admission 2025: Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Application

paragraphs: Admissions to different levels of courses atIIIT Allahabadare entrance-based. The institute provides BTech, M.Tech, MBA and PhD courses across four departments. The names of these departments are Applied Sciences, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Information Technology and Management Sciences.

The selection of the student is decided on the scores, students have acheived in the national level entrance exam:JEE Main, CAT, MAT, GATE, XAT, CMAT, etc. For the undergraduate engineering course and postgraduate engineering course, i.e., BTech and MTech, the students should take part in the counselling process, which means seat allotment is based on JoSAA and CCMT counselling. For a PhD, students need to appear in an interview round.
Students seeking admission should meet the course-wise eligibility and selection conditions. The table below contains the relevant information about  IIIT Allahabad course admissions 2025
Eligibility
Class 12 with 75% aggregate
Bachelor's degree with 50% aggregate
CAT/XAT/CMAT/GMAT/MAT+ PI
BTech/ MSc degree with at least 60% aggregate
Master's degree
GATE/CSIR NET/UGC NET/ JRF/ CAT/ IIITA PhD Entrance Test + Interview
IIIT Allahabad Fee

IIIT Allahabad fees for all primary (refers to UG) and secondary (refers to PG courses) include distinct components. i.e., hostel fees, one-time fee payments, etc. Similarly, a total of 1,000+ seats are available for overall courses. Students can check the following table for a detailed IIIT Allahabad fees and seat intake for all the famous courses:
Note:The above-mentioned fee & seat intake details are sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and are subject to change.
At IIIT Allahabad a total of 1,000+ seats are available for overall courses.Students can check the following table for a detailed IIIT Allahabad seat intake for all the popular courses:
Note:The above-mentioned fee & seat intake details are sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and are subject to change.
IIIT Allahabad admission process includes the application process, selection round, cutoff, merit list and counselling. Find below the complete process around IIIT Allahabad admission 2025:
1: IIIT Allahabad Application Process 2025

For IIIT Allahabad BTech admission, Students must visit the official website of NTA to apply for the JEE Main entrance exam. For MTech admission,  Students need to apply for GATE. Further, students have to apply on the institute's official website for MBA admission. Moreover, the aspirant shall ensure that the application form is submitted within the prescribed due date.
2: IIIT Allahabad Cutoff List

After the application process, the counselling bodies release a course-wise cutoff list. The cutoff list indicates the minimum required score in the respective entrance exam for a candidate to become eligible for admission. Students with a score equal to or more than the cutoff marks can apply.
3: IIIT Allahabad Counselling

Students applying for a BTech course further have to go through JoSAA for seat allotment and, for MTech admission, CCMT conducts the counselling round. While the Students who apply for a PhD may have to go through an interview round.
4: IIIT Allahabad Admission Confirmation
After the selection rounds and counselling, seats are allotted to the eligible students. Selected students can further pay the required fee to confirm their seats.

faqs.question: What is the required percentile for admission in BTech at IIIT Allahabad?
faqs.answer: 90 is the required percentile needed to get a chance for admission in BTech at IIIT Allahabad. This percentile is great to get a seat at IIIT Allahabad. Moreover, a candidates need to be amongst the top 11,553 ranks. Please note that final selections are based on the cutoff of the respective academic year, category, and seat intake.

faqs.question: How can I take admission to BTech at IIIT Allahabad?
faqs.answer: To get admission to BTech course at IIIT Allahabad, candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The application process for admissions commences with the online registrations for JEE Main and ends with the exam results announced along with the merit list. The selected candidates are eligible for the process of document verification and seat allotment conducted by JoSAA or CSAB. Further, candidates selected during counselling process are allotted seats and branches

faqs.question: Can I get into IIIT Allahabad BTech course without JEE Main?
faqs.answer: No, there is no other way to get admission to BTech without qualifying for JEE Main. Candidates are required to visit the official website of NTA to apply for JEE Man entrance exam. Only the candidates with a valid JEE rank are eligible for admission. Further, JEE Main rank holders will be called for JoSAA Counselling process for the final seat allotment.

faqs.question: How much rank should I score to get IIIT Allahabad?

Later on, candidates are required to register for CCMT Counselling process. More details around IIIT Allahabad MTech admissions 2025 are as follows:

faqs.question: What are the M.Tech specialisations in IIIT Allahabad?
faqs.answer: The institute offers MTech courses in four specialisations, including Information Technology (IT), Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE), Bioinformatics, Data Science and Analytics. There are 10 sub-specialisations offered under the IT and ECE specialisations as well. The seat intake varied from one M.Tech specialisation to another.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for M.Tech at IIIT Allahabad?
faqs.answer: Candidates taking admission to an MTech programme shall have a valid BE/BTech degree in a relevant discipline with at least 60% aggregate (55% for SC/ST) from a recognised university. The candidates wanting to pursue M.Tech from IIITA need to take the GATE exam. Candidates with a valid GATE score are called for the CCMT Counselling rounds based on cutoff marks. Further, based on performance in the counselling round, seat allotment is carried out.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to the M.Tech course at IIIT Allahabad?
faqs.answer: No, direct admission is not available for the MTech course at IIIT Allahabad. The institute admits students based on a valid GATE entrance exam score, followed by the CCMT counselling process.

faqs.question: What is the fee for the IIIT Allahabad M.Tech course?
faqs.answer: The total fee sums up to INR 2.58 lakh. Note the fee is taken from unofficial sources and hence can vary.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in IIIT Allahabad for MBA?
faqs.answer: To get admission at IIIT Allahabad, students must have a valid score in CAT/ XAT/ CMAT/ MAT/ GMAT. The institute offers a two-year full-time MBA programme for which the final selection is based on students' performance in a Group Discussion and Personal Interview round.

faqs.question: How much CAT score is required for IIIT Allahabad?
faqs.answer: Candidates with at least 80 percentile can have a good chance of getting selected for an MBA at IIITA. However, the cutoff marks change every year and hence it can vary. The students who have appeared for other management exams such as XAT/CMAT/MAT as well can submit their best scores at the time of form filling.

faqs.answer: For BTech in Information Technology, the maximum JEE Main required cutoff rank was 6926 in the General category under the AI quota. Therefore, a cutoff rank below the rank mentioned here is considered to be a good rank for getting an IT branch at IIIT Allahabad. faqs.question: How to prepare for admission to IIIT Allahabad?
faqs.answer: The right approach and a preparation plan for admission to BTech at IIIT Allahabad is all that is needed to ace JEE Main. While students who are serious about getting into an IIIT start preparing from Class 11, a prep strategy for the exam is mentioned below:Choose the reference books wiselySolve as many Mock Tests as possible.Shiksha.com is providingFREEDownloadable JEE Main Mock Test Paper (with Solutions).Revise as much as possibleCross-checksection-wise weightage & syllabus for all subjects covered in JEE MainSolve previous year’sJEE question papersthere are high chances of getting questions from thereTo secure admission into prestigious institutions such as the IITs, NITs and IIITs, it is essential for the aspirants to have a strong command on the material taught in their class 11 and class 12. Shiksha is offering free NCERT questions and solutions to aid JEE candidates in excelling in these classes. To access the NCERT solutions, click on the below links:NCERT Class 11 Physics So

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

placement_report.college_name: IIIT Allahabad Placement 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: IIIT Allahabad Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The highest package offered during IIIT Allahabad placement 2025 stood at INR 120 LPA . Further, the placement rate recorded for BTech and PG programs in 2025 was 97.91% and 95.3%, respectively. A total of 195 companies visited the campus during the placement drive 2025. The highest package offered to BTech and PG (MTech / MBA) batch 2025 was INR 120 LPA and INR 45 LPA, respectively. The average package to BTech and MTech students was INR 33 LPA and INR 16.8 LPA, respectively.

Top companies from various sectors such as E-Commerce, Finance, IT visit the campus every year. In recent past, leading companies such as Capgemini, Deloitte, Accenture and Goldman Sachs have visited the campus. The Institute has a dedicated Training and Placement cell that facilitates all type of placement-related activities. IIITA also provides internships to BTech students. The internship duration is between 4 and 6 months.
Download: IIIT Allahabad Placement Brochure 2025-26
