description: IIIT Allahabad cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIIT Allahabad JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last 13 years of IIIT Allahabad JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIIT Allahabad JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. For other core branch, such as ECE, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission was 9639, for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the IIIT Allahabad B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 3632 and 9639 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 3632 and 6926, B.Tech. in Information Technology (Business Informatics) and B.Tech. in Information Technology were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at IIIT Allahabad. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at IIIT Allahabad to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of IIIT Allahabad. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Bioinformatics + Ph.D. and M.Tech.+Ph.D in IT with specialization in Machine Learning, Robotics and Human Computer Interaction Group with last round cutoff scores of 702 and 648, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 358 and 702. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 304 and 564 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at IIIT Allahabad - Indian Institute of Information Technology. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

Apart from JEE Main, IIIT Allahabad also offers admission to BTech through DASA UG. Going as per last year data, the Round 1 closing ranks for IIIT Allahabad cutoff 2022 for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was 893 for the General category candidates belonging to All India Quota seats. Tabulated below are the year-wise ranks for IIIT Allahabad Cutoff 2023 for BTech admissions through DASA UG:

Considering the last round of IIIT Allahabad CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Bioinformatics + Ph.D. and Machine Learning, Robotics and Human Computer Interaction Group, witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branches such as Software and Data Engineering and Human Computer Interaction had comparatively relaxed cutoff scores for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

highlights.description: One of India’s top institutes is IIIT Allahabad. As per the NIRF Ranking 2025, the rank of the institute is #101-150 under the category Engineering. At the international level, QS World Rankings 2025 has ranked the institute at #1401+ position. IIIT Allahabad is top ranked by multiple national & international ranking bodies for its academic offerings and renowned faculty. Its faculty has a proven track record of doing great research. The article mentioned below covers all the necessary details you need if you're interested in the IIIT Allahabad rankings.

nirf.description:
IIIT Allahabad has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, IIIT Allahabad fell 14 ranks to #101 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the IIIT Allahabad latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:
Read less

qs_world.description:
IIIT Allahabad has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Top Global Universities' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2026, IIIT Allahabad's rank is #1401, the same as last year's rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Asia', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, IIIT Allahabad climbed 72 ranks to #509 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown an increasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, IIIT Allahabad climbed 40 ranks to #132 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.

hostel.description: Hostels are available with Air-conditioned mess and common room facilities along with an experienced caretaker round the clock for any emergency situations. All kinds of recreational facilities including basketball, badminton court, table tennis and gymnasium have been provided in both the hostels. Night canteens within both the boys and girls hostel premises facilitate the dietary requirements of the students after the normal dining hours.

library.description: The library has a capacity to accommodate up to 150 students at a time, rich repository of more than 50000 books, 2000 CDs equipped with drivers, online resources, and journals, electronic library, E-media section of the library has 50 computer systems and is largely meant for facilitating e-reading amongst the students and also subscribed to a large number of online resources such as journals and other publications such as IEEE, Emerald Insight, ACM, Springer, Science Direct among many others

reviews.review_heading: Good college, with great atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: It's compulsory to opt for hostel. And according to every student, it's good to be part of hostel. The hostel rooms are well furnished with proper ventilation and lighting. Classrooms are world class, all facilities are available. Library is open 24 hours. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. There are different grounds for different sports.

reviews.review_heading: Table of Indian Institute of Information Technology Allahabad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good enough. The campus is big enough, and there are various beautiful places such as the rock garden, the pavilion, the cafeteria, etc. Also, the academic buildings are good enough. But there can be some improvements in hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIIT Allahabad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college, Indian Institute of Information and Technology Allahabad (Prayagraj), is very good, I think, because it has its own mess, which is very hygienic and well maintained, and it also has its own canteen that provides a variety of foods.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIIT Allahabad College.
reviews.review_text: The hostel, along with the mess, runs in a sufficient manner. Classrooms have Wi-Fi, and the LAN can be accessed from the hostel rooms. Basically, you are able to get everything that you want on the university grounds. The classrooms are airy and equipped with projectors. There is a big stadium for cricket and football, apart from an indoor stadium for badminton.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at IIIT as an ECE student.
reviews.review_text: The campus is enough for the graduates as it is not very crowded. All sports are available indoors and outdoors. However, the maintenance of some sports facilities lags, like the basketball court, badminton, etc. Labs are good, fully centralized. A.C. Timings for labs are until 8 p.m., and libraries are open until 11 p.m. The library has a good collection of books relevant to your courses. Classrooms are decent, not much to say, but on the good side.

reviews.review_heading: Good seniors. Satisfactory faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is poor, but LAN and Ethernet services are good. Computer Labs are generally open 24/7. The library has timings from 8:00 AM to 12:00 AM. Classes are usually for all batches and start from 9:50 AM and end at 6:30 PM. There are also breaks of 2 hours and 1:30 hours. Hostels are fine, better than many other institutions. The quality of food is satisfactory. Medical staff are there for certain timings, but there are a few issues during nighttime. There is a SAC where students generally play s...

reviews.review_heading: Great faculty, facilities - IIIT Allahabad.
reviews.review_text: IIIT ALLAHABAD B.Tech - Electronics and Communication has lecture halls/classrooms and labs that have air conditioning. The hostel is also well managed, clean, and equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi. The mess food is also decent and good. The canteen food is very good and has a lot of variety.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and decent college life.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, library, and labs are good and have Wi-Fi and air conditioning. Wi-Fi signals are not that good, and there is a network problem on campus. Hostels are decent, but water quality is bad and have internet problems; you have to connect LAN for a good internet connection.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and campus, but teaching needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: Department has Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms. But some labs do not have new equipment. Library is good with many books. Hostel rooms okay but are not always very clean. Mess food is normal, sometimes bad. Canteen is better. Medical facility is there, but not very fast. Sports ground is good.

reviews.review_heading: IIIT Allahabad - Where code meets culture.
reviews.review_text: Academic wing is fully air-conditioned with lab and classroom equipped with modern facilities with 24X7 access to Wi-Fi services. There is one central library where you could find large number of books by almost every writer and research papers by researchers.

reviews.review_heading: The truth and nothing else.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, fests and events happen a lot, the hostel and college campus both have free Wi-Fi, there's a good library, and subscriptions to some paid journals. The course is also updated to the latest industry standards, and proper lab classes are organised for practical implications.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best B.Tech college in India.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the hostel are very poor, and the quality of food is getting worse day by day. Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are good but can be improved. Medical facilities are bad, but there are qualified doctors. There is only limited time for consultation, and no proper medicine is available.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing institute with more than 90% placements every year.
reviews.review_text: They provide an internet LAN, a table, a lamp, and a cupboard with enough space for 2 people. Mess is nice at first but then they diluted it and they are serving bad food now. Mess fee is hit or miss. Mess vendors are not good as mess food is sometimes pathetic and does not have very good quality food, it is still edible. On the other hand, the breakfast is very nice. I am very much satisfied.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements and wonderful infrastructure, but too hectic academics.
reviews.review_text: There are top-class facilities available for my course, such as a computer lab and library. The campus includes smart classrooms, a smart library, and Wi-Fi is available on the entire campus. The quality of the hostel is not that good, it has decent rooms with well-ventilation. You can bring your cooler. The quality of the food is not good, but it works for me. There are almost all games played like lawn tennis, squash, snooker, cricket, football, table tennis, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Placements & infrastructure are good but hostels can be improved. In short, it is average.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the hostel are very poor, and the quality of food is getting worse day by day. Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are good but can be improved. Medical facilities are bad, with unqualified doctors. There is only limited time for consultation, and no proper medicine is available.

Placement is very good and comparable to any of the old IITs and top NITs, such as Surathkal Trichy and Warangal CSE.

faqs.question: How much rank should I score to get IIIT Allahabad?
Does IIT Goa provide 100% placements?
Are the placements for M.Tech at IIT Goa good?
What is the average package offered to the BTech EE branch during the recent IIT Goa placements?

college_info.intro:
IIT Goa popular programmes are BTech and MTech. BTech students are placed in top companies such as Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Intel, Goldman Sachs, and others. Engineering students are taught to design, develop, and test various software applications. BTech and MTech students can work as Civil Engineers, Chemical Engineers, Electrical Engineers, and others.
MTech students can plan their careers and can become Biomedical Engineers, System Engineers, and others. Overall, the college is one of the best IITs present in India. After studying at this IIT, students can expect an average package of INR 15.92 LPA (BTech) and INR 11.72 LPA (MTech). The major highlights of IIT Goa are tabulated below:
For more information about IIT Goa check out the below video:

placements.overview:
The placement rate recorded during IIT Goa placement 2025 for BTech and MTech programs stood at 93.9% and 80%, respectively. 166 companies visited the campus in 2025. Further, 83% students secured 6-month internships this year. Some of the top recruiters were Intel, DE Shaw & Co, Google, TCS and Accenture. The average and median package offered to BTech students in 2025 was INR 19.15 LPA and INR 12.67 LPA. For the MTech course, the average and median package was INR 11.13 LPA and INR 10 LPA.

The overall and course-wise IIT Goa average package offered between 2022 and 2024 placements are presented below:

faqs.answer: A:    The IIT Goa highest package offered during the 2023 placement drive stood at INR 60 LPA. Earlier, the IIT Goa highest package offered to the batch 2022 was INR 1.12 crore per annum. Thus a drop of over 46% in the IIT Goa highest package was observed in 2023 when compared with 2022. review_content.Placements: Almost 97-99% of students get placed. The highest package is 60 LPA and the average package is 17 LPA. Almost all of them got top companies like Amazon, Google, Infosys, Microsoft. The lowest package offered is 6 LPA. Few people got internships abroad.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available 24/7, labs are air-conditioned, classrooms also have AC. I can't say that they are the best classes but they have the required amenities. review_summary.college_name: IIT Goa Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really satisfied because 2023 placements are very good.

content.Placements: There are 45 students in my course. The highest package offered by my college in the past year was 1.2 crore. The average package offered by my college for placements is around 24 lacs. The recruiting companies for my course are Texas Instruments, Google, Microsoft, etc.
content.Infrastructure: For my course in my college, there are many facilities, like an electrical workshop, a welding workshop, and also an Ideas room. The hostel was very nice; it looked like a hotel. There are many medical facilities available in my college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty and good placements in past years.

content.Placements: 34 students were placed in my course. The highest package of IITGOA was INR 60 LPA, the average package was INR 20 LPA and the lowest package was INR 7 LPA. Google, Amazon, etc. companies were offering jobs. 85% of the students got internships from my course.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi facility was available for 24 hours. And the teacher-student interaction was good. Also, the teachers were very supportive. The mess food was good, with different varieties and the medical facilities were also too good. They provide an ambulance for emergencies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of IIT Goa - Indian Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: Almost 97-99% of students get placed. The highest package is 60 LPA and the average package is 17 LPA. Almost all of them got top companies like Amazon, Google, Infosys, Microsoft. The lowest package offered is 6 LPA. Few people got internships abroad.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available 24/7, labs are air-conditioned, classrooms also have AC. I can't say that they are the best classes but they have the required amenities. Hostels are quite good, they have most facilities compared to remaining IITs. Mess food is not so bad, not so good. Sports equipment is completely available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A review of a student at IIT Goa.

content.Placements: Percentage of B.Tech students placed at IIT Goa in 2023 was 99%. In B.Tech 2023 placements, the highest package offered was INR 60 LPA and average package offered was INR 17.19 LPA. In 2023, Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Intel, Goldman sachs are the top recruiters at IIT Goa.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi availability in the campus and hostel as well. Labs, Classrooms, Library are quite good. There are no issues with facilities provided in the hostel. The mess food is good which follows a menu. There is a canteen near the mess and there are also medical facilities, sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and campus life.

content.Placements: Our college has the highest placement percentage, i.e., 98% to 99%. The highest package received by a student here was around INR 1.12 crore, and the average package is INR 18 LPA, which is very good for any engineering college. The companies that come here are very well known and large, like Google, Microsoft, Accenture, Amazon and around 200 other companies.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure here would be described as average, but there are enough for a good time in the hostel; the classrooms and library are good for a medium number of people as the strength of the college is low; however, the campus and hostel are temporary considering there will be discussions for the building of a permanent campus soon; sports and games facilities are okay for average students. There are all major sports playgrounds in the hostel itself, except for cricket and football.

admission_overview.college_name: IIT Goa Course Admissions 2025 (Open): Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Selection

admission_overview.title: IIT Goa Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: IIT Goa admissions 2025 based on entrance exam scores of the candidates. The institute accepts JEE Advanced scores for admission to its flagship BTech programme. Aspirants, however, are also required to qualify JEE Main exam before appearing for JEE Advanced. Candidates seeking IIT Goa MTech admission must have a valid score in GATE while PhD admission is based on a written exam and interview. IIT Goa is raising the bar of quality education year by year since its inception in 2016. The institute offers BTech, MTech and PhD programmes under multiple specialisations and is one of the youngest IITs mentored by IIT Bombay. Read on to learn more about IIT Goa admission:

eligibility_selection.title: IIT Goa Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Admission 2025 at IIT Goa is completely entrance-based. Students are selected based on different national-level entrance exams like JEE Main, JEE Advanced, GATE, UGC NET, etc. Indian Institute of Technology (IIT Goa) offers BTech, MTech, and PhD degrees in the field of Engineering and Technology admission to these courses is completely an online process. The below table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria for IIT Goa courses: Class 12 with a minimum of 75% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics

faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete a master's degree in Engineering/Technology or equivalent degree with 60% aggregate or CPI 6/10 or equivalent. (55% aggregate or CPI 5.5/10 or equivalent for SC/ST) to apply for IIT Goa PhD programme. Candidates who have completed their bachelor's degree or equivalent degree in Engineering/ Technology with a minimum of 70% aggregate or CPI 7 (65% aggregate or 6.5 CPI for SC/ ST candidates) can also apply.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for PhD at IIT Goa?

faqs.answer: Admission to BTech at IIT Goa is JEE Advanced based. Candidates seeking admission to BTech cannot get admission to any IIT with only the scores of JEE Main. JEE Advanced followed by JEE Main is the complete requirement. After the selection exams are over, JoSAA Counselling is conducted for seat allotment of BTech courses. Candidates who are eligible to get a seat need to pay the admission fee to confirm their admission to the shortlisted course.
faqs.question: Can I get into IIT Goa for BTech only on the basis of JEE Main score?

faqs.answer: IIIT Allahabad accpets JEE Main score for admission to the BTech courses. As per the IIIT Allahabad cutoff 2023, the Last Round closing rank for BTech ranged between 5924 and 9558, among which Information Technology was the most competitive specialisation. The Round 1 closing rank for BTech ranged between 4817 and 8428 for BTech. So, considering the previous year Round 1 and the Last Round closing ranks, candidates seeking admission to IIIT Allahabad must secure a rank over and above 4800 and 9600 for the General ALL India category candidates. Candidates can refer to the table given below to check out the 2023 Last Round closing ranks for IIIT Allahabad to get an idea of the ranks required for all the BTech courses offered at this institute: CourseRound 1Last Round B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering84289558B.Tech. in Information Technology48175924B.Tech. in Information Technology (Business Informatics)51626587

paragraphs: IIT Goa admissionis a multi-step process that students need to follow to get into the institute. Starting with the application, students are required to go through the course-specific entrance exam, followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). After the selection rounds are over, candidates are required to go through the exam-specific counselling process for final seat allotment. A step-by-step process of admission is as follows:
Step 1: IIT Goa Application Process 2025
Students interested in getting into IIT Goa must submit the online application form for course-specific entrance exam or college depending on the course they wish to get into.
Step 2: IIT Goa Selection Criteria & Release of Merit List

After the applications are submitted, students are required to go through the course-specific entrance exam, followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). Candidates must score equal or aboveIIT Goa cutoffin the accepted entrance exam for admission. After the selection rounds are over, they are required to go through the course-wise counselling process for final seat allotment. For PhD, merit lists are released on the official website (with the names of the shortlisted students) of the institute.
Step 3: IIT Goa Admission Confirmation
Further, aspirants need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

The different components included inIIT Goa feesare tuition fees, security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, etc. Aspirants need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute. IIT is known to offer high-placement packages. The following table showcasesIIT Goa course feesalong with the average package for top courses:
Tuition Fee (Investment)
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

IIT Goa seat intake differs with the specialisations. Aspirants are offered seats in BTech courses based on JEE Advanced score. The seats in BTech programme is offered through JoSAA Counselling. The seats for MTech are filled based on the GATE score of the candidates. Below is course-wiseIIT Goa seats:

placement_report.college_name: IIT Goa Placements 2025: Average Package, Highest Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: IIT Goa Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The placement rate recorded during IIT Goa placement 2025 for BTech and MTech programs stood at 93.9% and 80%, respectively. 166 companies visited the campus in 2025. Further, 83% students secured 6-month internships this year. Some of the top recruiters were Intel, DE Shaw & Co, Google , TCS and Accenture. The average and median package offered to BTech students in 2025 was INR 19.15 LPA and INR 12.67 LPA. For the MTech course, the average and median package was INR 11.13 LPA and INR 10 LPA.

90.60% placement rate was recorded in 2024 . The average and median package offered during IIT Goa placements 2024 was INR 15.41 LPA and INR 11.5 LPA . 161 recruiters visited and selected 116 students of the BTech and MTech batch . Out of the total 116 students placed, 98 were from the BTech and 18 from the MTech batch 2024. The average package offered to BTech and MTech students in 2024 was INR 15.92 LPA and INR 11.72 LPA .

description: IIT Goa cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to BTech, MSc, MTech, and other courses. Students can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIT Goa JEE Advanced cutoff 2025, along with other exams for different courses, rounds, categories, etc. Further details regarding the latest exam events are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last nine years of IIT Goa JEE Advanced cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIT Goa cutoff 2026 is expected to be released tentatively in the month of June 2026. In the meantime, candidates preparing for JEE Advanced can refer to the table below to view the cutoff ranks for the last year's first and last rounds for admission to B.Tech. and other courses. During the IIT Goa JEE Advanced cutoff 2025 in the last round, the highest cutoff rank reached 13451 under the B.E. / B.Tech course for the General AI category students. With a lowest last round cutoff rank of 6242, B.T

IIT Goa B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 6242 and 13451, wherein the most sought-after specialisation for admission was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering with the lowest JEE Advanced cutoff rank. On the contrary, the easy-to-grab specialisation was B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing Engineering, followed by B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering, with lenient JEE Advanced cutoff ranks of 7932 and 10095, respectively, in the General AI category.

JEE Advanced is the accepted exam for admission to the Engineering course, followed by the JoSAA counselling process for all the IITs, including IIT Goa. Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view all the important JEE Advanced 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling was conducted in multiple rounds for admission to the IITs, NITs, IIITs, and GFTIs. Candidates with a valid JEE Advanced 2025 score can participate in JoSAA for BTech admission at IITs. Conducted by the Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA), in 2025, a total of six seat allotment rounds were released for admission. Aspirants preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated round and year-wise JEE Advanced cutoff lists for IIT Goa to un

IIT Goa cut off 2025 was released for different specialisations and categories. Through this section, you can do a comparative analysis of different specialisations and colleges available based on JoSAA last-round closing ranks. Use provided filters to choose various parameters, such as location, gender, categories, etc, for comparative analysis.

reviews.review_heading: Really satisfied because 2023 placements are very good.
reviews.review_text: For my course in my college, there are many facilities, like an electrical workshop, a welding workshop, and also an Ideas room. The hostel was very nice; it looked like a hotel. There are many medical facilities available in my college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and good placements in past years.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility was available for 24 hours. And the teacher-student interaction was good. Also, the teachers were very supportive. The mess food was good, with different varieties and the medical facilities were also too good. They provide an ambulance for emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIT Goa - Indian Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available 24/7, labs are air-conditioned, classrooms also have AC. I can't say that they are the best classes but they have the required amenities. Hostels are quite good, they have most facilities compared to remaining IITs. Mess food is not so bad, not so good. Sports equipment is completely available.

reviews.review_heading: A review of a student at IIT Goa.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi availability in the campus and hostel as well. Labs, Classrooms, Library are quite good. There are no issues with facilities provided in the hostel. The mess food is good which follows a menu. There is a canteen near the mess and there are also medical facilities, sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure here would be described as average, but there are enough for a good time in the hostel; the classrooms and library are good for a medium number of people as the strength of the college is low; however, the campus and hostel are temporary considering there will be discussions for the building of a permanent campus soon; sports and games facilities are okay for average students. There are all major sports playgrounds in the hostel itself, except for cricket and football.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied with My College.
reviews.review_text: Internet services are good. We have wifis as well as Lanes. We have one library where wide range of books are available. We have excess of classrooms. We have labs for different departments. Our Hostels have good water facility. Proper security. Food available in the mess is good for health as well as Tasty. Food available in canteen is not that expensive. It is affordable. Tasty. We have dispensery which has many of the facilities. Many of the sports ar played here like cricket, Foot ball, bask...

reviews.review_heading: Best government college. Less fees and great return. Reputed institute.
reviews.review_text: We don't have our own campus, but a GC campus. We reside on the GC campus. We have only five lecture halls and a small library made in a bungalow. About medical and Wi-Fi, it's very good, and the mess food is the same as others; it's not very bad or top-notch.

reviews.review_heading: The Journey of Learning at IIT GOA.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the mechanical engineering department includes various labs like the chemistry lab, the physics lab, etc. As per the hostel facilities, IIT Goa has well-equipped hostel facilities for students. There are separate hostel blocks for male and female students. All rooms in the block are double occupancy, with provisions for study tables, beds, etc.

reviews.review_heading: IIT Goa-Inside Talk by a student.
reviews.review_text: Since we do not have a permanent campus, we are based on the campus of GEC college. But apart from that, we do have our own hostel block which has all the facilities a student needs. Clean rooms with cleaning room service. Very fast Wi-Fi in hostels.

reviews.review_heading: IIT Goa Inside Out: Through a students view.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms have state-of-art facilities. Each class has digital teaching equipments required for teaching technical subjects of course. Also the classes are comfortable with ACs installed in each class. Even though the college is still situated in its temporary campus the library has all the books required for all the subjects. The institute also provides access to few digital books too. The Hostels are also clean, well-facilitated. Other required facilities like Clinic, stores, food are...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Indian Institute of Technology, Goa.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is very good. All rooms are very good and one room is allotted for two boys and the same for girls. All classrooms and the library are good. Our campus is fully enabled with Wi-Fi. Mess is very good and it serves food 4 times a day.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good placements and hostel.
reviews.review_text:
Sports equipment is great. The food is nice. No permanent campus yet. Hostel is small but awesome. Labs and classrooms are excellent. Library has a good collection of books and magazines. Medical facilities are excellent
Canteen is very far from hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure but placements are improving year by year.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is too small but good as we don't have our own campus. The classrooms are good but there will be no air-conditioner but in labs, we have an air-conditioner. The library present is also small but its very useful. Wi-Fi is available on campus with a good speed but there occurs some issues during power cuts. Hostel rooms are good and the quality of food can be rated 3.5/5. There is also a canteen near which is of GECs. The medical facility is good. They are very ca...

reviews.review_heading: Poor infrastructure of the temporary campus, excellent faculty, internships, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus has poor Infrastructure as there is no permanent campus yet. Very less strength and a small hostel are available. There are frequent power cuts and Wi-Fi issues. The food quality is not bad and canteen is far from the hostel but excellent medical facilities. Sports and gaming facilities are quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Compared to all 3rd generation IITs, our college is really good.
reviews.review_text: High-speed Wi-Fi facility is available, and the library has many books. The mess food is good to eat, unlike what we hear from others that the hostel food is not so good. Sports facilities like badminton, table tennis, lawn tennis, basketball, cricket, and football are available.

college_info.intro:
Karunya University popular programmes are MBA, BTech, & MSc. The Karunya University MBA students are placed in top organisations like Wipro, Amazon, EY, KPMG, & others. The MBA students can use the facilities available at central library which is well equipped with modern facilities & various resources in the form of CD-ROM, On-line databases, e-journals, e-books, audio video cassettes, books, journals, project reports etc. Karunya University has experienced faculty members who are PhD, diploma, & degree holders. Through the popular programmes, the university tries to bridge the gap btw the theory & practice through industrial visits, internships, projects, & immersion programmes that provides the students with a firsthand experience of the corporate world.

review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is available 24 hours with high-speed internet at the college. Classrooms are good and neat. Labs have good equipment. Library has all the books. Hostel facilities are available at the college. Mess in the canteen. Medical facilities are good.

review_content.Infrastructure: Biotechnology department has well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, and classrooms are well-lit and sufficient to accommodate atleast 80 students at a time. overview_faqs.question: What is the MBA fee at Karunya University?
overview_faqs.answer: The total fee of MBA ranges between 1.4 L - 6.5 L. The fee excludes exam fee, professional development and placement training fees. The total fee of MBA, includes a one-time admission fee of 10 K. Candidates are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Candidates will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. Candidates can pay the application fee via any of the online payment modes.

overview_faqs.question: Is Karunya University approved by UGC?
overview_faqs.answer: Karunya University is a private deemed-to-be university that is approved by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and is also approved by the AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education)

overview_faqs.question: Is Karunya University a good university?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Karunya is a good university. Karunya University has been ranked at the 1401-1500 position by the QS Sustainability Ranking 2026, 694 by the QS Asian University Rankings 2026, and 212 by the QS Asian University Rankings - Southern Asia 2026. Karunya University provides undergraduate, PG, & PhD programmes to students.

review_summary.college_name: Karunya University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of Karunya Institute of Technology .

content.Placements: There were lot of companies which came for placement. Few of them are Zifo, Amazon, Infosys, Capegemini, Cognizant, TCS, and TNQ technologies. I personally got placed in TNQ Technologies and worked for a year there. While working in TNQ Technologies, my interest towards clinical research propelled more, and now I'm working in a Pharma company. More than half my batch mates got placed.
content.Infrastructure: The curriculum aligns with current industry requirements and academic trends. Courses like biopharmaceutical technology, genetics, and clinical database is what had my interest when I joined my UG. The curriculum forces you to think outside the classroom and equips you well when you step outside for job. Hostel was my home away from home. The beauty of the campus and hostel heals you. Food also you can choose among north, south, or continental. I don;t think any other college has this great residential accommodation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because of the faculty, good placements in 2024, and the infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Nearly 80% of students are placed in our courses. The highest package is 20 LPA, the lowest package is 4 LPA, and the average package is 8.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Amazon, Cognizant, Hexaware, Deltax, etc. 50% of students got internships in our course through respective interviews.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided in our college include Wi-Fi, classrooms, a library, a canteen, a CAD lab, and a bookshop. The facilities in our hostel include Wi-Fi, CCTV, and food. The food in the canteen is nice, with reasonable prices and good quality. Medical facilities are also available on our college campus. In the hostel, we have different messes according to the regions from where students come, such as Andhra mess, Kerala mess, North mess, etc.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Had a great experience in college.

content.Placements: Highest salary package offered is 13 LPA, and lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. Almost 75% of students got placed. Top recruiting companies are Accenture, TCS, and Microsoft. Around 65% of students got an internship. Top recruiting companies are web-developed and software-developed.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is available 24 hours with high-speed internet at the college. Classrooms are good and neat. Labs have good equipment. Library has all the books. Hostel facilities are available at the college. Mess in the canteen. Medical facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology (Genome Engineering and Technology) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Decent infrastructure, moderately good placements, scope for exposure, and ranks 29th in India.

content.Placements: Around 60-70% of students got placed from my course. The highest package offered is 6 LPA, and the lowest starts from 2.5 LPA. Recruiters included Johnson & Johnson, Biocon, Syngene, and others. Roles offered are assistant researcher/analyst/QA, and WC department roles.
content.Infrastructure: Biotechnology department has well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, and classrooms are well-lit and sufficient to accommodate atleast 80 students at a time. We have a central library as well. Mess food is average. Canteen food is better. Medical facilities like Seesha Hospital are active 24X7, and wide range of sports are conducted like volleyball or throwball.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Karunya University review.

content.Placements: Our college provides good placements for the students. At the beginning of the final year, the college provides placement training to prepare the students for placements. Most of the students have been placed in companies that provide placement packages of around 7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: College has really great infrastructure, and the labs in the biotechnology department are well-equipped. The college is situated near a beautiful valley, which provides a good climate. The hostels are separate for each year, thus reducing the chances of ragging.

admission_overview.description: Karunya University admission 2026 is open. Karunya Institute of Technology and Sciences (Deemed-To-Be University) admission is both merit and entrance-based. The university offers nine courses across multiple specialisations through four schools at UG, PG, and doctoral levels. Karunya Institute of Technology and Science conducts its entrance exam- KEE for BTech and BSc Agriculture admission. Karunya University offers various courses in four streams Engineering, Management, Science, and Agriculture. Candidates can apply for admission to their course of choice in online mode through the official website.

paragraphs: For admission to Karunya Institute of Technology and Sciences (Deemed-To-Be University), candidates must complete the entire admission process of the University.Karunya University course admissionsprocess includes the Karunya Entrance Examination, application process, selection process, and Counselling & Admission Confirmation. Find the detailed admission process for the academic year 2026:
Step 1: Karunya University Entrance Exams

Karunya Institute of Technology and Science conducts entrance exams, theKarunya Entrance Examination (KEE)for shortlisting BTech course. Further, for MBA shortlisting the university conductsKarnataka Management Aptitude Test (KMAT)
Step 2: Karunya University Application Process 2026
Candidates must apply at the official website.
Step 3: Karunya University Selection Process 2026

Admission to some courses is entrance-based and some is merit-based. The university conducts KEE for shortlisting aspirants for BSc (Hons) Agriculture and BTech courses. MBA candidates are shortlisted based on the KMAT exam. And for other courses admission is merit-based as per the last qualifying exam.
Step 4: Karunya University Counselling & Admission Confirmation
After completion of the selection rounds, candidates need to come for counselling and document verification. Selected candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their admission.

Whereas, graduation is required for PG courses. Admission to Karunya Institute of Technology and Sciences courses is based on entrance exam or merit in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for B.Sc. Agriculture at Karunya university Coimbatore?
faqs.answer: For Karunya university admissions, candidates should have passed Class 12 with Physics Chemistry and Mathematics or PCB or PCMB or Agriculture with at least 50% aggregate is required to apply for the B.Sc. (Hons) course. Candidates who have passed Class 12 or equivalent under vocational stream and studied Biology and Agricultural Practices as Vocational Subjects including theory and practical with 50% aggregate can also apply. The admission process include Karunya Entrance Exam KEE + Merit in Class 12th.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to B.Tech course at Karunya University?
faqs.answer: Karunya University BTech is a four-year course divided into eight semesters. Karunya University offers BTech courses through the School of Engineering & Technology. Karunya University BTech courses offer more than 30 specialisation in the four-year engineering programme. Karunya University BTech admission is based on KEE/TNEA. The basic eligibility criteria for enrolling into BTech at Karunya University is a candidate must complete Class 12 or equivalent examination with at least 60% aggregate in Physics and Mathematics

faqs.question: What is the MBA fee at Karunya University?
faqs.answer: The total fee of MBA ranges between 1.4 L - 6.5 L. The fee excludes exam fee, professional development and placement training fees. The total fee of MBA, includes a one-time admission fee of 10 K. Candidates are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Candidates will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. Candidates can pay the application fee via any of the online payment modes.

highlights.description: Karunya University has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #151-200 in the Overall category, #101-150 under University, and #101-150 under Engineering by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around Karunya University rankings:

rankings.highlight: 19th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025
25th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025
13th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, Karunya University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is to be noted that the Karunya University's rankings in 'Overall' category have demonstrated stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, Karunya University's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'University' category have shown a stable trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Karunya University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The 'Engineering' category rankings of the institute have shown a stable trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Karunya University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
Karunya University has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Karunya University fell 13 ranks to #694 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Karunya University's rank is #212, the same as last year's rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.

hostel.description: The University provides 15 Separate hostels for Boys and Girls With Single seater room, Double seater room and Four seater room with 16 spacious and separate dining halls, Internet facility, Reading room, Gym, ATM facility, Sports facility and many more.

library.description:
The Central library opens from 8.00 AM to 11.00 PM on weekdays, 8.00 AM to 5.30 PM on Saturday and closed on Sunday. It is well equipped with 1,20,654 books, modern facilities, and resources in the form of CD-ROM, on-line databases, e-journals, e-books, audio video cassettes, books, journals, project reports. Apart from this, every department has its own department library.
These are the following e-resources: Science direct- 883, Springer-586, EBSC0-800, Emerald- 101,  IEEE-ASPP161, Scopus more than 10,000 abstracts, Springer e-books-932 and Proquest ebooks - 143548.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Karunya Institute of Technology .
reviews.review_text: The curriculum aligns with current industry requirements and academic trends. Courses like biopharmaceutical technology, genetics, and clinical database is what had my interest when I joined my UG. The curriculum forces you to think outside the classroom and equips you well when you step outside for job. Hostel was my home away from home. The beauty of the campus and hostel heals you. Food also you can choose among north, south, or continental. I don;t think any other college has this great resi...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the faculty, good placements in 2024, and the infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided in our college include Wi-Fi, classrooms, a library, a canteen, a CAD lab, and a bookshop. The facilities in our hostel include Wi-Fi, CCTV, and food. The food in the canteen is nice, with reasonable prices and good quality. Medical facilities are also available on our college campus. In the hostel, we have different messes according to the regions from where students come, such as Andhra mess, Kerala mess, North mess, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Had a great experience in college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available 24 hours with high-speed internet at the college. Classrooms are good and neat. Labs have good equipment. Library has all the books. Hostel facilities are available at the college. Mess in the canteen. Medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Decent infrastructure, moderately good placements, scope for exposure, and ranks 29th in India.
reviews.review_text: Biotechnology department has well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, and classrooms are well-lit and sufficient to accommodate atleast 80 students at a time. We have a central library as well. Mess food is average. Canteen food is better. Medical facilities like Seesha Hospital are active 24X7, and wide range of sports are conducted like volleyball or throwball.

reviews.review_heading: Karunya University review.
reviews.review_text: College has really great infrastructure, and the labs in the biotechnology department are well-equipped. The college is situated near a beautiful valley, which provides a good climate. The hostels are separate for each year, thus reducing the chances of ragging.

reviews.review_heading: A peaceful life in college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in hostel and in college are very good. College facilities are upgraded to highest facility, and hostel facilities are very clean and safe. You can get everything in the hostel. Labs are all very tech, and the hospital is nearby for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The college was nice and has a good environment. The infrastructure was good. Classrooms are neat. The labs are well-equipped with air conditioning. The Wi-Fi facility is available. The books are available in the library. The campus provides a hotel facility for both boys and girls. The canteen is also available.

reviews.review_heading: A new life with Karunya University.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are available in the department, which are essential for the course. The department itself also has a library. The whole campus has an internet connection provided by the university. Smart boards are available, which help in conducting presentations, and seminar halls are available for hosting seminars.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Karunya School of Management, Karunya Institute of Technology and SciencesReviewed on 8 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: In my college, a scholarship is provided in accordance with government rules.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure, but there are some downsides, like Wi-Fi with poor internet service. There are also classrooms, but it is not furnished. But they provide a library, where we can get books on the subject. Hotel facilities are not very good. The mess has been cleaned up, but the quality of the food is so bad that we can't eat it. Sports and cultural events are held.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Karunya School of Management, Karunya Institute of Technology and SciencesReviewed on 27 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best university for the MBA course.
reviews.review_text: The college boasts a top-notch campus with all the amenities, including digital textbooks, a library, and high-speed internet in classes. We have numerous sports fields and a hospital for medical services. Both the hostels and the canteen food are excellent and delicious. Additionally, hostel rooms are completely secured.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Karunya.
reviews.review_text: The course is good. The facility is nice. The campus is good. Hostel is good. Infrastructure, food, safety, gym facilities, neat washrooms, xerox shops, cafes, supermarket, and all available inside the compound including the salon. So there is no need to go outside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Karunya University is a well-structured campus with holistic development opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The course curriculum is well-structured and has real-world applications. The infrastructure includes well-facilitated labs to conduct projects and modern teaching techniques. Facilities provided on campus are great, with various options in each sector.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with good teachers, good building, and the safety they provide.
reviews.review_text: Here hostel is well-cleaned and neat with a caretaker to take care of the students inside the hostel campus has many stores from a beauty parlor to a supermarket, many food courts, a tailoring shop beauty store, etc. This makes students not go outside the hostel campus, there is a playground in hostel campus and a hospital of the institution. Classrooms are digitalized with projectors and Wi-Fi connection, and all the labs and libraries are infrastructure with AC.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure is there. We have Wi-Fi facility for students and staffs. Classes, labs, and library are excellent. All classes have smart boards. All lab equipments are very good. Our library is awesome, and has full of AC available.

reviews.review_heading: Really good and friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is awesome with Wi-Fi connections everywhere. Our college has a huge library with 3 floors filled with all sorts of academic as well as non-academic books. We are monitored by the camera inside the campus 24/7. If they find us doing any kind of bad activities, we will get suspended. Girls and boys are supposed to go to the hostel directly after the college. We are not supposed to roam outside in public. Our classrooms are quite good with smart systems. We have a huge canteen i...

data.description: Recently, The Department of Civil Engineering at Karunya University recently organised a workshop on GPS & Drone Applications, giving scholars, students, & faculty real-time exposure to modern surveying, mapping, & 3D modeling techniques.

college_info.intro:
Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Kakinada have several departments, like the Department of Chemical Engineering, Mathematics, Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering, etc. Through these departments, JNTUK offers various UG, PG, and PhD courses.
Popular programmes at JNTU Kakinada are, BTech and MTech. The institute offers a 4-year BTech programme and a 2-year MTech programme in various specialisations. The popularity of these programmes is due to their curriculum, which is constantly upgraded to suit various branches of engineering and technology.
The industry-institute relations established by JNTU Kakinada provide students with ample opportunities to undergo various training programmes organised by industry partners. JNTU Kakinada also offers placement assistance to students to help them get placed in top companies like Zomato, Amazon, Microsoft, Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, and Google, etc. Refer to the table below for the fee structure and eligibility criteria :
For more information about Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada, check out the video below:

faqs.answer: JNTUK accepts entrance exam scores of EAMCT or NATA for admission to BArch courses. The university may accept JEE Mains scores. It is one of the prominent entrance examinations for admission to BArch courses in various institutions and colleges.
faqs.question: Q: Does Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada accept JEE Mains score for admission to BArch?

faqs.answer: Yes, JNTUK does offer M.Tech courses for a duration of over two-years. The university offers Master in Technology courses through the university and its affiliated colleges. To get admission into JNTUK M.Tech specialisations, candidates are required to qualify for their BTech/ BE and equivalent degrees with a minimum aggregate of 50%. Additionally, the admission process is based on GATE, followed by CCMT counselling, and through PGECET counselling for GATE and PGECET-qualified students.
faqs.question: Q: Does JNTUK offers M.Tech courses?

faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria to pursue the MTech course at JNTUK are to complete Class 12 with a 50% aggregate with Physics and Maths as a subject. Candidates willing to be admitted to BTech at JNTUK must have valid eligibility criteria and entrance exam scores. JNTUK BTech admission is based on entrance examination i.e., EAMCET. Overall JNTUK is a good university for candidates wants to pursue MBA in a low cost.

faqs.answer: To get admission to a four-year MBA course, candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. Admission to MBA is entirely entrance-based. Candidates are offered admission based on a valid score obtained in APICET exam. AP ICET is conducted by Sri Krishnadevaraya University, Ananthapuramu on behalf of the Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education. Further, candidates who qualify for this exam are called for the counselling process. However, candidates can always opt for other entrance exams for admission to MBA such as TSICET/MAT/XAT/CAT/CMAT/GMAT/ATMA.
faqs.question: How can I get admission to MBA at JNTUK?

paragraphs: JNTUK application process involves shortlisting of students, the release of merit list, counselling, and seat allotment. Find out more on JNTUK admission below:1 - Application ProcessJNTUH admissions require students to visit the official website of the respective national-level entrance exam conducting bodies. They need to fill out the application form in online mode.
For the remaining programme candidates are required to apply directly from the official website of JNTUK.
2 - Shortlisting of Students & Release of Merit List

JNTUK shortlists candidates based on entrance exam performance. These include TS EAMCET, GATE, GPAT, etc. The state-level exam conducting bodies, such as TS ICET, release course-wise merit lists for MBA and MCA courses. The university releases a merit list for courses based on merit or national-level exams.
3 - Counselling

Once the merit list is released, eligible students are invited for counselling rounds. For MBA and MCA courses, the counselling is conducted by the TS ICET Counseling. For BTech admission, the TS EAMCET Counseling is held. And for MTech PGECET counseling is required.
4 - Seat Allotment & Admission Confirmation
As per the round of counselling, seats are allotted to the eligible students. Further, the selected students can confirm their admission by paying the course fees.

JNTUK fee is broken down into multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, and one-time fee. The components in the total fee vary with the course selected by the students. However, the overall tuition fee for JNTUK ranges between INR 25 Kand INR 10 L. Find below JNTUK fees for top courses:

faqs.question: What is the admission criteria for JNTUK?
faqs.answer: Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University (JNTU), Kakinada offers five courses at the undergraduate level, namely B.Tech, B.Pharma B.Arch Pharma. D and integrated MBA. The duration of B.Tech and B.Pharma is four years each, whereas B.Arch and integrated MBA are of five-year duration. Pharma. D is of six-year duration. Admission to all these courses is entrance exam-based. For JNTUK Ph.D. admission, candidates must appear in one of the entrance exams such as UGC NET/ CSIR NET/ GATE/ Andhra Prades

placement_data.title: JNTUK Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The highest package offered JNTUK placements 2024 till now stood at INR 35 LPA. This package was offered to two students of ECE and CSE branch . Further, the second highest package offered stood at INR 16.3 LPA . The highest and second highest package was offered by Commvault and Darwain Box , respectively.

Further, as per the Engineering NIRF report 2024 released by Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada, the median package offered to BTech batch 2023 was INR 4.7 LPA . Further, a total of 314 BTech students were placed in 2023.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure of JNTUH?
faqs.answer: For the MBA course, the total course fee at JNTUH ranges between INR 54,000 and INR 3 Lacs. For B.Tech and M.Tech courses, the course fee ranges between INR 30,000 and INR 4.15 Lacs and INR 56,000 - INR 2.28 Lacs, respectively. Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University (JNTU), Kakinada offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral-level programmes for students such as B.Tech, B.Pharma B.Arch Pharma. D M.Tech, M.Pharma MCA MBA, MAM, and Ph.D. under various disciplines. The admissions are based on national-level entrance tests or merit basis.

faqs.question: What is the NATA application fee for 2025 admission to JNTUK BArch?
faqs.answer: After completing the application submission process, candidates will have to make the payment of the prescribed NATA application fee for enrollment in BArch course at JNTUK. The application fee can be paid using Netbanking / Credit Cards / ICICI Isure Bank Challan. Particulars Fee of one test Fee for two tests Fee for three tests General/OBC Male Candidates INR 1,750 INR 3,250 INR 4,500 General/OBC Female Candidates INR 1,250 INR 2,250 INR 3,000 SC/ST/EWS/PwD Male Candidates INR 1,250 INR 2,250 INR 3,000 SC/ST/EWS/PwD Female Candidates INR 1,000 INR 1,750 INR 2,500 Transgender Candidates INR 1,000 INR 1,500 INR 2,000 Outside India INR 10,000 INR 18,000 INR 25,000 Note: Candidates need to download the prefilled registration form and procure the necessary registration documents. They would also be required to select a test centre from the official website at a location convenient to the candidate. Approach the test centre for an appointment for NATA. After this, procure the receipt cum appointment voucher from the test centre and take the exam on the scheduled date.

description: JNTUK cutoff 2025 is available for admission to B.E. / B.Tech via the AP EAMCET exams. Students can scroll down this page to view the cutoff of various accepted exams for different courses, rounds and categories. A few more updates can be seen in the pointers below:

JNTUK AP EAMCET Cutoff 2025 has been published for all rounds and categories under both the All India and Home State quota. For the General category candidates belonging to the All India quota, the cutoff range in the last round was 485 to 22520, wherein B.E. / B.Tech was the hardest course to get admission to for this category.

JNTUK B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, along with the cutoffs for 2024 and 2023 for various categories and rounds, can be found in this section. As per the last round of AP EAMCET, the hardest course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech for the General AI category, which had the cutoff of 485.
Students can see the table below to know the cutoff for other categories and quotas.

Students who want admission to Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada for courses offered via AP EAMCET examination can see the table below to know the important dates for enrolment. Candidates can also download these essential dates as a PDF file for later use.

The Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE) conducts the AP EAMCET exam for admission to BTech, BPharm, and BSc in Agriculture, Bachelor's in Fisheries, and Bachelor's in Horticulture programmes. Students can refer to the table below to either view or download the round-wise cutoff for 2025, 2024, and 2023.

The table below compares different colleges, including JNTUK, based on the last round cutoff ranks of the AP EAMCET exam. The table below compares the General AI category candidates. To view the cutoff for other categories and quotas, use the filters below.

JNTUK accepts TS EAMCET scores for admission to BTech courses through its affiliated institutes. However, the admissions has been over now and the round-wise seat allotment is concluded at a Round 1 seat allotment. As per the JNTUK BTech cutoff 2024, the cutoff ranged between 33538 and 68881. Wherein, the BTech in Computer Science and Engineering stood as the most demanded course among all the courses. Similarly, the least demanded course was B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering.
For the General AI category, the last round closing cutoff for MBA in 2025 was 23.

highlights.description: JNTUK has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #101-150 in the University category, #101-150 under Engineering, and #51-100 under State Public University by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around JNTUK rankings:

nirf.description:
JNTUK has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'University' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for JNTUK indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Engineering', the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, JNTUK's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by GIET Engineering CollegeReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: You get placements if you are a topper.
reviews.review_text: We have nice infrastructure and clean roads with nice greenery. We also have large grounds with indoor and outdoor basketball courts. There is a bus facility. Our college is around 300 acres approximately. We also have 2 main libraries and many small libraries, also with chemical and mechanical labs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by GIET Engineering CollegeReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Okay, it is good and not too bad.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good and there is no Wi-Fi in college. Classrooms are clean and good and the library is covered with AC, it is good, and stock is updated daily, it is very good. The facilities in hostel are not good because it is not clean, and food also not tasty in mess, but canteen food is good and sports and games are very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Godavari Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Genuine review of GIET college.
reviews.review_text: Cultural activities were good in the college. When it comes to the hostel, the food was average, and the infrastructure was good. The classrooms, library, and canteen were very near the blocks and good. They allow sports in cultural activities only, but not for the leisure period in college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of EngineeringReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Pros and cons of Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering by me.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure in our college are good enough, and the labs and classrooms are well-maintained. The hostel food facilities are okay for minimal prices, and they provide good medical facilities and encourage students for sports and games in our mechanical department. A madam named keerthi, she teaches us the C language and the mechanical subject. She is very supportive of students by guiding them.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of EngineeringReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The problems and facilities in Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good enough, but facilities are a little low. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good with minimal prices, and the quantity of food is also good. Sports and games are also given priority. Separate hours will be provided for that, tournaments will also be conducted, and students are also interested in participating.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sasi Institute of Technology and EngineeringReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is nice but average placements, good infrastructure, but no fests.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi and labs. The classroom was nice, the hostel was also nice, but the food was average, and the quality was also average. The medical facility is also nice, sports and games are also nice, but need to be improved. NCC and NSS were excellent, but activities were fewer when compared to other colleges. Finally, the college was nice.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Dr. K.V. Subba Reddy Institute of Technology (KVSRIT)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty with their friendly nature, but we weren't satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good, but not excellent. The lab and library facilities are also available. Our faculty can support us in explaining content coming to the hostel, it is best, but we need to adjust with dinner, and apart from that, everything is good maintenance.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of EngineeringReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The opportunities provided by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering are one of the best things. The labs in our college are well maintained with the best machines and equipment. The college has Wi-Fi availability, classrooms are well maintained, and each class has a separate projector. The infrastructure of GVPCE is quite better compared with other colleges. They provide quality food in the college canteen and hostel mess. We can get unlimited food at the college hostel for only 50 rupees per plate....

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Raghu Engineering CollegeReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good along with learning environment and average package.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good with pure drinking water and cleaned washrooms, along with AC, central library, and classrooms cleaned every day. Wi-Fi is available everywhere in the college for free, and lab equipment is there. The hostel is very clean, but the problem is high fees for hostel stay. Food is very tasty, and every day in the evening and morning sports and games are conducted.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Sagi Rama Krishnam Raju Engineering CollegeReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Not excellent but one of the best. Satisfied with faculty. Dissatisfied with classrooms.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi in labs is good, and there is always a person who solves any problem that arises in the computers (lab technician available all the time). Classrooms are non-AC, but labs are AC. Canteen is available from early morning to evening 5 PM. Main library is very good and the best place. There is a central library at the starting point of the college, and there are department libraries in each department building. College faculty and management are very supportive towards sports and games, yoga s...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Shri Vishnu Engineering College for WomenReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good college if you can use the resources well and are dedicated.
reviews.review_text: The labs, classrooms, and library are excellent and top-rated. They give first priority to hygiene. Every part of the campus is very neat and clean. The hostel rooms are also very neat; they clean them regularly and maintain proper hygiene. Medical facilities are also available all the time. Separate facilities for games like carrom, basketball, and cricket are also provided within the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Aditya UniversityReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It's absolutely a perfect place filled with different religions and different countries.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are hygienic, and the food is also good. They maintain the hostel room good and clean everyday. The infrastructure is awesome, all the classrooms are equipped with smartboards and Wi-Fi facility and all the floors have separate restrooms for both genders, and playgrounds are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Placements of 2026 for Aditya.

table.details: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology

college_info.intro: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology's popular programmes are BTech and MBA. The institute offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programmes offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of Biomedical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, CSE, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and others. The MBA programme offered by the KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is a two-year programme. The institute offered an MBA specialisation in General Management. The below-mentioned are the KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology popular programmes:
