review_summary.college_name: KPR College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Computer Science and Engineering (AI and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Excellent for learning if you adjust, though the hostel mess is poor, and some faculty are difficult

content.Placements: For my department, placement is going great so far. Almost 80 percent have got an offer, but can't say for sure about other departments. For my department personnel, HOD is trying really hard for all of us and also for junior but I have seen some department members neglecting their duty as well. So please be careful when choosing.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good, with enough facilities to learn and explore if you have the motivation to use them properly. The campus environment supports growth, but personal effort matters the most. Hostel facilities have improved recently with the construction of a new hostel, making living conditions more comfortable and manageable. The mess, however, is disappointing. There are three food options, the first two, meant for South Indian and international students, are repetitive and lack quality. The third option, intercontinental food, offers a better variety and taste and is clearly the only good choice.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good faculty, placements, and infrastructure with facilities.

content.Placements: Students in my B.E. Engineering course at KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology get placed. The highest percentage score is above 95%, and the lowest is around 50%. The average percentage is below 50%. Companies like Google hire engineers from here.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi connection is very good in my college, and we have AC labs and high-tech infrastructure. The classrooms are also high-tech, providing a peaceful study. The hostel and food quality are excellent. Medical facilities, sports, and games receive extra care. The mess and canteen are hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: KPR is the best choice. All facilities that you need to outshine as an engineer are a single roof.

content.Placements: They start making you industry-ready from the 3rd year itself, with excellent placement training from internal and external placement guides and experts. The highest package received in my batch is 40 LPA, and students get internship offers from many prestigious organizations.
content.Infrastructure: Upgraded labs. All kinds of facilities in a single place. Hostels are very good, surrounded by the natural environment that makes it more admirable and feels like home. The hostel provides full safety and support.
content.Faculty: Teachers here are easy to approach, and they are always ready to support and help students in all aspects. They follow a mentor-mentee system through which every student in a class gets full support from the faculty members. In every semester, there are two continuous internal assessments followed by end-semester exams. Industry-driven curriculum, training in new technologies.

admission_overview.college_name: KPR College Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Application & Selection

paragraphs: KPRIET admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The institute considers scores in TANCET, CEETA PG or GATE for admission to specific PG courses. For BE/ BTech programmes, aspirants are selected based on Class 12 score followed by TNEA Counselling.KPRIEToffers courses at UG and PG levels in Engineering and Management streams. The institute offers courses in affiliation withAnna University. Interested candidates can apply online for admission.

KPRIET offers admission to UG courses based on merit whereas, entrance exam scores are considered for PG programmes. The institute considers TANCET, CEETA PG and GATE scores for admission to PG programmes. Below areKPRIET coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
KPRIET admissions are currently open. Candidates are offered seats in the institute based on their entrance or qualifying exam score. Below is the KPRIET admission process in detail:
Step 1: KPRIET Application Process 2025

Candidates with a Class 12 score need to apply for TNEA Counselling for BE/ BTech programmes. For all other courses, aspirants need to fill out the enquiry form available on the institute's website. Aspirants before applying must first register for the accepted entrance exam.
Step 2: Selection
KPRIET selects candidates for BE/ BTech programmes based on Class 12 scores. The institute accepts TANCET and GATE/ CEETA PG for MBA and ME programmes, respectively.
Step 3: Counselling & Seat Allotment

Candidates seeking admission in BE/ BTech courses are offered seats via TNEA Counselling. For all other programmes, candidates need to provide their entrance exam scores and report at the campus for document verification. Selected aspirants need to pay theKPRIET feeto confirm their seat in the institute.

Besides, admission to MBA and ME courses is based on TANCET and GATE/ CEETA PG, respectively. Once selected, aspirants need to participate in counselling and document verification round.

placement_data.title: KPRIET Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The 2024 batch comprised 1,002 students. Out of these, 807 students were interested during the 2024 recruitment drives and 743 students were placed . The highest package offered during the KPRIET placements 2024 was INR 54 LPA . The average package stood at INR 5.20 LPA and the median package offered was INR 4 LPA . The overall placement percentage for 2024 was 93% .

The institute has a Placement Cell that organises Career Guidance and Career Support Programs and trains the students on communication skills and personality development. Alongside this, Quantitative Aptitude, Logical Reasoning and Verbal Reasoning through Corporate Trainers, Industry Experts and In-House Trainers were also provided to prepare the students for real-world challenges.

faqs.question: How to prepare for KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology placement drive?
faqs.answer: Most of the companies start the placement process with a pre-placement talk that describes the job profile, the company's vision and the services provided by them. Students are advised to attend the PPT for the desired company as it is the base step of preparation for that particular company. Thereafter, prepare a decent resume highlighting your skills, academic background, and extra-curricular details. The most important step of the placement interview is the test conducted by the interviewer. Students should well prepare the Logical Reasoning, Verbal Ability, and Quantitative Awareness topics. Alongside this, prepare the basics of the core subject, depending upon the branch they are studying in. To excel in the GD round, try to initiate first and listen carefully to the point put forward by the other members.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent for learning if you adjust, though the hostel mess is poor, and some faculty are difficult
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, with enough facilities to learn and explore if you have the motivation to use them properly. The campus environment supports growth, but personal effort matters the most. Hostel facilities have improved recently with the construction of a new hostel, making living conditions more comfortable and manageable. The mess, however, is disappointing. There are three food options, the first two, meant for South Indian and international students, are repetitive and lac...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good faculty, placements, and infrastructure with facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connection is very good in my college, and we have AC labs and high-tech infrastructure. The classrooms are also high-tech, providing a peaceful study. The hostel and food quality are excellent. Medical facilities, sports, and games receive extra care. The mess and canteen are hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is the best engineering college.
reviews.review_text: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is one of the best infrastructure college in Coimbatore. This college has good hostel facilities. Hostel foods are very hygienic and healthy. Multiple sports grounds facilities are available in this college. More laboratories and library facilities are available in this college. More comfortable and spacious classrooms are available in this college. Wi-Fi network and CCTV camera facilities are also here this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: This college has good infrastructure and is well-known as a green campus. It also has a good Wi-Fi facility overall on the campus. Every department has its own library, other than that of the central library. The campus is very neat and clean in it.

reviews.review_heading: KPR is the best choice. All facilities that you need to outshine as an engineer are a single roof.
reviews.review_text: Upgraded labs. All kinds of facilities in a single place. Hostels are very good, surrounded by the natural environment that makes it more admirable and feels like home. The hostel provides full safety and support.

reviews.review_heading: Review about KPRIET, Coimbatore.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of the college are very good, and the infrastructure is very good in the college. The environment for learning is very good, and student engagement in many activities other than studies is also encouraged. Additionally, the hostel is very protective and safe for students.

reviews.review_heading: KPR - Top placements and growth.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities like Wi-Fi 24/7 are there. Many labs are available and all are fully equipped. They can be used by students anytime after college. Each classroom has a projector and most of the professors use it and each class has an outer. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. It has neat and clean rooms. Food is good moreover safety is very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college ever in Coimbatore.
reviews.review_text: Our college has many facilities like a Wi-Fi connection. Hostellers use labs up to 7 PM and also use a library. NCC and NSS are available in our college. Many more facilities like kho-kho courts, kabaddi courts, a fitness center for men and women, chess, carrom, ludo, etc., are available. Many indoor and outdoor games are available for the students on the college premises.

reviews.review_heading: KPRIET - You can get everything that you expect in your college life.
reviews.review_text: Here, students will get access to Wi-Fi for studying purposes and only digital classrooms. The library here is okay compared to other colleges. Here, students who come in the sports quota can get full guidance and support, and not only sports quota students, everybody can use it. The hostel is slightly strict for girls. Mess food is being prepared by maintaining proper hygiene, and the taste will be okay. Small issues like fever, cough will be treated in college by the medical room, and severe i...

reviews.review_heading: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology is really a good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology and the campus surroundings are very beautiful. The college has spacious classrooms and well-equipped library facilities. There are also hi-tech laboratories available. The hostel facilities are nice, and the food in the hostel and canteen is hygienic. Sports ground facilities are also provided at this college.

reviews.review_heading: Really an underrated college and is going to be one of the top colleges in my city .
reviews.review_text: The labs and lab facilities of our college are top-notch with high-performance systems. Students are provided with free Wi-Fi with very strong coverage and speed. The library is huge, with 2 floors of continuing books of all genres, both fictional and nonfiction. There are also computers inside the library if you need to access e-books. Hostel dorms are very well maintained with frequent cleaning, and the restrooms are well cleaned and maintained. The hygienic side is that the rooms are top-notc...

reviews.review_heading: KPR Institute: Industry-Ready Education with Room for Growth.
reviews.review_text: At KPR Institute, the Civil Engineering department offers top-notch facilities like sponsored labs by L&T, modern classrooms, a well-stocked library, and campus-wide Wi-Fi. Hostel amenities are comfortable, the mess serves nutritious meals, medical facilities are accessible, and sports activities are encouraged for a balanced student life.

reviews.review_heading: Happy KPR—the happiest KPR, always KPR.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a library and internet facilities. Courses offered include Computer Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Civil Engineering, and Chemical Engineering.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review about KPR.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very nice. College campus is always green in nature. Hostel infrastructure is also nice. They maintain separate hostels for both boys and girls with veg and non-veg canteen based on students. They celebrate hostel day with full of events for one week with DJ.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure with good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent compared to other colleges in Coimbatore. Wi-Fi is unlimited for your laptop, but you cannot connect Wi-Fi on your mobile. All the classrooms are smart classrooms with projectors. L&T Experience Engineering Lab is also available, established with an amount of about 1 crore. Coming to the hostel, the food is average, and the restrooms are good. You will have all the facilities for sports and games.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology

The placement department is working effectively in training the students to make them industry-ready.

The classrooms, labs, food courts, sport centres, library and hostel area are maintained well and hygienic food are provided for both the students and faculty members.

Not only curriculum related, we have clubs and skill development centers to improve our practical knowledge.

paragraphs: As per my knowledge yes, KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology does have a fee refund policy. As I have heard about their policy, if a student withdraws their admission before approval maybe or may not be able to get the full amount After approval - The approval fee and tuition fee for the number of days you have attended the classes will be deducted.
The application fee for TNEA is INR 500 for the general candidates and INR 250 for SC /SCA /ST category belonging to Tamil Nadu.

The application fee for B.Tech. at KPRIET could not be highlighted as there is no such information provided on the respective resources. The first-year fee of the B.Tech course is around INR 96,900. For more information, especially on application fees, please visit their official website or get in touch with the admissions office directly.

The total tuition fee for the B.E. in Biomedical Engineering course at KPR College is INR 2.00 Lakh. The course is four years long and admits 60 students. Applicants must have at least 45% in 12th to be admitted.

faqs.answer: A:    KEC - Kongu Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityPh.D.Candidate must have completed Master's degree in relevant field.B.Sc.Candidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent from a recognized board.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognized institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.MCACandidate who have completed 10+2+A

review_content.Placements: 80 percent of students are being placed with an average package of 23 LPA, and the lowest package is 5.5 LPA. L&T and Bosch are coming for placement. Around 78 percent of people are getting internships, and all is fine. Team leader and other posts, like manager, are being offered as top positions.
review_content.Infrastructure: Faculty members with Ph.D. degrees and M.Tech are being selected to teach. Multi-facility labs are available in the college with many equipment. Wi-Fi is all around the campus, and a big library is provided. Good hostel facilities are available with a sports ground, and food is available.

Major roles offered were Software Engineer, Data Analyst, and AI Developer.

overview_faqs.question: Why is KEC - Kongu Engineering College so famous?
overview_faqs.answer: Kongu Engineering College (KEC) is famous for its strong academic reputation, consistently ranking among India’s top engineering colleges. It boasts experienced faculty and excellent infrastructure, including state-of-the-art labs. KEC has a successful placement record, with numerous top companies recruiting graduates. The college emphasizes research, industry collaboration, and skill development through workshops and entrepreneurial initiatives, providing students with a comprehensive education that prepares them for real-world challenges in engineering.

review_summary.college_name: Kongu Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The way to the success of your life.

content.Placements: 85 to 90 percent top students are placed in top companies. The highest package in my course is 15LPA and the lowest package in my course is 6LPA and the average package offered in my course is 8 to 9LPA. Bahwan CyberTek and Cognizant are the companies recruiting for my course. The college is good for placement.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very neat. Library has all the books and faculty members are very friendly. Wi-Fi is also available and hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess is okay. Good sports games are available in college disciplines and are neat.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Kongu Engineering College is good, but this college is located on the outskirts of Erode.

content.Placements: I don't know the exact placement percentage. I think it is around 75% in my department. In my department, the average salary is approximately 3–4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tata, TCS, ZOHO, Infosys, and Soliton. Service-based roles are a major in my department.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is green and eco-friendly and a Wi-Fi-enabled campus. In classrooms, teachers teach on a smartboard. The library is neat and clean, and students maintain silence. There are nearly 7,000 books available, which give knowledge to students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Kongu Engineering College is best for infrastructure and good for placement and academics.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students are being placed with an average package of 23 LPA, and the lowest package is 5.5 LPA. L&T and Bosch are coming for placement. Around 78 percent of people are getting internships, and all is fine. Team leader and other posts, like manager, are being offered as top positions.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty members with Ph.D. degrees and M.Tech are being selected to teach. Multi-facility labs are available in the college with many equipment. Wi-Fi is all around the campus, and a big library is provided. Good hostel facilities are available with a sports ground, and food is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good atmosphere and infrastructure.

content.Placements: In my batch (2024-25) of the AIML course, around 92 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 45 LPA, the lowest is 5 LPA, and the average is 12 LPA. Top recruiters include Google, Amazon, Microsoft, and TCS. About 85 percent got internships at firms like Infosys, Deloitte, and Accenture. Major roles offered were Software Engineer, Data Analyst, and AI Developer.
content.Infrastructure: The department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, modern computer labs, and a well-equipped library. Hostels are clean and comfortable, with good food in the mess. Medical, sports, and gym facilities are excellent, and the hostel food is hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: An excellent college with good faculty members, infrastructure, and placement.

content.Placements: In 2024, college placement trends showed an impressive outcome with many top institutions achieving placement rates above 90 percent for their graduation batches. The highest salary packages touched 13 LPA, and average offers range from 6 LPA to 6.5 LPA for in-demand courses. Major recruiters include Accenture, Amazon, Infosys, and TCS, reflecting strong industry participation. Internship opportunities also grew with up to 80 percent of students interning at leading firms such as Google and Microsoft. Top roles offered are software development, consulting, product management, and analytics.

admission_overview.college_name: Kongu Engineering College Admission 2025: Eligibility, Application, Selection & Dates

paragraphs: Kongu Engineering College offers various courses at UG, PG and PhD levels. Admission to all the courses is entrance-based except BSc and MSc. Candidates willing to apply for any courses must register for entrance exams and appear for the same.Kongu Engineering Collegeis affiliated with Anna University, However, the college follows the admission norms ofAnna Universityfor admission to B.E./BTech, MBA, MCA and MTech courses. To know the latest information related to Kongu Engineering College admission 2025, go through the below sections:

Kongu Engineering College admission is ongoing for all courses. The college offers both entrance and merit-based admission to all its courses. The college offers UG, PG, and PhD courses, including BTech/B.E., M.E./MTech, MCA, MBA, BSc and others.

To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the college. The college acceptsTNEA counsellingscores for admission to BTech/B.E. and TANCET, GATE and CEETA exam scores for admission to MBA, MCA and M.E./MTech, respectively. Further, for BSc and MSc courses college offers admission based on the last qualifying exam score. Want to know other details aboutKEC- Kongu Engineering College courseeligibility along with selection criteria, check out the table below:

Kongu Engineering College's admission process includes filling out the application form qualifying for the selection rounds and paying the fee to grab the final seat. Check below the detailed steps of Kongu Engineering College admission 2025:
STEP 1: Kongu Engineering College Application Process 2025

Candidates are required to register for TANCET, GATE andCEETAfor admission to PG courses. Additionally, for admission to BTech/ B.E. candidates are required to register and appear for TNEA Counselling.
STEP 2: Kongu Engineering College Selection Round

Kongu Engineering College selects candidates forBTech/ B.E.., MBA,MCAand M.E. based on entrance exams along with counselling such as TNEA Counselling, TANCET, GATE and CEETA entrance exams, respectively.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
The selected candidates are required to pay theKongu Engineering College feeto complete their enrollment within the given deadline to confirm and grab the final seat.

faqs.question: Are admissions to Kongu Engineering College open?
faqs.answer: Yes, admission is open to Kongu Engineering College for all UG, PG and PhD courses through TNEA, GATE, CEETA and TANCET, respectively. Further, for BSc and MSc, candidates are selected based on the last qualifying exam score. Interested candidates can visit the official websites of TNEA Counselling and TANCET to apply for the BTech and PG courses, respectively.

faqs.question: What are the top courses offered at Kongu Engineering College?
faqs.answer: The college offers various courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels such as B.E./BTech, MCA, MBA M.E./ MTech, BSc and others. Candidates who have completed Class 12 are eligible to apply for UG courses. Graduation is required to apply for the PG courses. Additionally, candidates, need to appear for TNEA counselling for admission to B.E./BTech and CEETA-PG/GATE, and TANCET for admission to MTech, MBA, MCA courses, respectively.

faqs.question: Is there an entrance for admission to Kongu Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Yes, Kongu Engineering College ccepts various entrance exams for admission to UG and PG courses. The college offers two UG i.e., BTech/B.E. and BSc and four PG courses i.e., M.E., MCA, MBA and MSc. For admission to BSc and MSc, the college offers merit-based admission. Further, the college accepts TNEA counselling for admission to BTech/B.E. and TANCET, GATE, and CEETA for admission to MBA, MCA and M.E./MTech, respectively. After filling out the admission criteria set by the college, candidates are required to apply to the official website of their respective entrance exam and fill out the admission form.

reviews.review_heading: The way to the success of your life.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very neat. Library has all the books and faculty members are very friendly. Wi-Fi is also available and hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess is okay. Good sports games are available in college disciplines and are neat.

reviews.review_heading: Kongu Engineering College is good, but this college is located on the outskirts of Erode.
reviews.review_text: The campus is green and eco-friendly and a Wi-Fi-enabled campus. In classrooms, teachers teach on a smartboard. The library is neat and clean, and students maintain silence. There are nearly 7,000 books available, which give knowledge to students.

reviews.review_heading: Kongu Engineering College is best for infrastructure and good for placement and academics.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members with Ph.D. degrees and M.Tech are being selected to teach. Multi-facility labs are available in the college with many equipment. Wi-Fi is all around the campus, and a big library is provided. Good hostel facilities are available with a sports ground, and food is available.

reviews.review_heading: Good atmosphere and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, modern computer labs, and a well-equipped library. Hostels are clean and comfortable, with good food in the mess. Medical, sports, and gym facilities are excellent, and the hostel food is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: An excellent college with good faculty members, infrastructure, and placement.
reviews.review_text: Modern colleges in 2025 offer comprehensive facilities for students, including campus-wide Wi-Fi, advanced computer labs, fully equipped classrooms with audio-visual aids, and libraries stocked with contemporary books and digital resources. Hostels are designed to be comfortable, featuring clean rooms, recreational space, night canteens, and amenities such as laundry services and a gymnasium. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is generally regarded as hygienic and varied, with regular m...

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements and an industry-ready AIML curriculum with excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: AIML facilities include smart classrooms with projectors, Wi-Fi, specialized AI/ML labs with GPUs, software like TensorFlow/PyTorch, a library, and seminar halls. The hostel has good quality with Wi-Fi, adequate mess food (hygiene maintained), a medical center, sports complex, gym, and indoor/outdoor games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty staffs because of the use of rude behavior.
reviews.review_text: Food technology department has modern labs, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a good library. Hostel, mess, and canteen offer quality food and hygienic stay. Medical, sports, and recreational facilities are good, ensuring student well-being and comfort.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members with Ph.D. and M.Tech are being selected to teach. Multi-facility labs are available in the college with so many equipments. Wi-Fi is all around the campus, and a big library is provided. Good hostel facility is available with a sports ground. Food available is good. It has good communication.

reviews.review_heading: Kongu Engineering College - Best college in Erode.
reviews.review_text: Multi facility hostel is there with good food and hygiene. It has Wi-Fi covered campus with good connectivity. A big playground is there with 2,00,000 books. Gym and dispensary are there. Classrooms are equipped with digital boards and good cleanliness. Quality of food is really good, and wardens are friendly.

reviews.review_heading: Kongu Engineering College has best infrastructure and good for placements and academics.
reviews.review_text: Multi-facility labs are available in the college with so many equipment. Wi-Fi is all around the campus, and a big library is provided. Good facility hostel is available with a sports ground, and food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money in college.
reviews.review_text: Multi-facility labs are available in the college with so many equipments. Wi-Fi is all around the campus and a big library is provided. Good facility hostel is available with a sports ground and food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Kongu Engineering College is the best infrastructure and good placement academic.
reviews.review_text: Multi-facility labs are available in the college with many equipment. Wi-Fi is all around the campus, and a big library is provided. A good hostel facility is available with a sports ground, and the food is really good.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty but some idiots.
reviews.review_text: There is a very good library, but Wi-Fi is not that great, and you can't access social media through their internet. I am a dayscholar but heard the hostel food is very average but very hygienic. Hostel timings are very strict, but rooms are cleaned often and laundry is available for extra cash.

reviews.review_text: KEC is spread over about 167 acres of land. Built-up area (in one report) is 22.45 Lacs sq ft. Academic & IT Facilities: Classrooms: 186-200 classrooms (various reports: 186 in 2022-23). Laboratories: 135 state-of-the-art labs. Wi-Fi in classrooms.

college_info.intro:
PES College Bangalore is famous for its flagship BTech, MBA, & BSc courses. Studying these PESU Bangalore flagship programmes at PES University helps to support the professional and personal growth of the students. This is done through a holistic and immersive learning experience. BTech students engage with the corporate sector on a variety of platforms ranging from industry visits, workshops, hackathons, internships, and industry-wide events such as summits, seminars, conferences, and others. BTech Computer Science & Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) is one of the most popularly opted specialisation. Some of the key highlights of this programme are below:
PES University Bangalore MBA is a full-time, 2-year programme, which consists of a core curriculum along with an internship and various elective courses. PES MBA Bangalore is offered in various major specialisations, including Business Analytics, Finance, Marketing, Human Capital, and Operation Management, among others. The PESU Venture Labs, established by the university, funds the business ideas of students, to help them realise their dream of becoming an entrepreneur. Here is more info around PES College Bangalore courses:

reviews_list.review_title: One of the top colleges in Bangalore, with top-notch infrastructure and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Placements are really good, mainly because the college is located in a city like Bangalore. Compared to other colleges such as BMS and MSRIT, the placements are much better. They have a median package of 18 to 20 LPA for the AIML course, which is likely to increase in the future.
review_content.Infrastructure: The canteen and hostel facilities are really good. This might be the best thing about the university. The libraries are of top-notch quality. They have great basketball courts, badminton courts, and other sports facilities. The food available in the canteen is also amazing.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with the infrastructure, but it can include more extracurricular activities.

review_content.Placements: So 80-90% of students from my course got placed in top companies, and most of us managed to get jobs through campus placement. The highest salary package offered in our course is around 25 to 26 LPA. The average package is roughly around 11-13 LPA. Some of the top companies include KPMG, Deloitte, HDFC Bank, TCS, DELL, etc. Around 80-95% students got internships, and some companies offering internships are Wipro and Accenture. The roles offered through placement and internships are legal advisory, business development, legal research, and consulting.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Completely worth a one-time investment.

review_content.Placements: According to our seniors and the placement information given by them, around 85-90% of the people who were eligible for placements were offered internships/placements. The highest package was around 56-60 LPA last year, the lowest was maybe 3.2 LPA, and the average is 12 LPA. The whole MAANG came itself. Everybody who was eligible got an internship. Software Engineer/ SDE-2, Data Analyst, and Data Engineer roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good, but restricted to one device only, and the internet doesn't come on the campus. Classrooms and faculty are all world-class. I'm a day-scholar, but as per my peeps, hostel food is bad. But the canteen food is top-notch. Sports facilities are also top-notch. Gym (10K for RR campus and 6K for EC campus), both are good.

Certain fee elements are one-time payments to be made at the time of PES University admission, whereas others are recurring as per the norms of the institution fee policy. review_summary.college_name: PES University Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: A total of 740 in the seniors' batch. Around 540 have been placed, and many have gone for higher studies. The highest package was 60 LPA. The median is around 12-13 LPA, and the lowest is not available. Companies like Zomato, IBM, Google, AWS, etc., come to this college. The top roles include SDE and ML engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty have higher education with doctorate degrees, but the teaching is not very good. Most of the students self-study to score well. Infrastructure is 10/10. All the facilities are good, and everything you need will be available. As I am a day scholar, I don't know much about the hostel and mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: There are a lot of clubs technical and non technical which are worth.

content.Placements: In electronics and communication the placement was not that good compared to CSE till last year. The placements are decent for ECE but then in the last year there is a slight dip in the placements for CSE. The placement ratio is almost the same as before.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is nice and has a lot of extracurricular sports and a lot of eating spots. There are separate places for the hackathons to be conducted. There are a lot of auditoriums. There are separate blocks of each branch like B.Tech B.Com BBA etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: One of the top colleges in Bangalore, with top-notch infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements are really good, mainly because the college is located in a city like Bangalore. Compared to other colleges such as BMS and MSRIT, the placements are much better. They have a median package of 18 to 20 LPA for the AIML course, which is likely to increase in the future.
content.Infrastructure: The canteen and hostel facilities are really good. This might be the best thing about the university. The libraries are of top-notch quality. They have great basketball courts, badminton courts, and other sports facilities. The food available in the canteen is also amazing.

individual_reviews.course: B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the infrastructure, but it can include more extracurricular activities.

content.Placements: So 80-90% of students from my course got placed in top companies, and most of us managed to get jobs through campus placement. The highest salary package offered in our course is around 25 to 26 LPA. The average package is roughly around 11-13 LPA. Some of the top companies include KPMG, Deloitte, HDFC Bank, TCS, DELL, etc. Around 80-95% students got internships, and some companies offering internships are Wipro and Accenture. The roles offered through placement and internships are legal advisory, business development, legal research, and consulting.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Completely worth a one-time investment.

content.Placements: According to our seniors and the placement information given by them, around 85-90% of the people who were eligible for placements were offered internships/placements. The highest package was around 56-60 LPA last year, the lowest was maybe 3.2 LPA, and the average is 12 LPA. The whole MAANG came itself. Everybody who was eligible got an internship. Software Engineer/ SDE-2, Data Analyst, and Data Engineer roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good, but restricted to one device only, and the internet doesn't come on the campus. Classrooms and faculty are all world-class. I'm a day-scholar, but as per my peeps, hostel food is bad. But the canteen food is top-notch. Sports facilities are also top-notch. Gym (10K for RR campus and 6K for EC campus), both are good.

admission_overview.college_name: PES University Bangalore Admission 2026: Dates, Eligibility and Selection Fee & Application

admission_overview.title: PES University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: PES University admission 2026 is open for UG, PG and PhD programmes. The private university in Bangalore offers 27 degree courses in various specialisations at UG, PG and doctoral levels. programs are offered in the domains of Engineering, Maedicine, Management and Life Sciences. Interested candidates can register online for admission to the course of their choice. Admission in the university is primarily entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams like JEE Main, CAT, GATE, KCET, etc. for specific courses. In addition, PES University conducts its in-house entrance exam-PESSAT for UG and PG programmes. The university offers courses only in full time/offline mode. requirements of return on investment for the institution's high fee costs are met with competitive placements.

Candidates can apply for UG courses after Class 12 and PG courses after completing graduation. The university conducts PESSAT for admission to various courses. faqs.answer: PES University admission for UG and PG courses are entrance based. Candidates are shortlisted for the interview after PESSAT. Shortlisting is done on the basis of merit with reference to the PESSAT scores of the candidates. Hereafter, the list of candidates who qualify PESSAT is notified on the official website and the interview round commences for the shortlisted candidates.
faqs.question: How are candidates shortlisted for interview in the PES University admission process?

faqs.answer: PES Bangalore offers courses at the UG, PG and PhD level across the fields of Engineering, Medicine, Architecture, Design, Management and Commerce, Economics and many more, The University offers these courses on the basis of merit and various accepted entrance exams. PES Bangalore fee structure includes a tuition fees ranging from INR 1.9 Lacs to INR 20 Lakh. In comparison to other universities, the cost of academia is higher. However, the University various other facilities apart from academia which is worth the cost being paid.
faqs.question: How costly is PES University?

paragraphs: PES University admission 2026is majorly based on entrance scores. It accepts scores of certain entrance exams such as-JEE Main, CAT, GATE, KCET, etc.PES Universityconducts its in-house entrance exam-PESSAT. The university offers 27 degree courses in various specialisations atUG, PG and doctoral levels. Interested candidates can register online for admission to the course of their choice.PES University admissionto UG and PG courses is based on PESSAT score. There are around 27 courses offered in multiple streams at PES. The university offers courses only in full time/offline mode.

PES University admission processincludes registration, entrance exam, counselling, etc. Candidates are first required to register for any of the preferred course. Check below, detailed step wise admission process for PES University:
1. Application

Application forms are available online on the official website of the university. There is a application fee of INR 1,200 which needs to be paid for submitting the form.Candidates must also keep the specified documents ready for registration.
2. Slot Booking

After submission of the form, the candidates have to book a slot for the PESSAT exam. This step is valid only for candidates appearing for PESSAT. Once they have booked their slot, an admit card will be issued. Aspirants must download their admit card.
3. Selection Rounds

PES University admission criteria include eligibility and an entrance exam followed by other selection rounds. The criteria vary as per the course. PESSAT conducted by PES University is accepted for admission to all the courses. National or state-level entrance exams like JEE Main, KCET, GATE, etc. are required for admission to specific courses. PES conducts an interview round for shortlisted candidates for admission to some courses.
STEP 4: Counselling

The selected candidates are further called for counselling and document verification. Aspirants need to payPES University feeto get a seat in the university. Once the fee is paid, candidates can report to the institute.

PES University feesinclude multiple components, such as the tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. The fee amount varies from one course to another. Any refund in fee will be done as per current UGC refund norms only. Affordability is one of the reasons why many don't opt for a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education accessible the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. courses_data.name: PES University BBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: PES University BBAoffers a three-year UG degree. Along with the BBA (General) course, the University also provides courses such as BBA (Business Analytics), BBA (Hospitality & Event Management), BBA (Sports Management), and BBA (Hons). To get admission to the BBA course, students need to qualify for PESSAT followed by an interview.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for BBA in PES University?
faqs.answer: Yes, PES University conducts PESSAT for providing admission to BBA course. The university also considers the marks obtained in the qualifying examination for admission. In order to get admission to BBA at PES University, student need to pass Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate in the respective subjects as per the minimum eligibility criteria. The final selection is done based on the performance of candidates in the personal interview (PI) round, that is conducted at the university.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for BBA at PES University

The PESSAT 2025 exam will be conducted online as a computer-based test at the PES University campus and in 44 cities in the country. faqs.question: How can I get a seat in PES University?
faqs.answer: For getting seats in PES University, the student must satisfy eligibility criteria, give the PESSAT entrance exam, and then provide rank. Once students qualify for the entrance exam, they are short-listed on the basis of available seats and rank for counseling. Counseling will provide them with seats. So, proper application is to be followed and documents should reach the University in the time frame.

faqs.question: Is PES University admission open?
faqs.answer: Yes, admissions to the UG and PG programmes conducted at PES University are now open. All applicants have to fill their online application form at the university portal and enroll themselves for entrance tests such as PESSAT or any other entrance test valid throughout the country.

faqs.question: Can I join PES University after Class 12?
faqs.answer: If you qualify the eligibility criteria, then you can get admission to PES University after clearing class 12 and apply for the course you are interested in. Most courses would require to have passed class 12 with a good percentage and apprear in the PESSAT entrace exam. After clearing the entrace exam, you should be able to secure a seat for your preferred course.

faqs.question: Is PESSAT compulsory for PES University?
faqs.answer: Almost all courses in PES University can be admitted to if a student qualifies through PESSAT. It is the only entrance exam that the college looks into and includes for eligibility in their courses. However, in such exceptional cases like direct admission allowed for the high achievers, one may be exempted from the PESSAT process. Therefore, candidates have to clear the PESSAT exam with the prescribed minimum cutoff.

placement_data.title: PES University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: PES University has released the 2025 placement data. The overall highest package secured by the students of the batch 2025 stood at INR 68 LPA . Over 350 companies participated during PES University placements 2025 and presented over 1,500 placement offers to the students. The top recruiters of PES University in 2025 include Amazon, Google, KPMG, HP, Deloitte, Cosco, Flipkart, etc.

In addition to offering placement opportunities to the students, the placements wing of the University looks after the training of students on a continuing basis. In 2025, the students received more than 1,250 internship offers from reputed companies like SAP, NVIDIA, Siemens, etc.

description: PES University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

PES University Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 656 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 700 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was more competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at PES University. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 656 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 239, while in 2023, it was 575.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

PES University accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering has the lowest cutoff rank of 6056 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 5241, in the General All India quota.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Faculty have higher education with doctorate degrees, but the teaching is not very good. Most of the students self-study to score well. Infrastructure is 10/10. All the facilities are good, and everything you need will be available. As I am a day scholar, I don't know much about the hostel and mess.

reviews.review_heading: There are a lot of clubs technical and non technical which are worth.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is nice and has a lot of extracurricular sports and a lot of eating spots. There are separate places for the hackathons to be conducted. There are a lot of auditoriums. There are separate blocks of each branch like B.Tech B.Com BBA etc.

reviews.review_heading: One of the top colleges in Bangalore, with top-notch infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The canteen and hostel facilities are really good. This might be the best thing about the university. The libraries are of top-notch quality. They have great basketball courts, badminton courts, and other sports facilities. The food available in the canteen is also amazing.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the infrastructure, but it can include more extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities are quite excellent, including Wi-Fi for all and a specialised library for law. 
The quality of the hostel is also nice, but the food is not so much appreciated in the canteen, and it takes a lot of time to get prepared. 
There are quite a few sports games like football, basketball, badminton, etc. Including the top infrastructure courts for each sport.

reviews.review_heading: Completely worth a one-time investment.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good, but restricted to one device only, and the internet doesn't come on the campus. Classrooms and faculty are all world-class. I'm a day-scholar, but as per my peeps, hostel food is bad. But the canteen food is top-notch. Sports facilities are also top-notch. Gym (10K for RR campus and 6K for EC campus), both are good.

reviews.review_heading: You will experience every feeling in this college, good placements, and good friends.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers a fine infrastructure with high-speed Wi-Fi and a well-built library to study with all kinds of books. A well-maintained canteen, well-facilitated sports field, and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: PES: The real reason why to join PES.
reviews.review_text: The campus life, infrastructure, and both indoor and outdoor places are really well-maintained and well-equipped. This is one of the attractions at PES, where we get to see a huge block just for indoor sports and other co-scholastic activities. Here at PES, students get to play sports whenever they want, there are separate fields for different outdoor sports. One of the most attractive being is the cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best private university, but the fee is too high.
reviews.review_text: For first-year students, the hostel is not on campus, but from the second year, the hostel is on campus. The Wi-Fi in both the college and the hostel is good. Facilities in the college are also good. The food is of good quality and quantity. Everything mentioned above is available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Worthy for course but not for money.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good and aesthetically pleasing. To sit and study we have quite big libraries and Wi-Fi is available but sometimes it is a trouble to connect with them. Moreover, we have a boys hostel inside the college campus and a girl's hostel outside the campus which is contact based and it is taken up by a living space company, for girls hostel which includes food and snacks for the hostellers.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with infrastructure and faculty, bit disappoint and concerned about placements.
reviews.review_text: Talking about infrastructure, our college has the best facilities. They provide us all we need, including a study area. We have four different libraries, including one exclusively for the law department, which has a collection of even rare books. There is also a three-storied central library and an international-level moot court hall. We have courts for basketball, volleyball, badminton, and tennis, with a highly structured gym facility for students. There are six canteens that provide clean foo...

reviews.review_heading: Good Placements, Great Exposure, but Super Difficult Exams.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is pretty much okayish, not so good I would say because I have seen my friends complaining about the hostel food and all, and also they are building a new hostel now. Wi-Fi, sports, and games are always there, but unfortunately, I am not in the hostel, so I don't know what exactly is happening there.

reviews.review_heading: Not what I expected it to be.
reviews.review_text: The college provided good classroom and lab facilities. The hostel rooms are decent compared to other hostels. There are four canteens on the campus, and the quality of the food is good. The campus is clean and huge. We have small stalls for snacks and stationery inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: PES University at Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: PES University is a wide university including a lot of courses. Specialized lecturers are appointed for all the courses. A higher area is allocated for parking and sports courts. The library, with an extensive collection of books by various authors, was arranged in the college library.

reviews.review_heading: Slightly expensive for studies.
reviews.review_text: Students from different places come here to study, but there is no partiality or discrimination among them. The main aim of the college is to showcase the talents and skills of the students and help them succeed in their careers. But I'm not okay with the hostel food, so I would give it four stars.

reviews.review_heading: NammaPesu: An Honest Take.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good in our college. We have ample space for parking, playing cricket, football, and pretty much every outdoor sport. We also have 3 cafeterias, as well as a hospital upcoming in our campus itself. There is also a dedicated room for yoga, as well as a gym room.

data.description: PES University arranges faculty development programmes and has experienced faculty members. Several worship and seminars are arranged for students and teachers. The university also conducts student exchange programmes and faculty exchange programmes. The faculty at PES University Bangalore are diploma, PhD, and degree holders. The university also invites guest faculty for various lectures and events.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about PES University

likes.text: There are many top companies like Apple, Microsoft, Nvidia, Amazon, Z Scalar, Akamai and others coming to our campus for placements.
PES university is one of the best colleges for computer science placement.

likes.text: There is excellent infrastructure with well-established labs, library sports auditorium, conference hall and, canteen.
The hostel facility is the best in the college, but the food is not so good all though you can manage.

likes.text: The course curriculum is structured to introduce the latest fields and making the students proficient in them before they step into the corporate world.
The faculty members in our college are very good and very helpful, every faculty has great knowledge, and they give a good quality teaching.

Our college organises lots of events, fests, campus surrounding activities as well as market connectivity activities, Even extracurricular activities like dance, sports, etc., are conducted here.

Scholarship Name
Details
Rural Scholarships
Free Engineering education is offered to students belonging to rural backgrounds. This scholarship is offered only to a selected number of students.
Corporate Scholarships
Students studying the final year of education are offered scholarships by many corporates based on their merit.
Distinction Awards

college_info.intro:
NIT Goa popular programmes are BTech & MTech. Engineering students can work as Data Engineers, Software Engineers, Data Scientists, & others. Engineering students are placed in top companies such as L&T, Mphasis, Amazon, Wipro, Deloitte, & others. There are various non-technical jobs that Engineering students can take up after completing their degree course from this college. Some of these are Customer Service Representatives, Sales Representatives, Marketing Managers, & others.
NIT Goa BTech students can also go for the MTech course. NIT Goa BTech students can go for MTech in the same college. Overall, the college is one of the top-ranked colleges present in India. The following are the USPs of joining the Goa NIT:
Few of the college's BTech students have been selected for Prime Minister's Research Fellowship

fees_and_eligibility.overview: NIT Goa offers PG and UG programmes to students. At the UG level, NIT Goa offers BTech courses to students. At the PG level, the college offers MTech programmes for students. The college also provides PhD courses to students. PhD is provided in streams such as Applied Sciences, Engineering, Technology, and Humanities & Social Sciences. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by the National Institute of Technology Goa and their respective eligibility and NIT Goa fees:

faqs.answer: A:    For general/OBC students whose family income is above 5 Lacs per annum is Rs. 66,700 in odd sem and in even is Rs.62,500. And if family income is between 1 Lacs to 5 Lacs then 1/3 of tuition fee and if below 1 Lacs and SC/ST student then full tuition fee exempted.
faqs.question: What is the fees for B.Tech. in Civil Engineering at NIT Goa?

faqs.answer: A:    The National Institute of Technology Goa BTech tuition fee is INR 5 lakh. The fee mentioned here is the total tuition fee taken from an unofficial source. Apart from the tuition fee, a one-time payment of INR 10,000 will also be charged. The one-time fee includes the security deposit (refundable), institute development dees, alumni fees and convocation fees. This given fee is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to revision and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: How much is the NIT Goa BTech fee?

faqs.answer: A:    NIT Goa cutoff 2025 has been released for the round 1. The cutoff has been released for admission to BTech and BArch courses, on the basis of JEE Main scores. The cutoff was released for different categories belonging to the All India and Home State quotas. Among the General AI category candidates, the cutoff ranks varied between 839 and 47246. The  most desired course among the General AI category candidates was BArch. In the BTech specialisations, the most desirable specialisation turned out to be CSE.
faqs.question: What is the cut off of NIT Goa?

faqs.answer: A:    NIT Goa follows the eligibility for admission follows the guidelines issued by the Ministry of Education (MoE), Government of India. For BTech courses, at the time of admission, the candidates should have passed/ appeared and awaiting results of the final examination of the Class 12 or its equivalent with Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry as main subjects of study. Additionally, the candidates must have secured at least an aggregate of 75%. The selection process for BTech at NIT Goa completely depends on the JEE Mains scores achieved by the candidates'.

review_content.Placements: Normally 80 to 90 percent of circuital branch students are placed. The lowest package is around 6 LPA, with the average being 11 LPA. The highest package was 23 LPA this year and 44 LPA the previous year. Companies like Samsung, Infosys, Accenture, and various PSUs come. The roles offered for my course are mostly software developers, as many students prepare for that. Other than that, roles like VLSI engineers are also offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: After switching to the new permanent campus, the infrastructure is top-notch. We have a huge library, department blocks, teaching block, ground, etc. The mess is within hostels. The only drawback is the boys hostel is around a km away from the teaching block, although it's within campus. Therefore, having a bicycle is recommended.

reviews_list.review_title: NITG is definitely one of the developing NITs, as it now has its own new campus.

review_content.Placements: NIT Goa has good placements, and in the branch Civil, it also has good placements. Students got average packages of 13 LPA. Government companies & MNCs do come here for placement. It has good placement of cells, which is very good. All you need is skills. If you have good skills, you will get placed .
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is so good as we shifted to our new campus. So everything on the new campus is new & good. Canteen, medical facility, etc.—everything is good. Faculty members will help you in everything. Also, you will get single rooms from the first year in this NIT, which is a very good thing.

faqs.answer: IIIT Allahabad accpets JEE Main score for admission to the BTech courses. As per the IIIT Allahabad cutoff 2023, the Last Round closing rank for BTech ranged between 5924 and 9558, among which Information Technology was the most competitive specialisation. The Round 1 closing rank for BTech ranged between 4817 and 8428 for BTech. So, considering the previous year Round 1 and the Last Round closing ranks, candidates seeking admission to IIIT Allahabad must secure a rank over and above 4800 and 9600 for the General ALL India category candidates. Candidates can refer to the table given below to check out the 2023 Last Round closing ranks for IIIT Allahabad to get an idea of the ranks required for all the BTech courses offered at this institute: CourseRound 1Last Round B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering84289558B.Tech. in Information Technology48175924B.Tech. in Information Technology (Business Informatics)51626587
faqs.question: Q: How much rank should I score to get IIIT Allahabad?

faqs.answer: National Institute of Technology Goa is ranked 101 - 150 by NIRF 2025 under the Engineering category. NIT Goa was established by an act of parliament (NIT Act 2007) in 2010 and is known as an Institute of National Importance. NIT Goa has workshops and labs and has set up an up-to-date library with high-quality print and electronic resources. There are various resources available in the college for students. The college's placements are good. Hence, NIT Goa is a good college.
faqs.question: Q: Is NIT Goa a good college/institute?

faqs.answer: DASA is the abbreviation for Direct Admission of Students Abroad. Yes, candidates can get direct admission to BTech courses through DASA at NIT Goa but the seats allocated through DASA are only reserved for Foreign Nationals / Persons of Indian Origin (PIOs) / Non-Resident Indians (NRIs), not for every student. However, for admission through DASA candidates are required to qualify for their basic eligibility criteria that state: Admissions are based on SAT scores, and candidates need a valid SAT subject test score in Mathematics Level 2, Physics, and Chemistry.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission to B.Tech course at NIT Goa through DASA?

faqs.answer: To get a seat at NIT Goa for BTech specialisations, candidate must attain the rank as per the category they belong to. NIT Goa JEE Main cutoff 2025 was released for the first round. As per the cutoff for the General AI category candidates, the closing ranks in round 1 varied between 11696 and 34130. Looking at the cutoff ranks, it can be said that getting admission to NIT Goa at 25000 rank is easy. Though the choice of specialisation would be limited at this rank. Given below is branch-wise cutoff for NIT Goa with respect to the General AI category candidates, to have an idea of the choice of specialisation available at this rank:Course2025B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering11696B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering15345B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering20583B.Tech. in Civil Engineering34130B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering27118
faqs.question: Q: Can I get NIT Goa with 25000 rank?

review_summary.college_name: NIT Goa Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: NIT Goa has shifted to the new campus.

content.Placements: Last year and the year before the placements were not that high but generally a lot of companies visit our college for placements and hire a good number of students. In 2022, the campus placements for CSE, ECE, and EEE were almost 100%. Almost all students got internships but it is generally off-campus.
content.Infrastructure: NIT Goa has shifted to the new campus in 2023. So everything is new and it has fresh infrastructure. We have a 2-floor library, one with books and one as a study hall. Lab equipment and classrooms are brand new. I would rate 2.5 out of 5 for the quality of mess food. Medical facilities are great. We have a separate building for it and a 24x7 ambulance near hostels. We have a very big ground for games. We have a basketball ground and a volleyball court. Inside the hostel, we have a badminton court.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: NIT GOA's genuine review.

content.Placements: Placement scenes in NIT Goa are average. The highest package in NIT Goa is 44 LPA, while the average package is around 8 LPA, and the lowest package is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are ORACLE, TCS, and NSE. 100% of students who appear for placements get placed, while some opt for off-campus placement too.
content.Infrastructure: As our college is newly built in January 2024, so infrastructure is top-notch. We have more than enough Wi-Fi routers right in front of our room and in every building. We have all types of labs for all branches of students, and we have a proper library having all books that are required. The best part is single rooms in hostels.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: NITG is definitely one of the developing NITs, as it now has its own new campus.

content.Placements: NIT Goa has good placements, and in the branch Civil, it also has good placements. Students got average packages of 13 LPA. Government companies & MNCs do come here for placement. It has good placement of cells, which is very good. All you need is skills. If you have good skills, you will get placed .
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is so good as we shifted to our new campus. So everything on the new campus is new & good. Canteen, medical facility, etc.—everything is good. Faculty members will help you in everything. Also, you will get single rooms from the first year in this NIT, which is a very good thing.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good experience, good faculty for core branches and good placement records.

content.Placements: Around 95% of students were placed in good companies like Amazon, NSE, Oracle, Samsung, Intel, etc. with an average package of 15–16 LPA. The highest package offered was 44 LPA by Amazon. Meanwhile, the lowest package offered to 6 LPAs by L&T was the management post. Currently, the institute has tie-ups with NIO and Persistent Technologies, which offer internship programs to students.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel's condition is decent. Wi-Fi, due to being BSNL, fluctuates a lot but is decent whenever required. But if the network goes down, it takes a lot of time to bring it up. This makes it difficult for the students to sometimes complete their assignments.

admission_overview.college_name: NIT Goa Admission 2026: Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Application

admission_overview.title: NIT Goa Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: NIT Goa admissions are entrance-based. Admission to its flagship BTech course is based on JEE Main scores followed by JoSAA Counselling. With large number of applicants applying for JEE Main and limited BTech seats, admission can be competitive. The closing JEE Main cutoff for a popular specialisation like CSE was 17448 in 2025. NIT Goa also offers MTech and PhD programmes. Admission to MTech is based on GATE scores. The institute conducts a written test followed by PI round for admission to PhD.

eligibility_selection.title: NIT Goa Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: NIT Goa offers BTech, MTech and PhD courses in the Engineering stream. Candidates must meet he eligibility and appear for the accepted entrance exam for admission. Check below the eligibility and selection criteria for NIT Goa courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with PCM with a minimum of 75% aggregate
BE/BTech in relevant subject with a minimum 60% aggregate or 6.5 CGPA
Bachelor's and master's degree (ME or MTech) in relevant discipline with at least 60% aggregate (6.0 CGPA or 55% aggregate for SC/ ST)
courses_table.selection_criteria: GATE/ UGC/NET/CSIR/DST-INSPIRE/ NBHM or any other equivalent/ written test + PI

faqs.answer: To get a seat at NIT Goa for BTech specialisations, candidate must attain the rank as per the category they belong to. NIT Goa JEE Main cutoff 2025 was released for the first round. As per the cutoff for the General AI category candidates, the closing ranks in round 1 varied between 11696 and 34130. Looking at the cutoff ranks, it can be said that getting admission to NIT Goa at 25000 rank is easy. Though the choice of specialisation would be limited at this rank. Given below is branch-wise cutoff for NIT Goa with respect to the General AI category candidates, to have an idea of the choice of specialisation available at this rank:Course2025B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering11696B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering15345B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering20583B.Tech. in Civil Engineering34130B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering27118
faqs.question: Can I get NIT Goa with  25000 rank?

faqs.answer: Candidates must pass BE/BTech in relevant subject with a minimum 60% aggregate or 6.5 CGPA to apply for M.Tech programme at NIT Goa. Aspirants must also have GATE scores for admission. Candidates without GATE scores need to appear for written test conducted by the institute.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for M.Tech at NIT Goa?

faqs.answer: Aspirants without GATE scores can get admission at NIT Goa. Such candidates need to fill out the institute-level form and appear for written test conducted by the institute. NIT Goa releases the test results on the official website.
faqs.question: Can I get admission in M.Tech at NIT Goa without GATE?

paragraphs: National Institute of Technology Goa admission processincludes application process, selection round, cutoff, merit list, and counselling. Aspirants have to apply for the accepted entrance exam for admission. Check below the steps to get a seat in the institute:
1- NIT Goa Application Process 2026

Candidates seeking admission at NIT Goa are required to complete the application form for the course-specific entrance exam. After appearing for the respective entrance exams, candidates have to apply for the counselling process for the final seat allotment. However, candidates seeking admission toPhDcourses can visit the official website ofNIT Goaand apply for the programme directly. Candidates without GATE scores need to fill out the institute form for MTech.
2- Selection Rounds

NIT Goa shortlists candidates based on valid scores obtained by them in the relevant entrance exams. For its flagship BTech course, NIT Goa admits students with a valid JEE Main score. Admission to MTech is throughGATE, followed byCCMT Counselling. Aspirants without GATE scores have to appear for written test conducted by the institute for admission. Candidates have to appear for a written test followed by PI for admission to PhD courses. The institute releases the result of written test online.
3- Release of Cutoff list, Counselling & Admission Confirmation

The respective counselling bodies release the cutoff for BTech and MTech courses. Aspirants with scores equal or aboveNIT Goa cutoffare allotted seat. In case MTech seats remain vacant after CCMT Counselling, aspirants have to fill out the form for Spot Admission. Aspirants who are allotted seat have to report at the campus for document verification and fee payment.

Candidates are offered seat in UG and PG courses based on entrance exam scores. Selected aspirants need to pay the course fees to confirm their seat. The fees at NIT Goa is quite affordable considering the technical courses offered by the institute. Below isNIT Goa feesand intake:
BTech via JoSAA-224
BTech via DASA-34
For more information aboutNIT Goacheck out the below videos:

faqs.question: How to get admission to the NIT Goa BTech course?
faqs.answer: NIT Goa offers a four-year full-time BTech course at the undergraduate level. NIT Goa BTech admission is completely entrance-based and depends on candidates' performance in the JEE Main entrance exam, followed by theJoint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA)counselling. The JoSAA counselling begins in September. There will be 6 rounds of seat allotment.

faqs.question: What is the JEE Main 2026 exam date for Session 2 ?
faqs.answer: NTA has announced the JEE Main 2026 exam date for Session 2. JEE Main 2026 Session 2 exam will be held from2nd April 2026to9th April 2026. The JEE Main Application Form 2026 for Session 2 will be available on the website.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria to get admission to B.Tech at NIT Goa?
faqs.answer: NIT Goa follows the eligibility for admission follows the guidelines issued by the Ministry of Education (MoE), Government of India. For BTech courses, at the time of admission, the candidates should have passed/ appeared and awaiting results of the final examination of the Class 12 or its equivalent with Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry as main subjects of study. Additionally, the candidates must have secured at least an aggregate of 75%. The selection process for BTech at NIT Goa completely depends on the JEE Mains scores achieved by the candidates'.

placement_report.college_name: NIT Goa Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package & Top Companies

placement_data.title: NIT Goa Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: NIT Goa placement cell invites the companies for campus recruitment, organizing pre-placement talks, interviews and corporate interaction. NIT Goa placement report for 2025 has not been released however, during the NIT Goa placements 2024, overall 127 students from BTech and MTech courses secured placements. Additionally, 200 offers were extended to these students. The overall highest and average package recorded during NIT Goa placements 2024 was INR 35 LPA and INR 9 LPA, respectively.

For BTech the highest and average package stood at INR 20 LPA and INR 7.69 LPA , respectively. Further, the placement rate recorded for BTech was 87.03% . For MTech the highest package recorded was INR 35 LPA which was given to ECE department . Whereas the average package stood at INR 12.5 LPA. The placement rate achieved for MTech was 91.66%.
