description: NIT Goa cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the NIT Goa JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last nine years of NIT Goa JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

NIT Goa JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the NIT Goa CSE cutoff 2025 was 17448 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branches, such as ECE and Mechanical, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission were 24056 and 43265, respectively for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank fo

For the General AI category students, the NIT Goa B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 17448 and 57181 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 17448 and 24056, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at NIT Goa. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at NIT Goa to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of NIT Goa. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and M.Tech. in VLSI Design with last round cutoff scores of 503 and 452, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 503. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 323 and 456 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at NIT Goa - National Institute of Technology. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

NIT Goa also accepts DASA UG scores for BE/ BTech and BArch admission. Candidates seeking admission to NIT Goa can refer to the table given below to check out the DASA UG previous year cutoffs for the General category students:

Considering the last round of NIT Goa CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Computer Science and Engineering and VLSI Design, witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branch such as Power Electronics and Power Systems had comparatively relaxed cutoff score for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

The reasons for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies include its academic reputation, top-notch faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. NIT Goa has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Engineering' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for NIT Goa indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. So far the existing hostels are provided with the basic amenities like mess and Wi-Fi internet connectivity. NIT Goa is having highly qualified faculty from IITs, NITs and reputed universities.

library.description: The Library of the Institute has a collection of more than 6500 books. The Library subscribes the databases of e-journals which are available at the campus on the intranet. IEEE Explore Digital Library provides web access to more than 3-million full-text e-documents from some of the world's most highly cited publications in electrical engineering, computer science, and electronics.

reviews.review_heading: NIT Goa has shifted to the new campus.
reviews.review_text: NIT Goa has shifted to the new campus in 2023. So everything is new and it has fresh infrastructure. We have a 2-floor library, one with books and one as a study hall. Lab equipment and classrooms are brand new. I would rate 2.5 out of 5 for the quality of mess food. Medical facilities are great. We have a separate building for it and a 24x7 ambulance near hostels. We have a very big ground for games. We have a basketball ground and a volleyball court. Inside the hostel, we have a badminton cour...

reviews.review_heading: NIT GOA's genuine review.
reviews.review_text:
As our college is newly built in January 2024, so infrastructure is top-notch. We have more than enough Wi-Fi routers right in front of our room and in every building. We have all types of labs for all branches of students, and we have a proper library having all books that are required.
The best part is single rooms in hostels.

reviews.review_heading: National Institute of Technology, Goa is one of the emerging NIT.
reviews.review_text: After switching to the new permanent campus, the infrastructure is top-notch. We have a huge library, department blocks, teaching block, ground, etc. The mess is within hostels. The only drawback is the boys hostel is around a km away from the teaching block, although it's within campus. Therefore, having a bicycle is recommended.

reviews.review_heading: NITG is definitely one of the developing NITs, as it now has its own new campus.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is so good as we shifted to our new campus. So everything on the new campus is new & good. 
Canteen, medical facility, etc.—everything is good. Faculty members will help you in everything. Also, you will get single rooms from the first year in this NIT, which is a very good thing.

reviews.review_heading: Good experience, good faculty for core branches and good placement records.
reviews.review_text: The hostel's condition is decent. Wi-Fi, due to being BSNL, fluctuates a lot but is decent whenever required. But if the network goes down, it takes a lot of time to bring it up. This makes it difficult for the students to sometimes complete their assignments.

reviews.review_heading: NIT Goa, the new campus phase begins.
reviews.review_text: As the current campus is our transmit campus, we have limited infrastructure and hostel facilities. I would have been happy to write this review after about one month, as we are shifting to our permanent campus on January 7, 2024. The infrastructure there and the hostel facilities are more than enough to raise our ranking.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
The temporary campus was not that good but now we are shifting to the new campus. By the looks of it, it is going to be much better. The meal is not that good but the food doesn't taste so bad.
Things are going to improve as we shift to the new campus starting this semester.

reviews.review_heading: Poor temporary campus, but good placements in past 3 years and the opening of new campus .
reviews.review_text:
The permanent campus has all the facilities in terms of academics and sports will be opened soon, hostel is okay as of now.
The Wi-Fi facility is okay not very fast not very slow. 
The hostel rooms are very compact with 4 people in one room. 
The mess is very nice the only good thing in the campus of now 
2 volleyball courts one football ground, medical room and majority popular sports like cricket football kabaddi volleyball and badminton are available .
A badminton court is also there in the m...

reviews.review_heading: Great Place to Study and Enjoy.
reviews.review_text: NIT Goa is currently operating from a temporary campus in Farmagudi as of 2023, but it is shifting to its permanent campus in 2024. So facilities were limited there. Limited means all these above-mentioned things are there, but on a limited scale. The hostels are good and provide cheap and healthy food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Labs are well-equipped with air-conditioners. The library has many books. It has a good sitting arrangement. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. The girls' hostel is good. They provide single rooms for girls. The boys' hostel is average. Around 3 boys can stay in each room.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent placements and encouraging teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities and infrastructure are limited. Our classrooms are air-conditioned and equipped with projectors. Wi-Fi is available. The library is equipped with reference books related to undergraduate courses, newspapers, inspiring magazines, and books for other entrance exam preparations. Laboratories are good. Hostel rooms are limited. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is average. Medical facilities are available. There is a huge playground for sports and other cul...

reviews.review_heading: Review of NIT Goa - National Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: This college is working on the temporary campus located at Phona But all facilities are available. Laboratory is well-equipped. There are 5 departments like computer science, electrical, electronics, mechanical, and civil. There are 3 departments for masters like CSE, PEPS, and VLSI.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with placements but infrastructure is not good.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is very small as it is on a temporary campus. Classrooms have air-conditioners. Wi-Fi is available on campus. Hostel is not good and the food quality is very poor. New campus will have all the facilities. Students are not sent to Inter NIT sports because it is held far from our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Everything seemed good after 2 years of online classes.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are okay. Single rooms are allotted to girls not the case in the boys' hostel. There is no Wi-Fi in the girls' hostel, also you cannot expect good food from the mess. Other facilities like medical facilities, sports and games are at an average level.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good placements and campus life is great.
reviews.review_text: The laboratories are well-equipped with the instruments students need. The only drawback is the quantity of them. Students have very good air-conditioned classrooms and a hostel with shared rooms of 3 students. This college and hostel are well-equipped with a Wi-Fi facility and guards.

college_info.intro:
NIT Mizoram offers a wide range of courses at the UG, PG, and doctoral levels through its various departments including Chemistry, Civil Engineering, Physics, Humanities & Social Science, Computer Science & Engineering, and others.
The BTech programmes offered by the National Institute of Technology Mizoram is highly popular due to their promising career prospects. The institute offers BTech specialisation in Civil Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Mathematics & Computing. NIT Mizoram offers BTech courses for four-year to eight semesters. The curriculum of the programme has been developed and upgraded to enhance the knowledge of students through fundamental understanding and problem-solving abilities. Chekc out the below video to know more about courses offered by NIT Mizoram:

faqs.answer: A:    NIT Mizoram JEE Main cutoff 2025 has been released for round 1. The cutoff was released for candidates belonging to the All India quota. Among the General AI category candidates, the closing ranks in round 1 varied between 20801 and 51888. Among the OBC AI category candidates, the cutoff ranks varied between 10144 and 16248. Apart from General and OBC category, the cutoff was released for SC, ST, and other categories. Candidates can check all the information for NIT Mizoram JEE Main cutoff here.In the table given below, students can find the branch-wise NIT Mizoram 2025 cutoff, for the General AI category candidates:Course2025B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering31124B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering38127B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering46244B.Tech. in Civil Engineering51888B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing20801B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering42626B.Tech. in Chemical Science and Technology39552
faqs.question: What is the cutoff for NIT Mizoram?

faqs.answer: A:    To get into NIT Mizoram, candidates must have attained the rank as per the JEE Main cutoff list. As per the last round for the General AI category candidates, the cutoff varied between 31124 in the first round and 108842 in the last round. Hence, to get admission at NIT Mizoram, a candidate must have a rank of at least 108842.For more information, candidates can click here.
faqs.question: What are the minimum marks required to get a seat at NIT Mizoram?

faqs.answer: A:    The NIT Mizoram University does not take any direct admissions. In order to take admission for any engineering course in NIT Mizoram one has to undergo JEE Mains examination, and has to score a valid ranking according to the cutoff released. This is followed by JoSAA counseling and CSAB counseling. Eligibility criteria includes 75% aggregate in 12th class and JEE Mains score.
faqs.question: Can I join NIT Mizoram directly?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for the four-year BTech programme spread over eight semesters at NIT Mizoram is INR 5 lakh. This fee, however, is been obtained from unofficial sources. Hence, is indicative. For the exact fee, students are advised to reach out to the admission office via call or in person or visit the official website. In addition to the tuition fee, students are also required to pay the application fee for JEE Main which is INR 1,000 for boys and INR 800 for girls.

review_content.Placements: I can tell the placement happened here, and also good kind of placement. But it is limited to few companies and little to no tech giants. The placement percentage is exceptionally good. We just have to work really hard here because there is certainty that we will be placed but package depends on our hardwork.

review_content.Placements: Last year, more than 90 percent of students were placed. Right now, the highest package is 21 LPA, the lowest is 4 LPA, and the average package is 9 LPA. Our top recruiting companies are Juspay, Vedanta, Adani Wilmar, etc. Many of our students get internships in companies and colleges like BIS, NTPC, NITs, and IITs.

faqs.answer: NIT Mizoram is one of the newly established NITs in 2010. The best part about this university is it's scenic location. It's new establishment does not get in the way of its academic expertise. Being located in one of the most educated states of our country with a literacy rate of 91%, the university offers a wide range of BTech M.Tech and PhD courses in the field of engineering. Even though the university does not have a permanent campus yet the infrastructure including the classrooms, laboratories are very well-equipped for student's hands-on learning and research purpose. The university offers excellent placements through the top recruiting companies giving a high salary package to at least 60% of the students.The flagship course offered by the university is BTech computer Science engineering. All the expiring engineering students can definitely count on NIT Mizoram.
faqs.question: Q: What is unique about NIT Mizoram?

faqs.answer: Yes, it is possible to get admission to NIT Mizoram with a rank of 50000. NIT Mizoram JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the General AI category ranged between 548694 and 1314967. Looking at the cutoff range, we can say that getting into NIT Mizoram at 50000 rank is possible among the General AI category candidates.Note: While admission is possible, it may not guarantee admission for every branch under the General AI category. Other categories, quotas, etc, will have different cutoffs.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get admission to NIT Mizoram with a rank of 50000?

faqs.answer: NIT Mizoram admissions is entrance-based. For admission to its BTech programme National Institute of Technology Mizoram accepts the JEE Main scores followed by the Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) counselling. For admission at MTech programmes, NIT Mizoram accepts the GATE scores, respectively. After qualifying for the respective entrance exams, interested candidates must apply for the relevant counselling sessions such as JoSAA, CCMT, and others to gain admission.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth joining NIT Mizoram?
overview_faqs.answer: As per the data collated from verified students' reviews published on Shiksha, students of NIT Mizoram have received placement opportunities from companies, such as Amazon, Flipkart, TCS and Wipro, among others. While the students in their reviews mention that 40-100% of students get placement opportunities every year under different BTech specialisations, the NIRF report of 2022 provides data that only 30% of students (30 out of 97) got placed via the campus. Additionally, the median package stood at INR 6.80 LPA. Hence, keeping the NIT tag in mind and medium-level placement opportunities at a location far away from metro cities, NIT Mizoram can be considered a decent option for education. Check below for more reviews by the prominent students of NIT Mizoram for the BTech course:

review_summary.college_name: NIT Mizoram Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A college with beautiful scenery and peaceful life.

content.Placements: Since it's a third-tier college, it doesn't have many valuable placements. As it's a nationally recognised institute, top students get around above 12 LPA, while students with average grades just pass by 6 LPA-8 LPA. There are not many reputed companies coming to this college. If you have skills/talent and want to take your college life peacefully with a little more effort made in JEE preparation, then this is a good college for you.
content.Infrastructure: So about the hostel, first of all, the view from the balcony is the best, trust me, you will not be disappointed. Rooms are pretty much spacious. Just the food and water supply are the main problems, food is edible, it's not that bad, though. Water is supplied by trucks or tempos to the hostel. Electricity is almost 24/7. Wi-Fi speed is decent, but one may face problems with it on particular floors. Hostels are divided into 4 parts. Hostel 3 is for all first-year boys, while hostels 1 and 2 are combined for the rest of the year boys. There are only 2 girls' hostels.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: NIT Mizoram review: peaceful campus and growing opportunities.

content.Placements: Placement of NIT Mizoram is good. 80 to 90% of students are placed. The average package is 8 LPA, and many companies are visiting the campus like Wipro, TCS, Infosys, etc. This year, one student got an internship at Nvidia. Placement is improving year by year, and on-campus internships are being provided by companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at NIT Mizoram is decent and improving year by year. Classrooms are clean and well-maintained, and laboratories are adequately equipped for regular academic work. The library has sufficient books for students. Hostel facilities are basic but comfortable, with regular water and electricity supply. Wi-Fi is available but not working properly. The mess food quality is average and manageable. The campus is peaceful, safe, and surrounded by natural beauty, which provides a good environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A rapidly improving new gen NIT in Northeast India.

content.Placements: I can tell the placement happened here, and also good kind of placement. But it is limited to few companies and little to no tech giants. The placement percentage is exceptionally good. We just have to work really hard here because there is certainty that we will be placed but package depends on our hardwork.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel and its facilities are actually really good ofcourse it's an NIT but sometimes water issues are there. Some people may not like the food on some days of week. We have a restaurant down the hostel so hostel life is good. Doctor is available 24X7, and medical facility is actually free. There is a little Wi-Fi issue in hostel but in college it works really fine.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: How life goes in NIT Mizoram.

content.Placements: Last year, more than 90 percent of students were placed. Right now, the highest package is 21 LPA, the lowest is 4 LPA, and the average package is 9 LPA. Our top recruiting companies are Juspay, Vedanta, Adani Wilmar, etc. Many of our students get internships in companies and colleges like BIS, NTPC, NITs, and IITs.
content.Infrastructure: To be honest, our college doesn't have a campus, but we have proper labs, classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a library. Hostel facilities are good, with good maintenance. Geysers, fans, and beds are provided by the college. The food quality is good, but the taste is average. There is a medical help center that every student can access. Our college also encourages students to participate in sports events like Inter NITs and conducts a sports fest every year.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It has a good academic environment and a growing infrastructure.

content.Placements: I am currently pursuing B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing. Students get placed in my course. The highest package is 46 LPA, and the lowest package is 9.7 LPA. The average package is 15.3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: There are separate hostels for both boys and girls with good security and 24x7 Wi-Fi. It has clean and spacious rooms either single or shared with necessary furniture. The water environment is peaceful, making it ideal for students. The mess is also good. It has high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity across the campus.
content.Other: The campus has a diverse student community from different states of India. It has supportive faculty members and seniors who help juniors in academics and projects.

admission_overview.college_name: NIT Mizoram NIT Mizoram Admission 2025: Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Application

paragraphs: NIT Mizoram admissionto its UG, PG, and doctoral programmes is offered on the basis ofnational-level entrance exams. The college provides a wide range of UG, PG and Doctoral-level courses in the field ofEngineeringthrough nine departments.NIT Mizoramalso hosts a Social Science and Humanities department which offers only doctoral-level degrees. Students can opt for any one of the BTech streams depending on their JEE Main scores. However, the final seat allotment for BTech is done via JoSAA and CSAB Counselling. Read on to know more about NIT Mizoram admission to its flagship BTech and other MTech and PhD courses.
NIT Mizoram Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection

NIT Mizoram offers BTech, MTech, and PhD courses. Students are selected on the basis of valid scores in respective entrance exams. These entrance exams along with course duration and course fee ofNIT Mizoram coursesare given in the table below:
Eligibility & Selection
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with 75% aggregate
JEE Main+JoSAA Counselling/CSAB Counselling
Any 4-year UG degree
GATE+CCMT Counselling
Master's degree with 60% aggregate
GATE/UGC NET/ Written exam by NIT Mizoram+ Interview
NOTE:The information mentioned above is sourced from various sources. Hence, is indicative.
Download:NIT Mizoram Fee Pdf
The NIT Mizoram admission process is different for every course. The procedure includes registration, selection rounds, cutoff, merit list release, and counselling.
Step 1: NIT Mizoram Application Process 2025

For admission to NIT Mizoram, candidates must complete the application process of the course-specific entrance test. Aspirants have to visit the respective exam conducting body's official website to apply. ForNIT Mizoram PhD course admission, candidates must visit the institute's official website (nitp.ac.in) to apply.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

For its flagship BTech course, theNIT Mizoram admission processis based on merit in JEE Main score followed by JoSAA Counselling. In addition, admission to MTech is through GATE, followed by CCMT Counselling. Admission through centralised counselling is carried out for MPlan and MArch through CCMT counselling.
Step 3: Release of Cutoff list, Counselling

A course-wise merit list is released to indicate the minimum marks required for admission. The shortlisted candidates then have to take part in the respective counselling process, such as JoSAA for BTech, CCMT for MTech, and CCMN for MSc.
Step 4: Admission Confirmation
After the final selection rounds the aspiring candidates can pay NIT Mizoram Admission fee to Secure their seats.

The preparation for JEE Main begins two years in advance. It is a national-level exam, which can be passed with a good base of concepts and preparation. Candidates can ace the JEE Main 2025 exam for BTech admission at NIT Mizoram with a good preparation strategy. Some preparation tips are mentioned below:
Check out the below video for more information:

headings.text: Steps for NIT Mizoram Admission Process 2025
How can I prepare for admission to NIT Mizoram?

lists: Cross-checksection-wise weightage & syllabus for all subjects covered in JEE Main
Solve as many Mock Tests as possible. Shiksha.com is providing aFREEDownloadable JEE Main Mock Test Paper (with Solutions). Visit the link to download it now!
Solve previous year’sJEE question papers; there are high chances of getting questions from there

To secure admission into prestigious institutions such as the IITs, NITs and IIITs, it is essential for the aspirants to have a strong command of the material taught in their class 11 and class 12. Shiksha is offering free NCERT questions and solutions to aid JEE candidates in excelling in these classes.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at NIT Mizoram?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the four-year BTech programme spread over eight semesters at NIT Mizoram is INR 5 lakh. This fee, however, is been obtained from unofficial sources. Hence, is indicative. For the exact fee, students are advised to reach out to the admission office via call or in person or visit the official website. In addition to the tuition fee, students are also required to pay the application fee for JEE Main which is INR 1,000 for boys and INR 800 for girls.

faqs.question: How can I apply for admission to NIT Mizoram for BTech?
faqs.answer: Students seeking admission to NIT Mizoram for BTech are selected via JoSSA Counselling on the basis of their JEE Main scores/rank. After the same, they are required to report at NIT Mizoram campus on the announced date with all the required documents. To start the process, students must begin with the JEE Main application process. The process of application for JEE Main 2023 is inclusive of three major steps, i.eregistration, form filling & document uploadfollowed bypayment of application fees.

faqs.question: What is the fee for NIT Mizoram?
faqs.answer: The fees for studying B.Tech in NIT MIZORAM is Rs. 95,750 per semester including the tuition fees.Category Benefits for students.Scheduled Caste/ Scheduled Tribe/ Physically Handicapped gets 100% tuition fee waiver.Economically backward students (whose family income is less than Rs.1 Lacs per annum) gets full remission of the Fee.Other economically backward students (whose family income is between Rs.1 Lacs to Rs.5 Lacs per annum) 2/3rd of the fee.

faqs.question: Can I join NIT Mizoram directly?
faqs.answer: The NIT Mizoram University does not take any direct admissions. In order to take admission for any engineering course in NIT Mizoram one has to undergo JEE Mains examination, and has to score a valid ranking according to the cutoff released. This is followed by JoSAA counseling and CSAB counseling. Eligibility criteria includes 75% aggregate in 12th class and JEE Mains score.

faqs.question: How can I get into NIT Mizoram for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer: NIT Mizoram admissions is entrance-based. For admission to its BTech programme National Institute of Technology Mizoram accepts the JEE Main scores followed by the Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) counselling. For admission at MTech programmes, NIT Mizoram accepts the GATE scores, respectively. After qualifying for the respective entrance exams, interested candidates must apply for the relevant counselling sessions such as JoSAA, CCMT, and others to gain admission.

placement_report.college_name: NIT Mizoram Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: NIT Mizoram Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The highest package grabbed by students during NIT Mizoram placement 2025 stood at INR 35 LPA . The overall placement rate recorded was 93.1%. Further, the placement percentage recorded for CSE, EE, ECE, CE and ME branch stood at 97%, 93%, 89%, 93% and 93%, respectively.

NIT Mizoram has a placement Cell responsible for securing attractive career opportunities for students. The institute invites companies from different sectors to conduct the placement process at the Campus premises. The placed students also get the opportunity to do their final project in the placed company as an intern with a stipend at this phase. After successful completion of the internship, the students can get full-time employment. The NIT placement depends on various factors such as the brand value of the institute, industry demand, skills of the students, etc.

Earlier, NIT Mizoram concluded the placements for the batch passed out in 2024 with 86% placement rate . As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during NIT Mizoram placements 2024 stood at INR 14.5 LPA and INR 7.02 LPA, respectively. A total of 75 students registered for the NIT Mizoram placements 2024, of which 75 students were placed in reputed companies. Additionally, 100% of the CE, ME and EEE branch students were placed in 2024, whereas 63% of the CSE and 80% of the ECE branch students were placed in top companies . The top recruiters of NIT Mizoram in 2024 included Deloitte, Tech Mahindra, L&T, Adobe, KEC, Ashoka Leyland, Alston, Vedanta , etc.

description: NIT Mizoram cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the NIT Mizoram JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last nine years of NIT Mizoram JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

NIT Mizoram JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the NIT Mizoram CSE cutoff 2025 was 55951 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branches, such as ECE and Mechanical, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission were 74136 and 100793, respectively for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutof

For the General AI category students, the NIT Mizoram B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 55951 and 108842 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 55951 and 66692, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at NIT Mizoram. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at NIT Mizoram to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of NIT Mizoram. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Thermal Engineering and M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering with last round cutoff scores of 380 and 367, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 380. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 334 and 335 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at NIT Mizoram - National Institute of Technology. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

Considering the last round of NIT Mizoram CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Thermal Engineering and Computer Science and Engineering, witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branch such as Microelectronics and VLSI Design had comparatively relaxed cutoff score for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

reviews.review_heading: A college with beautiful scenery and peaceful life.
reviews.review_text: So about the hostel, first of all, the view from the balcony is the best, trust me, you will not be disappointed. Rooms are pretty much spacious. Just the food and water supply are the main problems, food is edible, it's not that bad, though. Water is supplied by trucks or tempos to the hostel. Electricity is almost 24/7. Wi-Fi speed is decent, but one may face problems with it on particular floors. Hostels are divided into 4 parts. Hostel 3 is for all first-year boys, while hostels 1 and 2 are ...

reviews.review_heading: NIT Mizoram review: peaceful campus and growing opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at NIT Mizoram is decent and improving year by year. Classrooms are clean and well-maintained, and laboratories are adequately equipped for regular academic work. The library has sufficient books for students. Hostel facilities are basic but comfortable, with regular water and electricity supply. Wi-Fi is available but not working properly. The mess food quality is average and manageable. The campus is peaceful, safe, and surrounded by natural beauty, which provides a good env...

reviews.review_heading: A rapidly improving new gen NIT in Northeast India.
reviews.review_text: Hostel and its facilities are actually really good ofcourse it's an NIT but sometimes water issues are there. Some people may not like the food on some days of week. We have a restaurant down the hostel so hostel life is good. Doctor is available 24X7, and medical facility is actually free. There is a little Wi-Fi issue in hostel but in college it works really fine.

reviews.review_heading: How life goes in NIT Mizoram.
reviews.review_text: To be honest, our college doesn't have a campus, but we have proper labs, classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a library. Hostel facilities are good, with good maintenance. Geysers, fans, and beds are provided by the college. The food quality is good, but the taste is average. There is a medical help center that every student can access. Our college also encourages students to participate in sports events like Inter NITs and conducts a sports fest every year.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good academic environment and a growing infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There are separate hostels for both boys and girls with good security and 24x7 Wi-Fi. It has clean and spacious rooms either single or shared with necessary furniture. The water environment is peaceful, making it ideal for students. The mess is also good. It has high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity across the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, National Institute of Technology is a good college for B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: Extracurricular activities at NIT Mizoram have a vibrant student life. There are many clubs and organizations that students can join. These clubs organize a variety of events, including cultural events, technical events, and sports events. Students can also participate in various competitions and workshops.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: College does not have a permanent campus. However, there are different blocks for different departments. Each block consists of Wi-Fi for students. There is a central library as well. Classrooms have smartboards. There is a medical professional available at the college as well. Buses are provided for students to pick and drop them from college to hostel and vice versa. Mess is also available where breakfast, lunch, and dinner are served.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good college to consider if you are not getting other good colleges. Just go for it.
reviews.review_text: NIT Mizoram doesn't have it's permanent campus for now. We do feel its consequences. Different blocks are a bit far away so you have to travel quite changing blocks. This is the major lag of this college. Talking about classrooms, the size is small and not well-equipped even just feels like average sitting there. Labs are good and well-equipped. Professors guide us nicely there. Hostels are average. You will get basic facilities of course. But didn't expect much. The mess is average. We can surv...

reviews.review_heading: BASED ON NIT MIZORAM Review.
reviews.review_text: Lab, the classroom is okay. Ultimately, if you want to study, then no matter how the classroom is. And the hostel is good for girls and there are no sports activities for girls. But on sports day, you enjoy a little more. But if you want campus life, then it is not perfect for you.

reviews.review_heading: If you want NIT tag then come otherwise not.
reviews.review_text: It's not that good in infrastructure because NIT Mizoram has no permanent campus and no own building. There isn't even a temporary campus here. But if you want the NIT tag, then it's good. The hostel is not that good in terms of facilities, but for living purposes, you can adjust.

reviews.review_heading: One semester experience in NIT Mizoram
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure in NIT Mizoram is decent—not too bad, not too good. It is okay, but the Wi-Fi is slow, and the labs are good. However, the classrooms need work. The hostel facility is not good because sometimes we face a shortage of water.

reviews.review_heading: It has good teaching staff members and providing knowledge is the ultimate goal here.
reviews.review_text: The quality of food served is good. Bathrooms are not cleaned regularly. The ratio of bathrooms to students is 1:10 so they should clean bathrooms twice a week.

reviews.review_heading: Review of National Institute of Technology,  mizoram.
reviews.review_text: Since it is a hill area, network issues are there. But they provide Wi-Fi here, and sometimes Wi-Fi works slowly. Hostels are on the average side. Food is also not convincing, and since it is in the North, students can't even like food outside. Students don't get a homely feel.

reviews.review_heading: My review on NIT Mizoram.
reviews.review_text: Since it is a hill area, the network is not that good. They provide Wi-Fi, but sometimes the network is slow. The infrastructure is average since it is a hill area and a temporary campus. The food here in the North is not acceptable. Every day there are potatoes in the mess, and the food is not that good.

reviews.review_heading: Bad college, but good nature.
reviews.review_text: Very bad quality of food is available here in the mess. Wi-Fi is too slow in Aizawl; the network connection is very bad at times. The climate is also challenging here in Aizawl. Classrooms have no fans and are very uneasy to sit in. The library is quite large; we can get any type of book there, but we have to reenter it monthly. paragraphs: The total tuition fee for the four-year BTech programme spread over eight semesters at NIT Mizoram is INR 5 lakh. This fee, however, is been obtained from unofficial sources. Hence, is indicative. For the exact fee, students are advised to reach out to the admission office via call or in person or visit the official website. In addition to the tuition fee, students are also required to pay the application fee for JEE Main which is INR 1,000 for boys and INR 800 for girls.
The fees for studying B.Tech in NIT MIZORAM is Rs. 95,750 per semester including the tuition fees.
Category Benefits for students.
Scheduled Caste/ Scheduled Tribe/ Physically Handicapped gets 100% tuition fee waiver.
Economically backward students (whose family income is less than Rs.1 Lacs per annum) gets full remission of the Fee.
Other economically backward students (whose family income is between Rs.1 Lacs to Rs.5 Lacs per annum) 2/3rd of the fee.

college_info.intro:
NIT Nagaland provides undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programmes to students. The courses provided by the Institute include BTech, MTech, MSc, PhD, etc. Moreover, BTech is the flagship course at NIT Nagaland. The institute offers the BTech programme in 6 specialisations for a duration of 4 years. Some of the NIT Nagaland BTech specialisations are listed below:
National Institute of Technology Nagaland is also known for its MTech programme offered in four specialisations, namely Computer Science and Engineering, Power Systems Engineering, Communication Engineering and VLSI Systems. Below mentioned are some of the programmes offered by NIT Dimapur and their respective eligibility and fee:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: The National Institute of Technology Nagaland provides UG, PG, and Doctoral programmes. At the UG level, it offers the BTech programme, whereas, at the PG level NIT Dimapur offers MTech and MSc programmes. The institute offers an MSc programme in Physics. These programmes are offered through several NIT Nagaland departments. Candidates must check their NIT Nagaland eligibility criteria before applying for a course. NIT Nagaland fee structure offers all the programmes with the tuition fee ranging from INR 45 K to INR 5 Lakh. fee Below mentioned are with their eligibility criteria and structure:

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates must pay the M.Tech fees once the seat allocations are done to confirm the seats. NIT Nagaland courses fee might include multiple fee components along with the tuition fee. Find below the M.Tech fee structure:Course NameTuition feeOne-time PaymentHostle FeeMScINR 3.1 lakhINR 6,000INR 1.07 lakhThe fee information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
faqs.question: What is the M.Tech fee structure at NIT Nagaland?

faqs.answer: A:    MTech fees at NIT Nagaland is around INR 5 lakh. The fee structure is cumulative of multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, medical insurance, mess and other security deposits, etc. Out of all these fee components, there are a few components that are charged one-time by NIT Nagaland.
faqs.question: What is the M.Tech fee at NIT Nagaland?

faqs.answer: A:    NIT Nagaland offers specialisations in UG, PG and PhD level. Programmes such as Mechanical Engineering, CSE, Civil Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering and more are offered in full-time mode on the basis of merit and entrance. Candidates qualifying the entrance exams and securing scores within the cutoff limit are shortlisted for further consideration. For NIT Nagaland BTech, candidates must secure a 75% in Class 12. Whereas, for courses such as MSc and MTech, candidates must secure 60% in graduation. NIT Nagaland considers JEE Main, IIT JAM, CCMN, GATE, CCMT, UGC NET etc. to shortlist candidates for admission.
faqs.question: How can I get admission to UG/PG courses at NIT Nagaland? Am I eligible for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    NIT Nagaland has a sanction of around 200 seats for admission in BTech programme. For admission at MSc, NIT Nagaland offers 20 seats with two specialisations and 2 years of course duration. The Institute offers 66 seats for admission at MTech including the 4 specialisations within the programme. The Institute also offers PhD in various specialisations along side the UG and PG level programmes.

reviews_list.review_title: Great college, Great crowd and awesome college life.

review_content.Placements: The EIE branch has the highest placement percentage. You can expect a median of nearly 8 LPA and an average of 8-9 LPA as well. In my branch, mostly placements vary between 90-100%, except for 2024. You can get placed in both IT and non-IT companies. You have to work on your skills to grab good internship offers. Overall, it's 8.4/10.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is fast enough and is available in all of campus. You get like upwards of 200-300mbps on laptops. On phones, it can vary between 35-120mbps. Classrooms are good enough to accommodate all of the students. Don’t expect modern classrooms. Classrooms are good but aren’t super modern or anything, though they get most of the work done. We have one cricket football ground, a badminton court, a cricket practice net, a volleyball court, and a basketball court. We are provided with table tennis. Hostels are really great as well with spacious rooms. The library is good as well and contains many books on different topics.

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced
faqs.question: Q: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?

faqs.answer: IIIT Allahabad accpets JEE Main score for admission to the BTech courses. As per the IIIT Allahabad cutoff 2023, the Last Round closing rank for BTech ranged between 5924 and 9558, among which Information Technology was the most competitive specialisation. The Round 1 closing rank for BTech ranged between 4817 and 8428 for BTech. So, considering the previous year Round 1 and the Last Round closing ranks, candidates seeking admission to IIIT Allahabad must secure a rank over and above 4800 and 9600 for the General ALL India category candidates. Candidates can refer to the table given below to check out the 2023 Last Round closing ranks for IIIT Allahabad to get an idea of the ranks required for all the BTech courses offered at this institute: CourseRound 1Last Round B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering84289558B.Tech. in Information Technology48175924B.Tech. in Information Technology (Business Informatics)51626587

overview_faqs.question: How is NIT Nagaland campus?
overview_faqs.answer: NIT Nagaland is based in Dimapur, Nagaland. It has a sturdy infrastructure that provide access to a central library and clean classrooms and labs. The overall infrastructure is great. The hostel for boys and girls are seperate and the main building is close to them. There are immense facilities for sports in the campus with indoor activities including Table Tennis, badminton, chess and carrom for rejuvenation. The outdoor games include football and cricket. Students also have access to digital library. There is also a provision for ATM and medical facilities in the campus.

overview_faqs.question: Is B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering at NIT Nagaland a good choice?
overview_faqs.answer: NIT Nagaland received a position in the rank band of 151-200 within the category of Engineering of NIRF 2024. The Institute offers BTech in Mechanical Engineering as a 4 year full-time programme. National Institute of Technology Nagaland offers 34 seats for BTech in Mechanical Engineering with the tuition fees of INR 5 Lakh. The total fee structure consists of various other components making the BTech in Mechanical Engineering total fees as INR 7.67 Lakh. In retrospection, the ROI of the Institute, considering the average package received by a BTech in Mechanical Engineering 2023 graduate was INR 8.09 Lakh. To conclude, candidates can consider NIT Nagaland to pursue BTech in Mechanical Engineering.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great college with good faculty.

content.Placements: In my college 75 percent of students get placed every year. Top roles offered are System Engineer Data Analytics, Electrical Engineer, etc. 70 to 80 percent of students get internships from our course. These internships are really helpful for future.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has best infrastructure facilities. They contain Wi-Fi beautiful library and clean classrooms. The food in our hostel is really hygienic and healthy. Games period is also allotted in the timetable schedule. Food quality is very good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Pros and cons of the college.

content.Placements: Various scopes of opportunities are available for the course, while most of them are core recruiters. Most of the electronics-oriented core companies like Cisco Systems, LG Electronics Ltd, and Hero Electric are among the active recruiters from the college, with packages going up to 6.7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: College has secured good rankings and recognition from various top organisations. To relax and chill, various activities are performed in the college, some of which include dedicated rooms, fitness centres, and badminton courts. Hostel zones were peaceful but highly restrictive.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of NIT Nagaland Engineering College.

content.Placements: Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) department at NIT Nagaland has shown a steady placement record in recent years. In the 2022-2023 placement season, 14.08% of ECE students secure job offers. The highest salary package offered was 7 LPA, while the average package offered was 5 LPA. Top recruiting leading companies that hire ECE graduates include Infosys, Tech Mahindra, L&T Construction, IBM, ICT Services, and Technology Adoption.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not bad, but it is decent. I like it, but there isn't a high-quality playground for students to play on. They also have restrictions on the Wi-Fi. Hostels are not well managed, and the mess food is decent for non-vegetarians, but pure vegetarians will only get paneer.

admission_overview.college_name: NIT Nagaland Admission 2025: Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Application

admission_overview.title: NIT Nagaland Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: NIT Nagaland admission 2025 is entrance-based. The institute offers various programmes at UG, PG, and doctoral levels. The institute accepts various national-level entrance exams for admission to its courses. Also known as National Institute of Technology Nagaland and NIT Dimapur, NIT Nagaland provides over 20 courses via seven departments, out of which the flagship course BTech is offered across six specialisations.

paragraphs: NIT Nagaland admission process consists of application, selection, counselling, followed by subsequent admission confirmation. NIT admission is completely entrance-based and depends on valid JEE Main ranks. Interested candidates can follow the steps below to complete the NIT Nagaland admission process:
Qualify for JEE Main, GATE, and IIT JAM

Interested candidates in taking admission to BTech course are required to appear for the JEE Main exam. For MTech and MSc, the accepting exams are GATE and IIT JAM, respectively. JEE Main exams are conducted in two phases starting from January to March. GATE usually conducts the exam in January. IIT JAM exams are held in the month of February.
Apply for JoSAA/ CSAB/CCMT/CCMN counselling

Students with a valid JEE Mains and GATE score are eligible to apply through JoSAA/CCMN/CCMT. Applicants must go to the JoSAA official website to register themselves. They must select NIT Nagaland as their preferred institute. Also, for MTech and MSc course admission, students are required to visit the CCMT/CCMN official website to register. For PhD, candidates must apply via the NIT Nagaland's official website.
Seat Allocation

On the basis ofNIT Nagaland cutoff, JoSAA will allocate seats according to the candidate's JEE Main score. Seats for MTech and MSc courses will be allocated based on CCMT/CCMN, respectively. Further, NIT Nagaland will release a list of shortlisted students for PhD admission. Leftover seats will be filled in through the Institute Entrance Examination after CCMN counselling.
Seat finalisation
After the seats confirmation, candidates can pay the tuition fee at institutes' official website.

The fee structure might include other components, such as tuition fees, hostel fees, medical insurance, mess, etc. Other components can be paid semester-wise. Students can expect a decent ROI at the institute. The institute has a wide range of fees for its various programmes, ranging from45,000 to 5 lakh. Interested students can refer to the following table to know aboutNIT Nagaland feeand expected ROI:
Tuition Fee
Average Package (Return)
INR 9 lakh - INR 14.3 lakh
INR 10.5 lakh

faqs.question: Who is eligible for M.Tech at NIT Nagaland?

faqs.question: What are the career prospects after doing M.Tech from NIT Nagaland?
faqs.answer: After doing M.Tech from NIT Nagaland, students can pursue a variety of roles in various fields. The institute offers the programmes across multiple specialisations, such as Computer Science and Engineering, VLSI Systems, etc. The top recruiters for the institute are Cognizant, Infosys, Deloitte, TCS, and more. Graduates ofNIT Nagaland M.Tech VLSI courseoften have high placements, with students getting placed in semiconductor corporations, research labs, and design centers.

faqs.question: What is the admission process in NIT Nagaland?
faqs.answer: NIT Nagalandadmission starts with the registration process for JEE Main January session.Admission to NIT Nagaland is subject to various national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main and GATE. The flagship programme of NIT Nagaland is BTech which is offered across six specialisations. Admission to BTech is based on JEE Main scores followed by JoSSA Counselling. For MTech and MSc, admission is subject to GATE and IIT JAM exams, respectively. MTech and MSc also have counsellig based admission. CCMT and CCMT are the counselling platform through which the qualified MSc and MTech are admitted.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for NIT Nagaland admission?
faqs.answer: NIT Nagaland offers BTech, M.Tech MSc and PhD programme. Candidates who have twelve years of school education with 75% aggregate and a valid JEE Main scores are eligible for the BTech course. For the MTech, candidates who have a Bachelor's Degree in any stream and a valid scorein the GATE score. Also candidates with a bachelor's degree in Science and IIT Jam score are eligible for the MSc programe. And finally for the PhD candidates must have master's degree  in Engineering or Technology, a valid GATE/JRF/ UGC NET/ CSIR NET score.

placement_data.title: NIT Nagaland Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: NIT Nagaland has a placement cell that is responsible for securing lucrative career opportunities for students. The institute invites companies from different sectors to conduct the placement process at the Campus premises. The placed students also get the opportunity to do their final project in the placed company as an intern with a stipend at this phase. The NIT placement depends on various factors such as the brand value of the institute, industry demand, skills of the students, etc.

NIT Nagaland has concluded the placements for the Class of 2024. As per the latest report, the participating recruiters placed 104 students of the BTech and 2 students of the MTech batch 2024 . For BTech, the highest package offered was INR 13.95 LPA. The average salary package offer stood at INR 4.22 LPA in 2024. For the MTech batch, the maximum package offered was INR 12 LPA. For the same course, the minimum package offered was INR 9 LPA. The top recruiters of NIT Nagaland in 2024 included Publicis Sapient, Samsung, Jio Infocomm, Schlumberger, Straive, Oracle, Zuora, Eaton , etc.

description: NIT Nagaland cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the NIT Nagaland JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last nine years of NIT Nagaland JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

NIT Nagaland JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the NIT Nagaland CSE cutoff 2025 was 56055 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branches, such as ECE and Mechanical, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission were 67989 and 103395, respectively for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cut

For the General AI category students, the NIT Nagaland B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 56055 and 111764 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 56055 and 67989, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at NIT Nagaland. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at NIT Nagaland to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of NIT Nagaland. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and M.Tech. in Communication Engineering with last round cutoff scores of 377 and 350, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 377. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff score was 327 in the AI quota.
Comparing the cutoff range, the competition was higher for the General AI category students as compared to the OBC category students. For other categories' cutoff scores, use the provided filters.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at NIT Nagaland - National Institute of Technology. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

NIT Nagaland CCMN cutoff 2026 is yet to be released for admission to the MSc/MSc Tech courses. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the table below to view the specialisation-wise 2025 cutoff details for the General AI category students. During the NIT Nagaland MSc cutoff 2025, the last round closing ranks varied between 1824 and 3936. Of all the specialisations, the one with the lowest cutoff rank of 1824 was M.Sc. in Chemistry in the General AI category. This indicates that this specialisa

The maximum cutoff rank required for MSc admission was 3936 in the General AI quota. This indicates that students with a cutoff rank below the mentioned rank here have higher chances of getting admission to their desired specialisations. The cutoff ranks vary across different rounds, categories and specialisations.
Among the OBC category students, the CCMN last round closing ranks ranged between 2071 and 4378, with being the most competitive for admission. Choose the provided f

CCMN is the centralised platform for admissions to the MSc and MSc (Tech Programmes) at NITs, IIEST Shibpur, and some CFTI institutes that accept the IIT JAM scorecard. This year, CCMN counselling was conducted for three regular rounds and two special rounds for MSc admission across different participating institutes. Candidates preparing for NIT Nagaland admission can refer to the table below to view or download the year- and round-wise CCMN cutoff list.

Considering the last round of NIT Nagaland CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Computer Science and Engineering and Communication Engineering, witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branch such as Communication Engineering had comparatively relaxed cutoff score for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

highlights.description: Consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies, NIT Nagaland is one of India’s top institutes. Recently, the institute ranked #101-150 in the NIRF 2025 under the Engineering category. The reasons for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies include its academic reputation, top-notch faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The following article covers all the information around NIT Nagaland rankings:

rankings.highlight: Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Nagaland In 2025

nirf.description:
NIT Nagaland has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Engineering' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, NIT Nagaland climbed 50 ranks to #101 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.
Read less

qs_world.description:
NIT Nagaland has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026.
Discover the latest rankings and categories provided by other ranking bodies listed below.

hostel.description: The Institute has a total number of 6 hostel,  4 for boys and 1 for girls. Altogether there are about 172 well furnished rooms across 6 hostels. NIT Nagaland also provides very wholesome messing facility (Vegetarian and Non-Vegetarian) for all students and few faculties and staff.
facilities: Central Library: The Central Library of NIT Nagaland has a collection of over 9,500 books in streams such as Engineering, Basic Sciences, Management, Humanities, and others. The library also has more than 1,400+ e-books on Electrical, Electronics, Communication, Civil, Mechanical, and Computer Science along with non-book materials such as NPTEL videos, CDs/CD-ROMs, etc.

Hostel: NIT Nagaland houses six. At present, there are four 64-seated boys’ hostels, one 56-seated girls’ hostel, and a 32-seated PG boys hostel on the NIT Nagaland campus. NIT Nagaland also provides good quality mess facilities (Vegetarian and Non-Vegetarian) for all students and a few faculties and staff.

Sports: The Institute is equipped with sports facilities and several indoor and outdoor games. Indoor games include Badminton, table tennis, Carrom and Chess, and outdoor games include Cricket and Football. New football and cricket stadium are under construction and expected to be ready soon.

library.description: The central library has a collection of more than 7,200 books in the area of engineering, technology, basic sciences, management, economics, social sciences and humanities including text books, reference books etc. The central library also having 1400+ of e-books on electrical, electronics, communication, civil, mechanical and computer science and other non-book materials such as NPTEL videos, CDs/CD-ROMs, etc. The central library are fully computerized using integrated library management software with OPAC and RFID technology.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Chess, Table tennis

reviews.review_heading: Great college with good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college has best infrastructure facilities. They contain Wi-Fi beautiful library and clean classrooms. The food in our hostel is really hygienic and healthy. Games period is also allotted in the timetable schedule. Food quality is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Pros and cons of the college.
reviews.review_text: College has secured good rankings and recognition from various top organisations. To relax and chill, various activities are performed in the college, some of which include dedicated rooms, fitness centres, and badminton courts. Hostel zones were peaceful but highly restrictive.

reviews.review_heading: Master of Science in Physics at Nagaland.
reviews.review_text: The campus area was hygienic, with all facilities looked at by students to pursue their courses. Student safety was a priority for the management over other activities. Transportation on the college campus was very good. All the necessary safety measures were initiated in the college

reviews.review_heading: Great college, Great crowd and awesome college life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is fast enough and is available in all of campus. You get like  upwards of 200-300mbps on laptops. On phones, it can vary between 35-120mbps. Classrooms are good enough to accommodate all of the students. Don’t expect modern classrooms. Classrooms are good but aren’t super modern or anything, though they get most of the work done. We have one cricket football ground, a badminton court, a cricket practice net, a volleyball court, and a basketball court. We are provided with table t...

reviews.review_heading: Review of NIT Nagaland Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not bad, but it is decent. I like it, but there isn't a high-quality playground for students to play on. They also have restrictions on the Wi-Fi. Hostels are not well managed, and the mess food is decent for non-vegetarians, but pure vegetarians will only get paneer.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities with a chill semester, enough time to pursue your interest.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good as compared to other North East College. Hostel is newly built. All hostels and campus are equipped with Wi-Fi. In the first year, your hostel will be just outside the campus. All the hostel rooms are double and triple-sharing and have enough space for 3 and 4 members. Lab facility of the college is very good. It has all the necessary equipment with good infrastructure. New departmental buildings are also under construction.

reviews.review_heading: This college is better than I expected.
reviews.review_text: The course is designed to be easier, making it accessible for students who may struggle academically, so everyone has a good chance of passing. This provides an advantage for scoring well and achieving a good CGPA. Hostels are in excellent condition with good infrastructure. Currently, first-year students are in a rented hostel off-campus due to availability issues, but a new hostel building is in progress. The hostels for second-, third, and fourth-year students are very nice.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of the college facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have got Wi-Fi in our hostels and admin buildings but the network connectivity is very bad overall around our college. We have got about 4-5 labs for first-year students which consist of physics lab, chemistry lab, etc. Few concrete classrooms with fans and about 5 bamboo classrooms with fans. A small library with a seating capacity of about 20 students but the availability of books is good. The food served in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: College campus is huge and placements are also good.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good, and we have a library, student section, help desk, and many classrooms available in the main building. Also, we have an auditorium, an AC convention hall, 2 to 3 lecture halls, etc. The college provides transportation facilities also for the students. All events and fests are conducted on the college campus, and mostly all the festivals are celebrated here.

reviews.review_heading: Quite an awesome academic boosting experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is standard as any other standard institute of national importance although some of the departments are still underdeveloped. Hostels are provided for all and the mess is managed by a private management affiliated with the Institute. Food is also provided well, i.e., 4 meals a day for both veg and non-veg. The hostel facilities include fans, no AC, geysers, public bathrooms, and multiple toilets.

reviews.review_heading: NIT Nagaland offers proper facilities and faculty to the students in our course.
reviews.review_text: NIT Nagaland is having a well maintained and developed infrastructure for our course. College has a big campus with all kinds of necessary facilities. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, sports and other modern facilities are available for the students. Hostel are available there for the students. Food in the hostel mess is good. Facilities are also of good quality at the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Disappointed due to the faculty, but the hostel and overall environment are good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs were quite good, and the library, though not bigger, was also fine, with some books related to their departments and space for studying. Coming to the hostel, it was a very good, comfortable, and secure accommodation, ideal for studying as well.

reviews.review_heading: Review of NIT Nagaland - National Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are excellent and overall college is above 100 acres. Very good in nature and full-speed internet. And classrooms. The quality of hostel and food is excellent and very hygiene. The medical services are also available 24/7. The sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of NIT Nagaland - National Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi connection is good.
Now the library is small and is in the administrative block.
The two-story library is under construction (from Corona time).
Our classrooms are also under construction, just beside the library.
Now we are having classes in bamboo classrooms, which are temporary. Medical facilities are available.
24/7 hot water is available in hostels.
The daily hostel cleaning is done.
sports are conducted every semester
football ground was recently constructed.

reviews.review_heading: Not so good placement for civil, but worth it for a good college experience and healthy environment.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are very good. The mess is good. It's improving every year based on our ratings. Libraries and classrooms could get better. There's room for more improvement. We have bamboo classrooms for now for the civil departments. More department construction is underway.

data.description: There are seven departments in total at NIT Nagaland. Civil engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Science and Humanities, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, and Electronics and Instrumentation engineering are some of these fields. These varied departments support a broad spectrum of academic fields, promoting learning environment at the institution.

course_faqs.question: Is IIITDM, Jabalpur good for BTech?
course_faqs.answer: The students at IIITDM have access to excellent career opportunities, supportive faculty members, and a great campus life.
