review_summary.college_name: IIITDM Jabalpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of IIITDM-Jabalpur CSE.

content.Placements: Placements at my college IIITDM-J are very nice. Around 70-75 percent of students get placed every year from this college, especially in CSE. The highest package is 87.5 LPA, which means it is in India. The average package is around 21.4 LPA. Top recruiters include Google, Adobe, and Nvidia.
content.Infrastructure: IIITDM-Jabalpur provides top-notch infrastructure for CSE Students, including fully Wi-Fi-enabled labs, modern classrooms, and a digital library with vast resources. Hostels are spacious and clean with good Wi-Fi. It provides 24X7 water facility. The mess is also good and hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good placements, infrastructure, and balanced college life.

content.Placements: Most final years from CSE are placed from our institute. ECE students are placed quite good. They are placed in companies like D. E Shaw, Accenture, Flipkart, Meesho, etc. Our college tie-up with Japan for on-campus, so few companies from Japan also visit our college. The highest package of CSE last year was 80 LPA in India. Average package for CSE is around 20 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Institute infrastructure is really good. It has a lecture hall and tutorial complexes for classes. Core lab complex for core courses, library, and computer center. It also has PHC for immediate medical-related issues. Mess food is good. Every hostel has one canteen. We have football, basketball, volleyball, and tennis courts. There are also two indoor badminton courts, chess, carrom, table tennis, and gym rooms. Overall, the infrastructure is excellent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: IIITDM Jabalpur truthful review.

content.Placements: Around 80 to 90% get placed. Highest package was 82 LPA, and average package was 21.49 LPA. Companies like these, Google, Microsoft, Morgan Stanley, and many more multi-billion dollar companies, and as the college makes you fit for job interviews and internships, so you don't have to suffer at the last minute or last period.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available in the college are very good and great. Infrastructure is very good and well maintained by the college, and the college has Wi-Fi and many kinds of labs that are maintained by the college very well, which makes the college techified.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Real talk about IIITDM Jabalpur.

content.Placements: Placements of our college, i.e., IIITDM Jabalpur, are very good. It is in the top tier, I will say, and the placements were like, highest international package is 80 LPA, and highest Domestic package is 82 LPA. Average package is 21.49 LPA. College makes you fit for the jobs and internships, so you don't have to suffer from that.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities that are available in our college are very top-notch and tier I will say and I think, our college is equipped with very modern things like Wi-Fi, computer labs, fingerprint blocks, and many more. College also has a very clean and well-maintained infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: If you are searching for a college for engineering, then this college is best, you can come.

content.Placements: There are 190 people in my Computer Science and Engineering course. The highest, lowest, and average packages offered are 1 Crore, 30 LPA, and 9 LPA, respectively. Companies like Google and Amazon come to our college for placements. 60% to 70% of students got internships, and the top roles offered were in software engineering, etc.
content.Infrastructure: In every classroom, lab, and library, a 5G Wi-Fi internet connection is available, and all areas are neat and clean. The hostels are good. There are six hostels in my college, and LAN is available in every room. Healthy food is available in the mess, canteen, etc., with two messes: one for vegetarian and one for non-vegetarian food. All clubs for every sport and ground are available.

admission_overview.college_name: IIITDM Jabalpur IIITDM Jabalpur Admission 2025: Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Application

paragraphs: IIITDM Jabalpur admissionsare granted based onJEE MainsandGATE scoresto its BTech and MTech programmes, respectively. It offers a wide range of courses in Design and Technology for both UG, PG and PhD level courses.IIITDM Jabalpurcourse admission isentrance exam-based.The institute inducts candidates for the flagship BTech programme through JoSAA/ CSAB counselling based on valid JEE-Main scores. BTech being the flagship programme of IIIT Jabalpur is offered across five programmes. If you're interested in pursuing any of the courses at IIITDM in Jabalpur, candidates can check the eligibility criteria before applying atIIIT Jabalpur

IIITDM Jabalpur offers various courses at UG, PG and PhD levels. The eligibility criteria for the courses are Class 12 and graduation with minimum marks and selection is based on an entrance exam. Here are some popular courses of IIITDM, Jabalpur with their eligibility and selection criteria:

The fees offered at IIITDM Jabalpur vary from course to course and depending upon the specialisation. The candidates must pay the registration fee, examination fee, etc., apart from the total tuition fee. Here are some topIIITDM Jabalpur courseswith their total tuition fee along with the seat intake as per the courses. The reserved seat will be filled as per government of India rules:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website and is subject to change. Check out the completeIIITDM Jabalpur Fee Structure

The IIITDM Jabalpur admission criteria are entrance-based. Candidates are shortlisted based on scores in the accepted entrance examination followed by respective selection rounds/counselling. The steps involved in the admission process are explained below:
STEP 1: IIITDM Jabalpur Application Process 2025

For IIITDM Jabalpur course admission must visit its official website to apply online. To apply for theBTechcandidates need to appear for theJEE Mainentrance exam. For MTech admission, candidates need to apply forGATE. Moreover, the aspirant shall ensure that the application form is submitted within the prescribed due date.
STEP 2: Release of Cutoff List

After the application process, the institute releases a course-wise cutoff list. The cutoff list indicates the minimum required score in the respective entrance exam for a candidate to become eligible for admission.
STEP 3: Counselling

Candidates applying for a BTech course further have to go throughJoSAA counsellingfor seat allotment and, for MTech admission, CCMT conducts the counselling round. While the candidates who apply for a PhD may have to go through an interview round.
STEP 4: Admission Confirmation
After the selection rounds and counselling, seats are allotted to the eligible candidates. Selected students can further pay the required fee to confirm their seats.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in IIIT Jabalpur without JEE?
faqs.answer: No, it is not possible to get admission at IIITDM Jabalpur for BTech without a genuine JEE Main score. Applications have to be made through the JEE Main website and through JoSAA counselling for the allotment of seats. Institute fixes cutoff ranks on the basis of minimum marks obtained by candidates, and within the opening rank and closing ranks, admissions are given. Due to the stiff merit-based criteria followed by IIITDM Jabalpur, JEE Main is compulsory for BTech admission.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

placement_data.title: IIITDM Jabalpur Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: A total of 13 international PPOs were made during IIITDM Jabalpur placement 2025 . Further, the overall highest domestic package offered during the placement drive 2025 was INR 87.54 LPA . The average package received by UG and PG students in 2025 was INR 21.49 LPA and INR 12.52 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, more than 90 companies visited the institute campus for the 2024 drive and offered 284 job opportunities to eligible BTech , MTech , and other courses students. The highest international and highest domestic packages stood at INR 122 LPA and INR 110 LPA, respectively. The IIITDM Jabalpur average package for UG and PG courses stood at INR 19.27 LPA and INR 12.54 LPA, respectively. Additionally, 3 international offers were made during IIIT Jabalpur placements 2024.

description: IIITDM Jabalpur cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIITDM Jabalpur JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last 9 years of IIITDM Jabalpur JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIITDM Jabalpur JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the IIITDM Jabalpur CSE cutoff 2025 was 16611 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branches, such as ECE and Mechanical, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission were 20916 and 52908, respectively for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitiv

For the General AI category students, the IIITDM Jabalpur B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 16611 and 64090 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 16611 and 20916, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at IIITDM Jabalpur. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at IIITDM Jabalpur to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of IIITDM Jabalpur. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering ( Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) with last round cutoff scores of 477 and 466, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 477. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 322 and 427 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at IIITDM Jabalpur - Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

IIITDM Jabalpur UCEED cutoff 2026 is yet to be released for admission to the B.Des course. In the meantime, candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view the UCEED 2025 first and last round cutoff details.

In 2025, the IIITDM Jabalpur B.Des cutoff 2025 was 267 in the last round for the students belonging to the General AI quota. In the first round, the cutoff rank stood at . Check out the table below to view the UCEED 2025 cutoff for the General category under the AI

For the General AI quota, the UCEED 2025 cutoff for B.Des admission was 267 in the last round. In 2024, the cutoff for the same course was 187, while in 2023, it was 165. So, analysing the last three years' cutoff data, it is evident that UCEED cutoff ranks saw a jump in the last round closing rank for B.Des admission over three years.

IIITDM Jabalpur - Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing accepts the UCEED entrance exam to shortlist students for B.Des admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the important UCEED 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

The UCEED 2025 counselling was concluded with the release of the five seat allotment rounds. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise UCEED cutoff lists from the table below for admission to the B.Des course at IIITDM Jabalpur.

IIITDM Jabalpur MDes cutoff 2024 is based on CEED scores 2024 followed by the round-wise CEED Counselling. IIITDM Jabalpur CEED cutoff 2024 is out for Part A. The mean and standard deviation for CEED 2024 Part A are 41.90 and 16.72, respectively. Refer to the table given below to check out the CEED Part A cutoff 2024 for IIITDM Jabalpur.

Considering the last round of IIITDM Jabalpur CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Computer Science and Engineering ( Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branches such as Electronics and Communication Engineering (Nanoelectronics and VLSI Design) and Manufacturing and Automation had comparatively relaxed cutoff scores for admission in the General category under the AI qu

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIITDM-Jabalpur CSE.
reviews.review_text: IIITDM-Jabalpur provides top-notch infrastructure for CSE Students, including fully Wi-Fi-enabled labs, modern classrooms, and a digital library with vast resources. Hostels are spacious and clean with good Wi-Fi. It provides 24X7 water facility. The mess is also good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, infrastructure, and balanced college life.
reviews.review_text: Institute infrastructure is really good. It has a lecture hall and tutorial complexes for classes. Core lab complex for core courses, library, and computer center. It also has PHC for immediate medical-related issues. Mess food is good. Every hostel has one canteen. We have football, basketball, volleyball, and tennis courts. There are also two indoor badminton courts, chess, carrom, table tennis, and gym rooms. Overall, the infrastructure is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: IIITDM Jabalpur truthful review.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in the college are very good and great. Infrastructure is very good and well maintained by the college, and the college has Wi-Fi and many kinds of labs that are maintained by the college very well, which makes the college techified.

reviews.review_heading: Real talk about IIITDM Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: Facilities that are available in our college are very top-notch and tier I will say and I think, our college is equipped with very modern things like Wi-Fi, computer labs, fingerprint blocks, and many more. College also has a very clean and well-maintained infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: If you are searching for a college for engineering, then this college is best, you can come.
reviews.review_text: In every classroom, lab, and library, a 5G Wi-Fi internet connection is available, and all areas are neat and clean. The hostels are good. There are six hostels in my college, and LAN is available in every room. Healthy food is available in the mess, canteen, etc., with two messes: one for vegetarian and one for non-vegetarian food. All clubs for every sport and ground are available.

reviews.review_heading: Great review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure is really good. There are so many good classrooms which we like. The quality of food and canteen is good. The mess is somewhat bad. All facilities are available in our college. All sports are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college and the place where I met the most toxic people ever in my life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good particularly the hostels good the lecture halls and LHTC were great. Professors were just very arrogant and they did not care about the future of students. All they had was ego just pure ego and they did not care about the dignity of the students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, enjoyable college life with good placements.
reviews.review_text: IIIT Jabalpur has a well-developed campus with all the necessary infrastructure and facilities for students. Spread over 300 acres, it has academic buildings, research centers, and well-equipped classrooms. The library has a large collection of books, research papers, and digital materials. The institute provides hostel facilities for both boys and girls, with Wi-Fi, common rooms, and mess services. Faculty and staff also have residential quarters on campus. For sports and recreation, there are ...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the faculty is good, but some are good and some are not. Overall, the college is also good.
reviews.review_text: The lab and classrooms are very good, spacious, and clean, with projectors, noise-canceling walls, speakers, and air conditioning. The hostel is good, but not too clean, students have to clean themselves, although there is cleaning on a daily basis. Proper hot water is provided, mess food is decent, and sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college alumni have qualified for UPSC, CAT, and top companies exams.
reviews.review_text: The Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing IIITDM Jabalpur has better infrastructure than private colleges. Everything is provided on our college campus like Wi-Fi, Smart labs, Smart classrooms, and a library,  at an affordable fee.

reviews.review_heading: The college experience is good.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good, and all the equipment is needed for experiments. The mess food offers both non-veg and veg options, and food quality is average. The best part about the mess is that it has a facility for fast food, which is good. The worst part is the hostel, as the infrastructure is good, but the availability of the network is poor. It does not have Wi-Fi, but it has LAN in each room with a speed of 200 Mbps. However, the problem with the LAN is that it sometimes disconnects and stays down for a...

reviews.review_heading: College Review of IIITDM Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. It includes lecture halls, libraries, hostels, administration, and labs. Hostel facilities are not that great, and for medical issues, they provide medicine facilities from the primary healthcare center within our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Inside view of IIITDM Jabalpur from a 3rd-year student.
reviews.review_text: The lecture hall and tutorial complex are very nice at IIITDM Jabalpur. All the classrooms are smart classes, and LHTC is Wi-Fi-enabled (more than 70%). The library has more than enough books from all fields of academics in engineering and also has books of fiction. Hostels are also good, and the hostel rent is only 11,000 INR, which is very nominal. First and second-year students are put in Hall 3 and Hall 4, which are triple sharing, whereas for third and fourth-year students, the college prov...

reviews.review_heading: Huge campus. Very less fest. Cultural clubs are very active. Good placements in 2023.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are air-conditioned. Wi-Fi is available almost everywhere. Classrooms are big and few can accommodate up to 300 students. There are library and computer center where we can go and study and use it also. There is a core complex for all labs like mechanical and ECE. All labs are well-maintained. Hostels are good changes every year for boys and 2 are available for girls. For the first and second years, there are three students per room. Mess is centralized. Canteen is available in ev...

reviews.review_heading: The Truth of Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure of lecture halls and the library. In hostels, we have one chair, a study table, a bed, and a cupboard for each student, and the rooms are three-sharing rooms. Talking about food, it is average; if you want to survive, you have to eat.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: The college beats many top-tier colleges in terms of placement, and the overall experience is great.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 70% to 74% of students have been placed so far. The highest package for the EE branch this year is 52 LPA. The average package remains 12.90 LPA and the lowest package offered was 3.20 LPA. Microsoft, Google, Apple, BMW, Maruti, L&T, and Siemens are some of the top recruiters.
review_content.Infrastructure: Personally, I feel the infrastructure is quite updated and should be replaced, and development is ongoing. Everything a student needs is present on the campus. I like the library, computer labs, and reading area. The classrooms are equipped with smart projectors, and Wi-Fi is available throughout the building. The hostels are quite decent; again, the infrastructure is quite outdated, and the mess food is also decent. Sports facilities are available for every kind of game, like volleyball, cricket, basketball, and there is also a swimming pool inside the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Truth about the infrastructure of PEC, Chandigarh.

review_content.Placements: Almost 75% of students were placed in our course. On average, the highest and the lowest packages were around 8.5, 26, and 5 LPA, respectively. Top recruiting companies included Tata Projects, L&T, and government bodies as well. Top roles offered were structural engineer, design engineer, site supervisor, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classes lack Wi-Fi and internet connectivity due to jammers installed in the classes. The library is well-equipped with all the necessary facilities and Wi-Fi connectivity. The infrastructure of classes and labs is a bit too old. The facilities of the hostel are also just enough to survive, and the food quality is average. The canteen food is good. The college has enough facilities for endorsing sports and games.

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

overview_faqs.question: Is PEC University of Technology a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: PEC is good college or a bad college. It depends like if you are looking it for world class infrastructure, world class hostel than it will really disappoint you but if you are looking it for better placement and internship than believe PEC is really a good college. Because if you compare placements from any other same tier college, our college has far better placements.

overview_faqs.question: What are the pros and cons of studying in Punjab Engineering College, Chandigarh?
overview_faqs.answer: Punjab Engineering College has a vast campus spanning 146 acres and the university is a Grant-in-Aid program administered by the Indian government's Union Territory of Chandigarh. Punjab Engineering College offers undergraduate and postgradute programmes across Engineering and Technology streams.The faculty of academic departments and centers are involved in cutting-edge research and development works. Punjab Engineering College collaborates very closely with research organisations, industries, alumni, and other academic institutions both in India and abroad, and has signed MoUs to pursue joint research in various areas.

review_summary.college_name: Punjab Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the college because it gives us all the facilities.

content.Placements: Placement percentage is 70 to 80% in electrical engineering. The highest package is about 80 LPA, and the average is 13 LPA. About 20 to 30% got internships. All big companies like Microsoft and Apple come to campus here.
content.Infrastructure: Full college Wi-Fi all over the campus. Labs are well-maintained, and the overall college infrastructure is average. There is a decent library with full facilities. Classrooms are very good, and the whole college is fully air-conditioned. Hostels are average, and food quality is also average, as in all NITs or other colleges. A medical dispensary is also available on campus. All types of sports and grounds are available with decent facilities, and there is also a gym.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Peaceful life at Punjab Engineering College, Chandigarh.

content.Placements: For design, there’s almost no placement. No student has yet completed the course as it started three years ago, but still, looking at other factors, you will have to find internships yourself. The percentage of internships in 3rd year is 4 percent till now.
content.Infrastructure: Pretty campus, AC's in almost all classes except the old classrooms. For hostels, there are many restrictions. For girls, no one is allowed outside after 9, for boys, it’s a bit lenient. Clean rooms with windows. Boys’ hostel lacks a laundry though. A few small adjustments will have to be made.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college beats many top-tier colleges in terms of placement, and the overall experience is great.

content.Placements: Approximately 70% to 74% of students have been placed so far. The highest package for the EE branch this year is 52 LPA. The average package remains 12.90 LPA and the lowest package offered was 3.20 LPA. Microsoft, Google, Apple, BMW, Maruti, L&T, and Siemens are some of the top recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: Personally, I feel the infrastructure is quite updated and should be replaced, and development is ongoing. Everything a student needs is present on the campus. I like the library, computer labs, and reading area. The classrooms are equipped with smart projectors, and Wi-Fi is available throughout the building. The hostels are quite decent; again, the infrastructure is quite outdated, and the mess food is also decent. Sports facilities are available for every kind of game, like volleyball, cricket, basketball, and there is also a swimming pool inside the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Truth about the infrastructure of PEC, Chandigarh.

content.Placements: Almost 75% of students were placed in our course. On average, the highest and the lowest packages were around 8.5, 26, and 5 LPA, respectively. Top recruiting companies included Tata Projects, L&T, and government bodies as well. Top roles offered were structural engineer, design engineer, site supervisor, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Classes lack Wi-Fi and internet connectivity due to jammers installed in the classes. The library is well-equipped with all the necessary facilities and Wi-Fi connectivity. The infrastructure of classes and labs is a bit too old. The facilities of the hostel are also just enough to survive, and the food quality is average. The canteen food is good. The college has enough facilities for endorsing sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Materials and Metallurgical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: My college review, the one and only Punjab Engineering College, Chandigarh.

content.Placements: College is good with lots of great opportunities. I am currently in my first year in the metallurgy branch. I will be passing out in 2029. The top recruiting companies are Google, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan, etc. The highest package is 77 LPA, and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. While the average is 13 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are not good, with decent infrastructure and a lack of facilities. Although the college is reputable, the infrastructure is not up to the mark, and Wi-Fi is also good. The library is decent, considering IITs, it is very below average, labs are good, and there are many labs.

admission_overview.college_name: Punjab Engineering College Admission 2025: Application, Process, Fees & Dates

admission_process.title: Punjab Engineering College, Chandigarh Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: PEC Chandigarh admissions are entrance-based.The college offers UG, PG, and PhD courses in Engineering. The college accepts JEE Mains, GATE for selection and also conducts counselling for seat allocation. The process can be completed online. Read this article to learn about the criteria and process for Punjab Engineering College admissions:

Punjab Engineering College Chandigarh admissions to various UG & PG courses, you need to fulfil the minimum eligibility followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to Punjab Engineering College Chandigarh course admissions 2025:
PEC Chandigarh Fees 2025

Punjab Engineering College Chandigarh fees may have various components such as Tuition Fees, Admission Fees, etc. The below table mentions the Punjab Engineering College Chandigarh fees for various UG & PG courses:
Note:The above-mentioned fee is taken from an official source/sanctioning body. Hence, it may vary.

The college offers PG courses via its campus and affiliated colleges.Punjab Engineering College Chandigarh seatsdiffer for both on-campus and affiliated colleges. Find below the seat bifurcation for PEC courses::

The admission process begins with visiting the website of the university, where they fill in the application form. The form should be delivered either by post or in person to the concerned department in PEC. There is also the requirement of an online payment of the application and entrance test fee, and the pay slip, combined with two copies of the online bank challan to be attached to the application form.
Selection Rounds

The admission to the PG courses offered at PEC Chandigarh is mainly based on the entrance examinations. Applicants have to be eligible in terms of taking the university or state-level entrance examination like GATE or CCMT in certain courses. On the other hand, admission to undergraduate courses depends on merit scores from the previous qualification examination.
Release and counselling of the Merit List

After all the selection rounds are done, successful candidates will undergo counselling for their respective courses. PEC Chandigarh, in turn, publishes merit lists at different stages, presenting the chosen candidates. Individuals on the merit list must pay a certain fee to claim their seat.
Check out more on Punjab Engineering College, Chandigarh in the below videos:

faqs.question: Can I get PEC Chandigarh with 85 percentile?
faqs.answer: Yes, students stand a good chance of getting admission at Punjab Engineering College Chandigarh (PEC) provided they have a percentile of 85 and above.The applicants with a competitive performance and the percentile of 80 to 85 are good candidates to be received in the high-ranking programmes of PEC.Nevertheless, the outcome of admission can be influenced by several other factors such as the number of applications offered, the specific course that is pursued and the criteria used by the university to determine admission.

faqs.question: How to get admission at PEC Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: For admission to PEC Chandigarh candidates need to clear the national-level entrance exams Also, candidates need to clear the eligibility criteria. Eligible candidates can apply by visiting the official website. Candidates can check more details below:PEC Chandigarh BTech admission is based on a candidate'sJEE Mainor DASA rankFor MTech, the University accepts admission throughGATEor CCMT scoresPEC Chandigarh BTech admission is based on UCEED, NID DAT, JEE Main, and NATA.PhD admission is conducted on the basis of a written test and Personal Interview (PI)

faqs.question: Can we get direct admission in PEC Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: For PEC Chandigarh BTech admission is based on a candidate'sGATEMain rank and for MTech, the University accepts admission throughGATEscores. Moreover, PhD admission is conducted on the basis of a written test and Personal Interview (PI).

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

description: Punjab Engineering College Chandigarh cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Further exam-related updates are below:

Punjab Engineering College Chandigarh JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the Punjab Engineering College Chandigarh CSE cutoff 2025 was 15393 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branches, such as ECE and Mechanical, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission were 24083 and 48066, respectively for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usua

For the General AI category students, the Punjab Engineering College Chandigarh B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 15393 and 84826 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 15393 and 15573, B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at Punjab Engineering College Chandigarh. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and M.Tech. in Computer Science & Information Security with last round cutoff scores of 433 and 429, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

For other categories' cutoff scores, use the provided filters.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at Punjab Engineering College, Chandigarh. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

PEC Chandigarh also accepts DASA UG scores for BE/ BTech and BArch admission. Candidates seeking admission to PEC Chandigarh can refer to the table given below to check out the DASA UG previous year cutoffs for the General category students:

Considering the last round of Punjab Engineering College Chandigarh CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Computer Science and Engineering and Computer Science & Information Security, witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branches such as Environmental Engineering and Electronics (VLSI Design) had comparatively relaxed cutoff scores for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

hostel_campus.college_name: Punjab Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Punjab Engineering College has 6 hostels in total - 4 for boys and 2 for girls. All the hostels have Wi-Fi connectivity and other required amenities like water purifiers, recreation rooms, indoor sports, mess, common rooms, TV, laundry facility etc.

library.description:
Punjab Engineering College has a central library with the collection of of 1,15,452 volumes and an active collection of 30,267 books under Book Bank Scheme to support SC/ST as well as General categories students. The library uses a commercial Library Management Software (LibSys) and also provides intranet access to all its students through Online Public Access Catalogue (OPAC). Central Library is also having Multimedia Resource Centre (MMRC) to make use of most popular mode of education i.e. Electronic Media with the help of ICT Technology and it has a collection of 1064 CDs, 143 floppies, 25 DVDs and 581 video cassettes on various disciplines of engineering and technology.

Library has also procured and installed NPTEL video and web courses on LAN of the institute for the benefit of the students. Students can access Internet and other subscribed e-resources at Multimedia Resource Centre (MMRC). Students can access over 2300 e-journals form publishers like ASCE Journals, ASME Journals, IEL Online etc.

Library is has Wi-Fi connectivity, book bank, reading hall, multimedia resources etc. and reading halls are open to students on all working days from 9:00 am till 8:00 pm.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball, Hockey, Handball, Yoga, Weightlifting, Wrestling, Kabaddi, Squash Courts

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college because it gives us all the facilities.
reviews.review_text: Full college Wi-Fi all over the campus. Labs are well-maintained, and the overall college infrastructure is average. There is a decent library with full facilities. Classrooms are very good, and the whole college is fully air-conditioned. Hostels are average, and food quality is also average, as in all NITs or other colleges. A medical dispensary is also available on campus. All types of sports and grounds are available with decent facilities, and there is also a gym.

reviews.review_heading: Peaceful life at Punjab Engineering College, Chandigarh.
reviews.review_text: Pretty campus, AC's in almost all classes except the old classrooms. For hostels, there are many restrictions. For girls, no one is allowed outside after 9, for boys, it’s a bit lenient. Clean rooms with windows. Boys’ hostel lacks a laundry though. A few small adjustments will have to be made.

reviews.review_heading: The college beats many top-tier colleges in terms of placement, and the overall experience is great.
reviews.review_text: Personally, I feel the infrastructure is quite updated and should be replaced, and development is ongoing. Everything a student needs is present on the campus. I like the library, computer labs, and reading area. The classrooms are equipped with smart projectors, and Wi-Fi is available throughout the building. The hostels are quite decent; again, the infrastructure is quite outdated, and the mess food is also decent. Sports facilities are available for every kind of game, like volleyball, cricke...

reviews.review_heading: Truth about the infrastructure of PEC, Chandigarh.
reviews.review_text: Classes lack Wi-Fi and internet connectivity due to jammers installed in the classes. The library is well-equipped with all the necessary facilities and Wi-Fi connectivity. The infrastructure of classes and labs is a bit too old. The facilities of the hostel are also just enough to survive, and the food quality is average. The canteen food is good. The college has enough facilities for endorsing sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: My college review, the one and only Punjab Engineering College, Chandigarh.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are not good, with decent infrastructure and a lack of facilities. Although the college is reputable, the infrastructure is not up to the mark, and Wi-Fi is also good. The library is decent, considering IITs, it is very below average, labs are good, and there are many labs.

reviews.review_heading: Punjab Engineering College Chandigarh review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of PEC Chandigarh is decent. First-year classrooms have AC, and the Computer Science department and ECE department also have AC. Wi-Fi is good. The infrastructure of labs is decent; some lab machines are old, while some have new machines. The library is good, and all types of books are available. Hostels are average but quite costly compared to other NITs. The mess is decent, and there is no hostel canteen. For medical facilities, there is a dispensary in PEC market where you ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Punjab Engineering College, Chandigarh.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are just good enough for surviving. However, rooms are pretty small for two students, and only one table is provided in a room of two. The tennis table is broken and the snooker room is non-functional. The mess food is good for mess standards, but definitely not of top quality.

reviews.review_heading: It has strong academics, supportive faculty, good placements and comfortable campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is good and designed to support practical learning. We have well-equipped computer labs, high-speed internet, and updated software tools that help us in coding and project work. Hostel facilities are decent and well-managed. Rooms are clean and have basic furniture like beds, study tables, and cupboards. The canteen and mess food is simple and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: PEC Chandigarh College review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of PEC Chandigarh is decent. First-year classrooms have AC, and the Computer Science department and the ECE department have AC. Wi-Fi is good. The infrastructure of labs is decent, some lab machines are old, and some have new machines. The library is good, and all types of books are available. The hostel is average but quite costly compared to other NITs. The mess is decent, and there is no hostel canteen or medical facilities. There is a dispensary in the PEC market where you...

reviews.review_heading: Amazing college with top-tier placements, good academic environment, and a nice atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure can surely be better. However, it is still manageable, with labs being allotted for every course. We have regular lab classes, promoting hands-on learning. The food quality is okay, and the hostel is also okay. Sports facilities are really good, with football, cricket, volleyball, basketball, lawn tennis, and badminton courts. It also has a great gym. I would say that PEC Chandigarh has a really good atmosphere.

reviews.review_heading: It's a beautiful college, and I am having a nice time here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is appreciable, classes are well built, spacious, and labs are nice. The department has its own building. We also have conference rooms and tutorial rooms. Hostels are good, rooms are good, but small for 2 people. Mess is average. There is a PEC market that has a dispensary. We have two 2 Nescafe outlets also. A lot of sports facilities are provided. We have a gym, a badminton court, volleyball, basketball, a tennis court, football, cricket, and an athletic ground.

reviews.review_heading: PEC is one of the top colleges in India. We have to get a great percentile in JEE Main.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is a bit old because the college itself is old. The food is above average. The PEC market is the best. Sports and facilities here are very good. I would rate the college 4 out of 5 stars. It is one of the top colleges in the whole country.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good, but it is a bit expensive.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is mediocre, not very good, but it's okay for the placements. Wi-Fi is good, labs are old but are good enough, library is top-notch, classrooms for 1st year are amazing, but for the following three years, classrooms are okayish, hostels are quite old for 1st year, but are like a hotel for 4th year.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and amazing campus life but the infrastructure needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are spacious and equipped with projectors, though some older blocks still lack ACs.The library is definitely the highlight, it's fully air-conditioned and has a massive collection of books and this is the go-to spot during exams. The campus-wide Wi-Fi is decent. Labs are well-equipped for the core. Hostel life here is an experience in itself. First year get shiwalik, which is old, and the rooms are compact. The washrooms are average and need frequent maintenance. The mess food is ...

reviews.review_heading: College is fine, but very overhyped.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is bad. The boys' hostel has very small rooms. Hostel food and cleanliness are average. In college, there are multiple dysfunctional labs. The robotics lab has machines which are out of order due to a lack of maintenance. The gym has old-school equipment, including very few weight plates, unlabelled dumbbells, non-adjustable pulleys, and dysfunctional machines.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Punjab Engineering College, Chandigarh

likes.text: Many reputed companies like GS, JP Morgan, Sandisk, Amazon, Microsoft, Tata, Honda, Volvo, etc., visit our college for placements.
Students of CSE, ECE and EE branches are allowed to appear for software companies, so there are many ]options for students.

likes.text: In this college, all facilities are available like smart classrooms, free Wi-Fi for students, hostel and hospital.
Boys hostels, Shivalik and Kurukshetra hostels are also well maintained although they do not have washing machines, they do have laundry facilities.

likes.text: The course curriculum is industry-relevant, and we are given with everything to choose from and we need to prepare on our hands for a lot of other things.
First of all, there are sufficient teachers for students and quality of teaching skills is good for the one coming only for education.
